EXPERIENTIAL LEARNING. FANTABULOUS CAMPUS. Sri Eshwar is the most preferred institution for high ranking students. With industry-relevant curriculum, project based learning, high energy faculty, corporate-like facilities, best amenities and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is the most sought after institution for high quality and holistic education. What’s more? We are proud to emerge, every year, as a TOP PLACEMENTS COLLEGE! WITH UNIVERSITIES AROUND THE WORLD ACADEMICS @ SRI ESHWAR Industry-relevant course content and skill based learning methods form the crux of our programme offerings. We extensively engage industry professionals to empower our faculty and students and help them stay updated. We also constantly update our curriculum and stay agile to suit the changing needs of industries. Our goal is to ensure that students are industry-ready in all aspects for their BRIGHT CAREERS . Bokep JAV Sub Indo GOJAV Sub Indo VegaMovies UG PROGRAMMES PG PROGRAMMES DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES UG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING B.E.Computer Science and Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) B.E.Computer and Communication Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) B.E.Electronics and Communication Engineering B.E.Electrical and Electronics Engineering B.E.Mechanical Engineering TECHNOLOGY B.Tech.Artificial Intelligence and Data Science B.Tech.Computer Science and Business Systems B.Tech.Information Technology PG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING M.E.Computer Science and Engineering M.E.Engineering Design M.E.VLSI Design DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES Anna University Approved Research Institute Ph.D. Programmes are offered across all Engineering, Technology, Science & Humanities disciplines. ADMISSIONS WORLDCLASS FACILITIES At Sri Eshwar, we go to great lengths to make sure we provide the best infrastructure and facilities for our students. With the right ambience, we can bring out the best potential hidden inside every student. We give the best facilities and ambience to students and expect the best performance from them, in return! Collab Space Collab Space, a space where students work in teams, collaborate to build products, gear up for upcoming hackathons and work on interesting projects. Collab Space provides the right ambience for students to get into the corporate groove. MakerSpace MakerSpace is a state-of the art facility specially designed to promote interdepartmental, multidisciplinary collaboration among students. This space provides exceptional facilities, training and mentorship to turn their ideas into successful products.The students are also groomed here to compete in national and international level contests. Interactive Classrooms To stay in-line with the skill-based teaching methods, our classrooms are equipped with smart and interactive boards to bring a wide variety of learning possibilities to students. Throughout the lectures, students stay connected to their laptops, to experiment and try out the problems being taught. Our classrooms are truly an engaging and interactive experience for students. IT Centre IT Centre was built  to provide students with an ultimate experience of an IT company. The IT Centre houses a 200 seater auditorium, Centres of Excellence with Virtusa, Aspire Systems, NTT Data etc and Extended Development Centres. Students are rigorously trained and prepared for placements here.Through the Centres of Excellence, the recruited students are given company specific training, so that they can be readily deployed into projects when they join the company. Innovative Learning Spaces Throughout the campus, you will find that Sri Eshwar is willing to go the extra mile to create the right ambience for learning. Students can learn well, when the environment is casual, supportive and comfortable. Our learning spaces are designed by keeping in mind the student’s comfort while they learn together in teams. Centre of Excellence Our Centres of Excellence promote multi-disciplinary learning which brings a confluence of ideas and new innovations to the forefront. Uniquely designed spaces, inspires students to work on their projects with a free and happy mind, and extracts their best capability. Placement Training Facility As a top placements college, we pride ourselves in providing exclusive placement training facilities. With more than four 200+ seating capacity facilities, four 60+ seating capacity training rooms, we can accommodate about 1000 students to undergo dedicated hands-on placement training at a time. With such exclusive training facilities paired with industry mentorship and high quality students, Sri Eshwar continues to top in placements every year in Tamil Nadu!. Synapse Studio Synapse Studio, an IT auditorium provides students with a hands-on learning experience. Industry experts and senior professionals utilize this space to conduct highly engaging hands-on sessions. dents to get into the corporate groove. Centre for International Relations Centre for International Relations immerses itself in enabling the exchange of students between Sri Eshwar and universities around the globe.The walls of this Centre is embellished with the pictures of the students and their university details who have already gone abroad and gathered rich and immersive experiences. This highly inspires students and also gives awareness on the possibilities of global education. Centre for Higher Education & Foreign Languages This Centre is used by students who wish to prepare for higher studies. Awareness sessions  on widespread future career options available to students after graduation, are conducted in the first year itself, by experts. Students who aspire for Higher Education, use the Centre to attend Coaching classes for competitive exam preparation. The Centre also conducts foreign language training in German and Japanese. Ignite - Startup Accelerator Ignite serves as a dedicated facility to drive innovation and entrepreneurial spirit into the mind of every Eshwarite. Ignite is a facility dedicated for students who wish to convert their ideas to prototypes and proof of concepts. A well equipped conference room, leader cabins, collaborative workspaces, discussion spaces form a part of the Ignite experience. Ignite, staying true to its name, ignites the spark of innovation in the minds of Eshwarites. Centre for Research Centre for Research has been established at Sri Eshwar with the intent to promote active research work by the faculty and student community for their academic research to publish papers, file patents and work on research projects.The Centre promotes focussed research through its 9 Advanced Research Centres. This Centre prides itself in housing some of the top research scientists of the world. State-of-the-art Labs While labs are an integral part of the learning process, Sri Eshwar goes the extra mile to provide students an innovative lab experience, so that they feel fully equipped and energized to go beyond the books and curriculum and use the labs to experiment their fresh ideas and test their hypothesis. Vista Hall Vista Hall, will be actively utilized for Industry Connect programmes, Leadership talk, Expert guest lectures, seminars and a wide variety of events. Vista Hall is equipped with state-of-the-art audio-visual infrastructure to support highly engaging presentations. Sound Recording Studio A fully equipped recording studio with studio lights and professional sound recording facilities, helps faculty record course content  as an additional effective way of teaching,  Students too walk in to record their presentations, podcasts and other audio bytes for their needs. Sri Eshwar nightingales from the Harmonix club also enjoy recording their songs with professional sound mixers. Amenity Centre Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. Medical Centre A fully functional Medical Centre is equipped to handle any emergency health-related services and comprehensive medical care for students. With a full time doctor and two nurses, latest medical equipment for basic treatment, separate wards for boys and girls, this facility can provide quick medical care for our students. Sports Facilities Sports is an integral part of the Sri Eshwar learning experience. We have dedicated facilities, coaches and equipments for a wide variety sports including, basketball, volleyball, athletics, cricket, hockey, kabbadi etc. With a team of enthusiastic coaches, our talented Eshwarites sports team, wins many awards and accolades in various sports tournaments. Winning is a habit of our Eshwar sports champions! PLACEMENT STORIES Sharing the glorious success of our 2025 batch who are placed in more than 120 top multinational companies. We are so proud of them! 60 L Highest Package 07 Students Placed Above 0 L 20 Students Placed Above 0 L 100 Students Placed Above 0 L 150+ Students Placed Above 0 L 350+ Students Placed Above 0 L 650+ Students Placed Above 0 L 800+ StudentS Placed PLACEMENTS IN 120+ GLOBAL ORGANIZATIONS KNOW MORE EXCELLENT RESEARCH Research is the cornerstone of ground breaking innovations that will change the landscape of the world for the better. At Sri Eshwar, we commit to extensive research and igniting the spark of innovation among our students and faculty members. Sri Eshwar is an extensive research institute! Academic Research sponsored research Advanced Research Centre KNOW MORE INNOVATION ECOSYSTEM New and ingenious ways of solving a problem, having a fresh alternate perspective, implementing ideas that have never been thought of before – such is the culture of our students and faculty at Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation. We sow the seeds of entrepreneurial spirit within Eshwarites and give them the freedom to think and innovate. Creativity and Innovation is in the air! centre for excellence HACKATHONS IGNITE - Startup
Accelerator KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS YOUR RUNWAY FOR GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES At the Centre for International Relations, we foster global associations and provide opportunities to students and faculty for international collaboration. Our mission is to create a vibrant environment that promotes academic exchange and rich international exposure for students and faculty members. With global cultural and knowledge exchange, new perspectives are born! 50+ Partnerships with top universities 100+ Global Events organized Intl. Advisory Board from leading overseas universities 1000+ Students trained in foreign languages KNOW MORE ESHWARITES SHINE GLOBALLY Our students actively participate in a wide variety of competitions and challenges conducted at the state, national and international level. We feel proud when our students make a mark in global challenges and hackathons.The will to win, the desire to succeed, and the urge to reach one’s full potential is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Buzzing with lively and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is always a fun-filled and happy campus. After a rigorous day of learning, our students have a host of activities to indulge in and engage themselves.Be it their love of music and dance, sweating it out in the sports field, or getting together with peers through club activities, the vibe around the campus is always HAPPY AND UPBEAT! EXPERIENCE THE CAMPUS LIFE CAMPUS TOUR ADMISSIONS HOSTEL CREATING MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME! COZY ROOMS. COMFORTABLE STAY. Well designed airy rooms,  clean and fully equipped kitchens, dining space with multi cuisine food options, facilities like laundry, salon & supermarket, lots of greenery, unique seating spaces for friends to get together and have casual conversations, extended lab facilities for students to work after college hours – forms a part of the Sri Eshwar hostel experience. Extended learning is a big part of hostel life. Our hostel at night, with beautiful lighting and the young energetic vibe of students, is a must-see for all! In a nutshell, Sri Eshwar hostel will provide the  ambience to relax, enjoy a variety of tasty food, and also to collaborate and grow in the company of peers. KNOW MORE FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS What are the programmes offered at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar is an autonomous institution affiliated to Anna University. We offer programmes like B.E and B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Mechanical,Information Technology, Computer Science and Business Systems, Computer and Communication, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Is there an active Alumni cell at Sri Eshwar? Yes, Sri Eshwar has an active Alumni cell that conducts activities throughout the year. Our alumni are dedicated in giving back to their alma mater and participate in various college activities as judges and mentors for their juniors. Does college offer Research sponsorships? Yes. College offers seed fund for research projects. Many projects are currently active through college seed fund. Apart from this the Centre for Research and Development also procures funds from government organizations to take up sponsored research projects. Does Sri Eshwar college offer placements? Yes. Sri Eshwar offers stupendous placement record every year in top companies. Our top packages are around 40 Lakhs per annum. Many students get placed at the beginning of third year itself and go for internships at companies. How is the hostel facility at Sri Eshwar? Hostel is like a home away from home. We offer a fully safe, secure and a comfortable hostel experience. With beautiful ambience, airy rooms, attached bathrooms, comfortable beds, individual study space, gym, beauty parlour, super market and a state-of-the-art amenity centre, hostel is a must-experience part of Sri Eshwar . How is the campus life at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar campus is full of positivity. It is a vibrant and happening place for students. Apart from studies students engage in many activities out of their interest, organize events and participate in many competitions in co-curricular and extra curricular. Campus ambience is also beautiful with grass and trees everywhere, along with corporate style offices and spaces for students to work on their projects. EXPERIENTIAL LEARNING. FANTABULOUS CAMPUS. Sri Eshwar is the most preferred institution for high ranking students. With industry-relevant curriculum, project based learning, high energy faculty, corporate-like facilities, best amenities and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is the most sought after institution for high quality and holistic education. What’s more? We are proud to emerge, every year, as a TOP PLACEMENTS COLLEGE! WITH UNIVERSITIES AROUND THE WORLD ACADEMICS @ SRI ESHWAR Industry-relevant course content and skill based learning methods form the crux of our programme offerings. We extensively engage industry professionals to empower our faculty and students and help them stay updated. We also constantly update our curriculum and stay agile to suit the changing needs of industries. Our goal is to ensure that students are industry-ready in all aspects for their BRIGHT CAREERS . Bokep JAV Sub Indo GOJAV Sub Indo VegaMovies UG PROGRAMMES PG PROGRAMMES DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES UG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING B.E.Computer Science and Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) B.E.Computer and Communication Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) B.E.Electronics and Communication Engineering B.E.Electrical and Electronics Engineering B.E.Mechanical Engineering TECHNOLOGY B.Tech.Artificial Intelligence and Data Science B.Tech.Computer Science and Business Systems B.Tech.Information Technology PG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING M.E.Computer Science and Engineering M.E.Engineering Design M.E.VLSI Design DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES Anna University Approved Research Institute Ph.D. Programmes are offered across all Engineering, Technology, Science & Humanities disciplines. ADMISSIONS WORLDCLASS FACILITIES At Sri Eshwar, we go to great lengths to make sure we provide the best infrastructure and facilities for our students. With the right ambience, we can bring out the best potential hidden inside every student. We give the best facilities and ambience to students and expect the best performance from them, in return! Collab Space Collab Space, a space where students work in teams, collaborate to build products, gear up for upcoming hackathons and work on interesting projects. Collab Space provides the right ambience for students to get into the corporate groove. MakerSpace MakerSpace is a state-of the art facility specially designed to promote interdepartmental, multidisciplinary collaboration among students. This space provides exceptional facilities, training and mentorship to turn their ideas into successful products.The students are also groomed here to compete in national and international level contests. Interactive Classrooms To stay in-line with the skill-based teaching methods, our classrooms are equipped with smart and interactive boards to bring a wide variety of learning possibilities to students. Throughout the lectures, students stay connected to their laptops, to experiment and try out the problems being taught. Our classrooms are truly an engaging and interactive experience for students. IT Centre IT Centre was built  to provide students with an ultimate experience of an IT company. The IT Centre houses a 200 seater auditorium, Centres of Excellence with Virtusa, Aspire Systems, NTT Data etc and Extended Development Centres. Students are rigorously trained and prepared for placements here.Through the Centres of Excellence, the recruited students are given company specific training, so that they can be readily deployed into projects when they join the company. Innovative Learning Spaces Throughout the campus, you will find that Sri Eshwar is willing to go the extra mile to create the right ambience for learning. Students can learn well, when the environment is casual, supportive and comfortable. Our learning spaces are designed by keeping in mind the student’s comfort while they learn together in teams. Centre of Excellence Our Centres of Excellence promote multi-disciplinary learning which brings a confluence of ideas and new innovations to the forefront. Uniquely designed spaces, inspires students to work on their projects with a free and happy mind, and extracts their best capability. Placement Training Facility As a top placements college, we pride ourselves in providing exclusive placement training facilities. With more than four 200+ seating capacity facilities, four 60+ seating capacity training rooms, we can accommodate about 1000 students to undergo dedicated hands-on placement training at a time. With such exclusive training facilities paired with industry mentorship and high quality students, Sri Eshwar continues to top in placements every year in Tamil Nadu!. Synapse Studio Synapse Studio, an IT auditorium provides students with a hands-on learning experience. Industry experts and senior professionals utilize this space to conduct highly engaging hands-on sessions. dents to get into the corporate groove. Centre for International Relations Centre for International Relations immerses itself in enabling the exchange of students between Sri Eshwar and universities around the globe.The walls of this Centre is embellished with the pictures of the students and their university details who have already gone abroad and gathered rich and immersive experiences. This highly inspires students and also gives awareness on the possibilities of global education. Centre for Higher Education & Foreign Languages This Centre is used by students who wish to prepare for higher studies. Awareness sessions  on widespread future career options available to students after graduation, are conducted in the first year itself, by experts. Students who aspire for Higher Education, use the Centre to attend Coaching classes for competitive exam preparation. The Centre also conducts foreign language training in German and Japanese. Ignite - Startup Accelerator Ignite serves as a dedicated facility to drive innovation and entrepreneurial spirit into the mind of every Eshwarite. Ignite is a facility dedicated for students who wish to convert their ideas to prototypes and proof of concepts. A well equipped conference room, leader cabins, collaborative workspaces, discussion spaces form a part of the Ignite experience. Ignite, staying true to its name, ignites the spark of innovation in the minds of Eshwarites. Centre for Research Centre for Research has been established at Sri Eshwar with the intent to promote active research work by the faculty and student community for their academic research to publish papers, file patents and work on research projects.The Centre promotes focussed research through its 9 Advanced Research Centres. This Centre prides itself in housing some of the top research scientists of the world. State-of-the-art Labs While labs are an integral part of the learning process, Sri Eshwar goes the extra mile to provide students an innovative lab experience, so that they feel fully equipped and energized to go beyond the books and curriculum and use the labs to experiment their fresh ideas and test their hypothesis. Vista Hall Vista Hall, will be actively utilized for Industry Connect programmes, Leadership talk, Expert guest lectures, seminars and a wide variety of events. Vista Hall is equipped with state-of-the-art audio-visual infrastructure to support highly engaging presentations. Sound Recording Studio A fully equipped recording studio with studio lights and professional sound recording facilities, helps faculty record course content  as an additional effective way of teaching,  Students too walk in to record their presentations, podcasts and other audio bytes for their needs. Sri Eshwar nightingales from the Harmonix club also enjoy recording their songs with professional sound mixers. Amenity Centre Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. Medical Centre A fully functional Medical Centre is equipped to handle any emergency health-related services and comprehensive medical care for students. With a full time doctor and two nurses, latest medical equipment for basic treatment, separate wards for boys and girls, this facility can provide quick medical care for our students. Sports Facilities Sports is an integral part of the Sri Eshwar learning experience. We have dedicated facilities, coaches and equipments for a wide variety sports including, basketball, volleyball, athletics, cricket, hockey, kabbadi etc. With a team of enthusiastic coaches, our talented Eshwarites sports team, wins many awards and accolades in various sports tournaments. Winning is a habit of our Eshwar sports champions! PLACEMENT STORIES Sharing the glorious success of our 2025 batch who are placed in more than 120 top multinational companies. We are so proud of them! 60 L Highest Package 07 Students Placed Above 0 L 20 Students Placed Above 0 L 100 Students Placed Above 0 L 150+ Students Placed Above 0 L 350+ Students Placed Above 0 L 650+ Students Placed Above 0 L 800+ StudentS Placed PLACEMENTS IN 120+ GLOBAL ORGANIZATIONS KNOW MORE EXCELLENT RESEARCH Research is the cornerstone of ground breaking innovations that will change the landscape of the world for the better. At Sri Eshwar, we commit to extensive research and igniting the spark of innovation among our students and faculty members. Sri Eshwar is an extensive research institute! Academic Research sponsored research Advanced Research Centre KNOW MORE INNOVATION ECOSYSTEM New and ingenious ways of solving a problem, having a fresh alternate perspective, implementing ideas that have never been thought of before – such is the culture of our students and faculty at Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation. We sow the seeds of entrepreneurial spirit within Eshwarites and give them the freedom to think and innovate. Creativity and Innovation is in the air! centre for excellence HACKATHONS IGNITE - Startup
Accelerator KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS YOUR RUNWAY FOR GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES At the Centre for International Relations, we foster global associations and provide opportunities to students and faculty for international collaboration. Our mission is to create a vibrant environment that promotes academic exchange and rich international exposure for students and faculty members. With global cultural and knowledge exchange, new perspectives are born! 50+ Partnerships with top universities 100+ Global Events organized Intl. Advisory Board from leading overseas universities 1000+ Students trained in foreign languages KNOW MORE ESHWARITES SHINE GLOBALLY Our students actively participate in a wide variety of competitions and challenges conducted at the state, national and international level. We feel proud when our students make a mark in global challenges and hackathons.The will to win, the desire to succeed, and the urge to reach one’s full potential is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Buzzing with lively and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is always a fun-filled and happy campus. After a rigorous day of learning, our students have a host of activities to indulge in and engage themselves.Be it their love of music and dance, sweating it out in the sports field, or getting together with peers through club activities, the vibe around the campus is always HAPPY AND UPBEAT! EXPERIENCE THE CAMPUS LIFE CAMPUS TOUR ADMISSIONS HOSTEL CREATING MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME! COZY ROOMS. COMFORTABLE STAY. Well designed airy rooms,  clean and fully equipped kitchens, dining space with multi cuisine food options, facilities like laundry, salon & supermarket, lots of greenery, unique seating spaces for friends to get together and have casual conversations, extended lab facilities for students to work after college hours – forms a part of the Sri Eshwar hostel experience. Extended learning is a big part of hostel life. Our hostel at night, with beautiful lighting and the young energetic vibe of students, is a must-see for all! In a nutshell, Sri Eshwar hostel will provide the  ambience to relax, enjoy a variety of tasty food, and also to collaborate and grow in the company of peers. KNOW MORE FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS What are the programmes offered at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar is an autonomous institution affiliated to Anna University. We offer programmes like B.E and B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Mechanical,Information Technology, Computer Science and Business Systems, Computer and Communication, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Is there an active Alumni cell at Sri Eshwar? Yes, Sri Eshwar has an active Alumni cell that conducts activities throughout the year. Our alumni are dedicated in giving back to their alma mater and participate in various college activities as judges and mentors for their juniors. Does college offer Research sponsorships? Yes. College offers seed fund for research projects. Many projects are currently active through college seed fund. Apart from this the Centre for Research and Development also procures funds from government organizations to take up sponsored research projects. Does Sri Eshwar college offer placements? Yes. Sri Eshwar offers stupendous placement record every year in top companies. Our top packages are around 40 Lakhs per annum. Many students get placed at the beginning of third year itself and go for internships at companies. How is the hostel facility at Sri Eshwar? Hostel is like a home away from home. We offer a fully safe, secure and a comfortable hostel experience. With beautiful ambience, airy rooms, attached bathrooms, comfortable beds, individual study space, gym, beauty parlour, super market and a state-of-the-art amenity centre, hostel is a must-experience part of Sri Eshwar . How is the campus life at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar campus is full of positivity. It is a vibrant and happening place for students. Apart from studies students engage in many activities out of their interest, organize events and participate in many competitions in co-curricular and extra curricular. Campus ambience is also beautiful with grass and trees everywhere, along with corporate style offices and spaces for students to work on their projects. EXPERIENTIAL LEARNING. FANTABULOUS CAMPUS. Sri Eshwar is the most preferred institution for high ranking students. With industry-relevant curriculum, project based learning, high energy faculty, corporate-like facilities, best amenities and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is the most sought after institution for high quality and holistic education. What’s more? We are proud to emerge, every year, as a TOP PLACEMENTS COLLEGE! SRI ESHWAR 50+ PARTNERSHIPS
WITH UNIVERSITIES AROUND THE WORLD ACADEMICS @ SRI ESHWAR Industry-relevant course content and skill based learning methods form the crux of our programme offerings. We extensively engage industry professionals to empower our faculty and students and help them stay updated. We also constantly update our curriculum and stay agile to suit the changing needs of industries. Our goal is to ensure that students are industry-ready in all aspects for their BRIGHT CAREERS . Bokep JAV Sub Indo GOJAV Sub Indo VegaMovies UG PROGRAMMES PG PROGRAMMES DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES UG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING B.E.Computer Science and Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) B.E.Computer and Communication Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) B.E.Electronics and Communication Engineering B.E.Electrical and Electronics Engineering B.E.Mechanical Engineering TECHNOLOGY B.Tech.Artificial Intelligence and Data Science B.Tech.Computer Science and Business Systems B.Tech.Information Technology PG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING M.E.Computer Science and Engineering M.E.Engineering Design M.E.VLSI Design DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES Anna University Approved Research Institute Ph.D. Programmes are offered across all Engineering, Technology, Science & Humanities disciplines. ADMISSIONS WORLDCLASS FACILITIES At Sri Eshwar, we go to great lengths to make sure we provide the best infrastructure and facilities for our students. With the right ambience, we can bring out the best potential hidden inside every student. We give the best facilities and ambience to students and expect the best performance from them, in return! Collab Space Collab Space, a space where students work in teams, collaborate to build products, gear up for upcoming hackathons and work on interesting projects. Collab Space provides the right ambience for students to get into the corporate groove. MakerSpace MakerSpace is a state-of the art facility specially designed to promote interdepartmental, multidisciplinary collaboration among students. This space provides exceptional facilities, training and mentorship to turn their ideas into successful products.The students are also groomed here to compete in national and international level contests. Interactive Classrooms To stay in-line with the skill-based teaching methods, our classrooms are equipped with smart and interactive boards to bring a wide variety of learning possibilities to students. Throughout the lectures, students stay connected to their laptops, to experiment and try out the problems being taught. Our classrooms are truly an engaging and interactive experience for students. IT Centre IT Centre was built  to provide students with an ultimate experience of an IT company. The IT Centre houses a 200 seater auditorium, Centres of Excellence with Virtusa, Aspire Systems, NTT Data etc and Extended Development Centres. Students are rigorously trained and prepared for placements here.Through the Centres of Excellence, the recruited students are given company specific training, so that they can be readily deployed into projects when they join the company. Innovative Learning Spaces Throughout the campus, you will find that Sri Eshwar is willing to go the extra mile to create the right ambience for learning. Students can learn well, when the environment is casual, supportive and comfortable. Our learning spaces are designed by keeping in mind the student’s comfort while they learn together in teams. Centre of Excellence Our Centres of Excellence promote multi-disciplinary learning which brings a confluence of ideas and new innovations to the forefront. Uniquely designed spaces, inspires students to work on their projects with a free and happy mind, and extracts their best capability. Placement Training Facility As a top placements college, we pride ourselves in providing exclusive placement training facilities. With more than four 200+ seating capacity facilities, four 60+ seating capacity training rooms, we can accommodate about 1000 students to undergo dedicated hands-on placement training at a time. With such exclusive training facilities paired with industry mentorship and high quality students, Sri Eshwar continues to top in placements every year in Tamil Nadu!. Synapse Studio Synapse Studio, an IT auditorium provides students with a hands-on learning experience. Industry experts and senior professionals utilize this space to conduct highly engaging hands-on sessions. dents to get into the corporate groove. Centre for International Relations Centre for International Relations immerses itself in enabling the exchange of students between Sri Eshwar and universities around the globe.The walls of this Centre is embellished with the pictures of the students and their university details who have already gone abroad and gathered rich and immersive experiences. This highly inspires students and also gives awareness on the possibilities of global education. Centre for Higher Education & Foreign Languages This Centre is used by students who wish to prepare for higher studies. Awareness sessions  on widespread future career options available to students after graduation, are conducted in the first year itself, by experts. Students who aspire for Higher Education, use the Centre to attend Coaching classes for competitive exam preparation. The Centre also conducts foreign language training in German and Japanese. Ignite - Startup Accelerator Ignite serves as a dedicated facility to drive innovation and entrepreneurial spirit into the mind of every Eshwarite. Ignite is a facility dedicated for students who wish to convert their ideas to prototypes and proof of concepts. A well equipped conference room, leader cabins, collaborative workspaces, discussion spaces form a part of the Ignite experience. Ignite, staying true to its name, ignites the spark of innovation in the minds of Eshwarites. Centre for Research Centre for Research has been established at Sri Eshwar with the intent to promote active research work by the faculty and student community for their academic research to publish papers, file patents and work on research projects.The Centre promotes focussed research through its 9 Advanced Research Centres. This Centre prides itself in housing some of the top research scientists of the world. State-of-the-art Labs While labs are an integral part of the learning process, Sri Eshwar goes the extra mile to provide students an innovative lab experience, so that they feel fully equipped and energized to go beyond the books and curriculum and use the labs to experiment their fresh ideas and test their hypothesis. Vista Hall Vista Hall, will be actively utilized for Industry Connect programmes, Leadership talk, Expert guest lectures, seminars and a wide variety of events. Vista Hall is equipped with state-of-the-art audio-visual infrastructure to support highly engaging presentations. Sound Recording Studio A fully equipped recording studio with studio lights and professional sound recording facilities, helps faculty record course content  as an additional effective way of teaching,  Students too walk in to record their presentations, podcasts and other audio bytes for their needs. Sri Eshwar nightingales from the Harmonix club also enjoy recording their songs with professional sound mixers. Amenity Centre Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. Medical Centre A fully functional Medical Centre is equipped to handle any emergency health-related services and comprehensive medical care for students. With a full time doctor and two nurses, latest medical equipment for basic treatment, separate wards for boys and girls, this facility can provide quick medical care for our students. Sports Facilities Sports is an integral part of the Sri Eshwar learning experience. We have dedicated facilities, coaches and equipments for a wide variety sports including, basketball, volleyball, athletics, cricket, hockey, kabbadi etc. With a team of enthusiastic coaches, our talented Eshwarites sports team, wins many awards and accolades in various sports tournaments. Winning is a habit of our Eshwar sports champions! PLACEMENT STORIES Sharing the glorious success of our 2025 batch who are placed in more than 120 top multinational companies. We are so proud of them! 60 L Highest Package 07 Students Placed Above 0 L 20 Students Placed Above 0 L 100 Students Placed Above 0 L 150+ Students Placed Above 0 L 350+ Students Placed Above 0 L 650+ Students Placed Above 0 L 800+ StudentS Placed PLACEMENTS IN 120+ GLOBAL ORGANIZATIONS KNOW MORE EXCELLENT RESEARCH Research is the cornerstone of ground breaking innovations that will change the landscape of the world for the better. At Sri Eshwar, we commit to extensive research and igniting the spark of innovation among our students and faculty members. Sri Eshwar is an extensive research institute! Academic Research sponsored research Advanced Research Centre KNOW MORE INNOVATION ECOSYSTEM New and ingenious ways of solving a problem, having a fresh alternate perspective, implementing ideas that have never been thought of before – such is the culture of our students and faculty at Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation. We sow the seeds of entrepreneurial spirit within Eshwarites and give them the freedom to think and innovate. Creativity and Innovation is in the air! centre for excellence HACKATHONS IGNITE - Startup
Accelerator KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS YOUR RUNWAY FOR GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES At the Centre for International Relations, we foster global associations and provide opportunities to students and faculty for international collaboration. Our mission is to create a vibrant environment that promotes academic exchange and rich international exposure for students and faculty members. With global cultural and knowledge exchange, new perspectives are born! 50+ Partnerships with top universities 100+ Global Events organized Intl. Advisory Board from leading overseas universities 1000+ Students trained in foreign languages KNOW MORE ESHWARITES SHINE GLOBALLY Our students actively participate in a wide variety of competitions and challenges conducted at the state, national and international level. We feel proud when our students make a mark in global challenges and hackathons.The will to win, the desire to succeed, and the urge to reach one’s full potential is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Buzzing with lively and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is always a fun-filled and happy campus. After a rigorous day of learning, our students have a host of activities to indulge in and engage themselves.Be it their love of music and dance, sweating it out in the sports field, or getting together with peers through club activities, the vibe around the campus is always HAPPY AND UPBEAT! EXPERIENCE THE CAMPUS LIFE CAMPUS TOUR ADMISSIONS HOSTEL CREATING MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME! COZY ROOMS. COMFORTABLE STAY. Well designed airy rooms,  clean and fully equipped kitchens, dining space with multi cuisine food options, facilities like laundry, salon & supermarket, lots of greenery, unique seating spaces for friends to get together and have casual conversations, extended lab facilities for students to work after college hours – forms a part of the Sri Eshwar hostel experience. Extended learning is a big part of hostel life. Our hostel at night, with beautiful lighting and the young energetic vibe of students, is a must-see for all! In a nutshell, Sri Eshwar hostel will provide the  ambience to relax, enjoy a variety of tasty food, and also to collaborate and grow in the company of peers. KNOW MORE FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS What are the programmes offered at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar is an autonomous institution affiliated to Anna University. We offer programmes like B.E and B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Mechanical,Information Technology, Computer Science and Business Systems, Computer and Communication, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Is there an active Alumni cell at Sri Eshwar? Yes, Sri Eshwar has an active Alumni cell that conducts activities throughout the year. Our alumni are dedicated in giving back to their alma mater and participate in various college activities as judges and mentors for their juniors. Does college offer Research sponsorships? Yes. College offers seed fund for research projects. Many projects are currently active through college seed fund. Apart from this the Centre for Research and Development also procures funds from government organizations to take up sponsored research projects. Does Sri Eshwar college offer placements? Yes. Sri Eshwar offers stupendous placement record every year in top companies. Our top packages are around 40 Lakhs per annum. Many students get placed at the beginning of third year itself and go for internships at companies. How is the hostel facility at Sri Eshwar? Hostel is like a home away from home. We offer a fully safe, secure and a comfortable hostel experience. With beautiful ambience, airy rooms, attached bathrooms, comfortable beds, individual study space, gym, beauty parlour, super market and a state-of-the-art amenity centre, hostel is a must-experience part of Sri Eshwar . How is the campus life at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar campus is full of positivity. It is a vibrant and happening place for students. Apart from studies students engage in many activities out of their interest, organize events and participate in many competitions in co-curricular and extra curricular. Campus ambience is also beautiful with grass and trees everywhere, along with corporate style offices and spaces for students to work on their projects. Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 International Summer Internship 2026 Fully Funded Program About The Program Sri Eshwar College of Engineering (SECE), Coimbatore, offers international students a fully funded two-week program combining hands-on technology projects, industry engagement, and cultural immersion across South India. Duration July 27 - Aug 09,  2026 Apply By 5th July, 2026 Why Coimbatore? Often called the “Manchester of South India,” Coimbatore is one of India’s fastest-growing industrial and technology hubs. Home to hundreds of manufacturing firms, IT companies, and startups, the city offers an authentic window into how Indian engineering and entrepreneurship operate at scale. SECE’s location in this ecosystem means internship participants benefit from proximity to real industry — not just classrooms. Begin Your Journey Our streamlined application process starts with a simple registration. Access the portal to receive updates on eligibility requirements and deadlines for the 2026 cohort. Fully Funded Program (Covered: Free Stay, Food, Airport Transfers & Sightseeing & Not Covered : Flights to/from India) Learn Build Explore Experience India Scan below QR code to apply Programmes Track A Smart Systems & IoT Dive into the world of connected devices, sensor networks, and intelligent automation. Participants in this track will work on real IoT deployment scenarios, exploring hardware-software integration, data collection pipelines, and smart system design. Track B Applied AI & Intelligence Explore how artificial intelligence is reshaping industries. This track takes participants from foundational machine learning concepts to real-world applied AI — including computer vision, natural language processing, and decision intelligence. Programme Highlights Hands-on laboratory & industry expert sessions Team-based innovation projects with mentoring Live industry visits & Demo Day exhibition Indian cultural immersion activities Certificate of completion issued by SECE Who Can Apply? We invite international students seeking hands-on training and global exposure: UG & PG students from any recognized international university. Cross-disciplinary: Engineering, Arts, or Science backgrounds. Tech Enthusiasts: Specifically designed for those interested in the future of technology and innovation. All participants receive Complimentary Cultural Tours to explore the heritage of South India. EXPERIENTIAL LEARNING. FANTABULOUS CAMPUS. Sri Eshwar is the most preferred institution for high ranking students. With industry-relevant curriculum, project based learning, high energy faculty, corporate-like facilities, best amenities and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is the most sought after institution for high quality and holistic education. What’s more? We are proud to emerge, every year, as a TOP PLACEMENTS COLLEGE! Slot Demo Slot Gacor Slot Gacor Anti Kalah SBOBET MAXWIN25 KNOW MORE 12 th POSITION IN TAMILNADU TNEA 2025 ADMISSIONS 6 th RANK IN COIMBATORE TNEA 2025 ADMISSIONS. RANKED IN NIRF2025 201 - 300 BAND UNDER ENGINEERING CATEGORY TOP 2% SCIENTISTS OF THE WORLD WITH 
SRI ESHWAR 50+ PARTNERSHIPS
WITH UNIVERSITIES AROUND THE WORLD ACADEMICS @ SRI ESHWAR Industry-relevant course content and skill based learning methods form the crux of our programme offerings. We extensively engage industry professionals to empower our faculty and students and help them stay updated. We also constantly update our curriculum and stay agile to suit the changing needs of industries. Our goal is to ensure that students are industry-ready in all aspects for their BRIGHT CAREERS . Bokep JAV Sub Indo GOJAV Sub Indo VegaMovies UG PROGRAMMES PG PROGRAMMES DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES UG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING B.E.Computer Science and Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) B.E.Computer and Communication Engineering B.E.Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) B.E.Electronics and Communication Engineering B.E.Electrical and Electronics Engineering B.E.Mechanical Engineering TECHNOLOGY B.Tech.Artificial Intelligence and Data Science B.Tech.Computer Science and Business Systems B.Tech.Information Technology PG PROGRAMMES ENGINEERING M.E.Computer Science and Engineering M.E.Engineering Design M.E.VLSI Design DOCTORATE PROGRAMMES Anna University Approved Research Institute Ph.D. Programmes are offered across all Engineering, Technology, Science & Humanities disciplines. ADMISSIONS WORLDCLASS FACILITIES At Sri Eshwar, we go to great lengths to make sure we provide the best infrastructure and facilities for our students. With the right ambience, we can bring out the best potential hidden inside every student. We give the best facilities and ambience to students and expect the best performance from them, in return! Collab Space Collab Space, a space where students work in teams, collaborate to build products, gear up for upcoming hackathons and work on interesting projects. Collab Space provides the right ambience for students to get into the corporate groove. MakerSpace MakerSpace is a state-of the art facility specially designed to promote interdepartmental, multidisciplinary collaboration among students. This space provides exceptional facilities, training and mentorship to turn their ideas into successful products.The students are also groomed here to compete in national and international level contests. Interactive Classrooms To stay in-line with the skill-based teaching methods, our classrooms are equipped with smart and interactive boards to bring a wide variety of learning possibilities to students. Throughout the lectures, students stay connected to their laptops, to experiment and try out the problems being taught. Our classrooms are truly an engaging and interactive experience for students. IT Centre IT Centre was built  to provide students with an ultimate experience of an IT company. The IT Centre houses a 200 seater auditorium, Centres of Excellence with Virtusa, Aspire Systems, NTT Data etc and Extended Development Centres. Students are rigorously trained and prepared for placements here.Through the Centres of Excellence, the recruited students are given company specific training, so that they can be readily deployed into projects when they join the company. Innovative Learning Spaces Throughout the campus, you will find that Sri Eshwar is willing to go the extra mile to create the right ambience for learning. Students can learn well, when the environment is casual, supportive and comfortable. Our learning spaces are designed by keeping in mind the student’s comfort while they learn together in teams. Centre of Excellence Our Centres of Excellence promote multi-disciplinary learning which brings a confluence of ideas and new innovations to the forefront. Uniquely designed spaces, inspires students to work on their projects with a free and happy mind, and extracts their best capability. Placement Training Facility As a top placements college, we pride ourselves in providing exclusive placement training facilities. With more than four 200+ seating capacity facilities, four 60+ seating capacity training rooms, we can accommodate about 1000 students to undergo dedicated hands-on placement training at a time. With such exclusive training facilities paired with industry mentorship and high quality students, Sri Eshwar continues to top in placements every year in Tamil Nadu!. Synapse Studio Synapse Studio, an IT auditorium provides students with a hands-on learning experience. Industry experts and senior professionals utilize this space to conduct highly engaging hands-on sessions. dents to get into the corporate groove. Centre for International Relations Centre for International Relations immerses itself in enabling the exchange of students between Sri Eshwar and universities around the globe.The walls of this Centre is embellished with the pictures of the students and their university details who have already gone abroad and gathered rich and immersive experiences. This highly inspires students and also gives awareness on the possibilities of global education. Centre for Higher Education & Foreign Languages This Centre is used by students who wish to prepare for higher studies. Awareness sessions  on widespread future career options available to students after graduation, are conducted in the first year itself, by experts. Students who aspire for Higher Education, use the Centre to attend Coaching classes for competitive exam preparation. The Centre also conducts foreign language training in German and Japanese. Ignite - Startup Accelerator Ignite serves as a dedicated facility to drive innovation and entrepreneurial spirit into the mind of every Eshwarite. Ignite is a facility dedicated for students who wish to convert their ideas to prototypes and proof of concepts. A well equipped conference room, leader cabins, collaborative workspaces, discussion spaces form a part of the Ignite experience. Ignite, staying true to its name, ignites the spark of innovation in the minds of Eshwarites. Centre for Research Centre for Research has been established at Sri Eshwar with the intent to promote active research work by the faculty and student community for their academic research to publish papers, file patents and work on research projects.The Centre promotes focussed research through its 9 Advanced Research Centres. This Centre prides itself in housing some of the top research scientists of the world. State-of-the-art Labs While labs are an integral part of the learning process, Sri Eshwar goes the extra mile to provide students an innovative lab experience, so that they feel fully equipped and energized to go beyond the books and curriculum and use the labs to experiment their fresh ideas and test their hypothesis. Vista Hall Vista Hall, will be actively utilized for Industry Connect programmes, Leadership talk, Expert guest lectures, seminars and a wide variety of events. Vista Hall is equipped with state-of-the-art audio-visual infrastructure to support highly engaging presentations. Sound Recording Studio A fully equipped recording studio with studio lights and professional sound recording facilities, helps faculty record course content  as an additional effective way of teaching,  Students too walk in to record their presentations, podcasts and other audio bytes for their needs. Sri Eshwar nightingales from the Harmonix club also enjoy recording their songs with professional sound mixers. Amenity Centre Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. Medical Centre A fully functional Medical Centre is equipped to handle any emergency health-related services and comprehensive medical care for students. With a full time doctor and two nurses, latest medical equipment for basic treatment, separate wards for boys and girls, this facility can provide quick medical care for our students. Sports Facilities Sports is an integral part of the Sri Eshwar learning experience. We have dedicated facilities, coaches and equipments for a wide variety sports including, basketball, volleyball, athletics, cricket, hockey, kabbadi etc. With a team of enthusiastic coaches, our talented Eshwarites sports team, wins many awards and accolades in various sports tournaments. Winning is a habit of our Eshwar sports champions! PLACEMENT STORIES Sharing the glorious success of our 2025 batch who are placed in more than 120 top multinational companies. We are so proud of them! 60 L Highest Package 07 Students Placed Above 0 L 20 Students Placed Above 0 L 100 Students Placed Above 0 L 150+ Students Placed Above 0 L 350+ Students Placed Above 0 L 650+ Students Placed Above 0 L 800+ StudentS Placed PLACEMENTS IN 120+ GLOBAL ORGANIZATIONS KNOW MORE EXCELLENT RESEARCH Research is the cornerstone of ground breaking innovations that will change the landscape of the world for the better. At Sri Eshwar, we commit to extensive research and igniting the spark of innovation among our students and faculty members. Sri Eshwar is an extensive research institute! Academic Research sponsored research Advanced Research Centre KNOW MORE INNOVATION ECOSYSTEM New and ingenious ways of solving a problem, having a fresh alternate perspective, implementing ideas that have never been thought of before – such is the culture of our students and faculty at Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation. We sow the seeds of entrepreneurial spirit within Eshwarites and give them the freedom to think and innovate. Creativity and Innovation is in the air! centre for excellence HACKATHONS IGNITE - Startup
Accelerator KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS YOUR RUNWAY FOR GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES At the Centre for International Relations, we foster global associations and provide opportunities to students and faculty for international collaboration. Our mission is to create a vibrant environment that promotes academic exchange and rich international exposure for students and faculty members. With global cultural and knowledge exchange, new perspectives are born! 50+ Partnerships with top universities 100+ Global Events organized Intl. Buzzing with lively and vibrant activities, Sri Eshwar is always a fun-filled and happy campus. After a rigorous day of learning, our students have a host of activities to indulge in and engage themselves.Be it their love of music and dance, sweating it out in the sports field, or getting together with peers through club activities, the vibe around the campus is always HAPPY AND UPBEAT! EXPERIENCE THE CAMPUS LIFE CAMPUS TOUR ADMISSIONS HOSTEL CREATING MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME! COZY ROOMS. COMFORTABLE STAY. Well designed airy rooms,  clean and fully equipped kitchens, dining space with multi cuisine food options, facilities like laundry, salon & supermarket, lots of greenery, unique seating spaces for friends to get together and have casual conversations, extended lab facilities for students to work after college hours – forms a part of the Sri Eshwar hostel experience. Extended learning is a big part of hostel life. Our hostel at night, with beautiful lighting and the young energetic vibe of students, is a must-see for all! In a nutshell, Sri Eshwar hostel will provide the  ambience to relax, enjoy a variety of tasty food, and also to collaborate and grow in the company of peers. KNOW MORE FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS What are the programmes offered at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar is an autonomous institution affiliated to Anna University. We offer programmes like B.E and B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Mechanical,Information Technology, Computer Science and Business Systems, Computer and Communication, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Is there an active Alumni cell at Sri Eshwar? Yes, Sri Eshwar has an active Alumni cell that conducts activities throughout the year. Our alumni are dedicated in giving back to their alma mater and participate in various college activities as judges and mentors for their juniors. Does college offer Research sponsorships? Yes. College offers seed fund for research projects. Many projects are currently active through college seed fund. Apart from this the Centre for Research and Development also procures funds from government organizations to take up sponsored research projects. Does Sri Eshwar college offer placements? Yes. Sri Eshwar offers stupendous placement record every year in top companies. Our top packages are around 40 Lakhs per annum. Many students get placed at the beginning of third year itself and go for internships at companies. How is the hostel facility at Sri Eshwar? Hostel is like a home away from home. We offer a fully safe, secure and a comfortable hostel experience. With beautiful ambience, airy rooms, attached bathrooms, comfortable beds, individual study space, gym, beauty parlour, super market and a state-of-the-art amenity centre, hostel is a must-experience part of Sri Eshwar . How is the campus life at Sri Eshwar? Sri Eshwar campus is full of positivity. It is a vibrant and happening place for students. Apart from studies students engage in many activities out of their interest, organize events and participate in many competitions in co-curricular and extra curricular. Campus ambience is also beautiful with grass and trees everywhere, along with corporate style offices and spaces for students to work on their projects. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INTERNAL QUALITY ASSURANCE CELL (IQAC) ROBUST PROCESSES. STRICT ADHERENCE. INCREASED EFFICIENCY. MOVING FROM PEOPLE DEPENDENCY TO A ROBUST PROCESS CULTURE. Processes play a pivotal role in the effective and efficient management of any organization.  At Sri Eshwar, we strongly believe in a process culture that would help in ensuring quality in everything we do. The Internal Quality Assurance Cell at Sri Eshwar plays a key role in strategizing, defining, disseminating, implementing, monitoring and improving the processes on an ongoing basis. LEADERSHIP Dr.M.Lakshmanan Dean – IQAC Know more COMPOSITION IQAC is constituted in our institution under the Chairmanship of the Head of the institution with heads of important academic and administrative units and a few teachers and a few distinguished educationists and representatives of local management and stakeholders. The composition of the IQAC is as follows: Chairperson: Head of the Institution A few senior administrative officers Three to eight teachers One member from the Management One/two nominees from local society, Students and Alumni One/two nominees from Employers /Industrialists/stakeholders One of the senior teachers as the coordinator/Director of the IQAC VISION To nurture a process culture that will lead to achieving excellence in all our activities. MISSION Defining the best-in-class processes Disseminating and institutionalizing the processes Improving the processes continually, to be on par with globally renowned institutions STRATEGIES Ensuring timely, efficient and progressive performance of academic, administrative and financial tasks The relevance and quality of academic and research programmes Equitable access to and affordability of academic programmes for various sections of society Optimization and integration of modern methods of teaching and learning The credibility of evaluation procedures Ensuring the adequacy, maintenance and functioning of the support structure and services Research sharing and networking with other institutions in India and abroad FUNCTIONS Development and application of quality benchmarks/parameters for various academic and administrative activities of the institution Facilitating the creation of a learner-centric environment conducive to quality education and faculty maturation to adopt the required knowledge and technology for participatory teaching and learning process Arrangement for feedback response from students, parents and other stakeholders on quality-related institutional processes Dissemination of information on various quality parameters of higher education Organization of inter and intra institutional workshops, seminars on quality related themes and promotion of quality circles Documentation of the various programmes/activities leading to quality improvement Acting as a nodal agency of the Institution for coordinating quality-related activities, including adoption and dissemination of best practices Development and maintenance of institutional database through MIS for the purpose of maintaining/enhancing the institutional quality Development of Quality Culture in the institution Preparation of the Annual Quality Assurance Report (AQAR) as per guidelines and parameters of NAAC, to be submitted to NAAC BENEFITS Ensure heightened level of clarity and focus in institutional functioning towards quality enhancement Ensure internalization of the quality culture Ensure enhancement and coordination among various activities of the institution and institutionalize all good practices Provide a sound basis for decision-making to improve institutional functioning Act as a dynamic system for quality changes in HEIs Build an organised methodology of documentation and internal communication OUTCOMES NAAC, NBA ACCREDITATION NATIONAL RANKING/RATING INTERNATIONAL RANKING/RATING ALL INDIA SURVEY FOR HIGHER Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 SUBSTAINABLE  DEVELOPMENT  GOALS SDG Introduction The United Nations Transforming Our World: The 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development stands as one of the most ambitious and significant global agreements in recent history. Central to this agenda is the 17 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), which serve as a comprehensive guide to addressing the world’s most urgent challenges, including the eradication of poverty, the promotion of economic prosperity, social inclusion, environmental sustainability, and the establishment of peace and good governance in all countries by 2030. To achieve this, a comprehensive, whole-of-Sri Eshwar approach is imperative, where the administration, teaching and learning, research departments, and quality assessment divisions can leverage the following steps to initiate and deepen their engagement with the SDGs: Mapping Current Initiatives: Assessing and documenting existing efforts aligned with the SDGs. Building Internal Capacity and Ownership : Fostering a culture of understanding and commitment to the SDGs within the Sri Eshwar. Identifying Priorities, Opportunities, and Gaps : Recognizing key areas of focus, potential opportunities for impact, and areas requiring attention. Integrating, Implementing, and Embedding the SDGs: Seamlessly incorporating the SDGs into Sri Eshwaral strategies, policies, and plans. Monitoring, Evaluating, and Communicating Progress: Systematically tracking, assessing, and reporting on actions taken towards the SDGs. By implementing these strategies and fostering a culture that supports sustainable practices, Sri Eshwar can play a pivotal role in advancing the SDGs within their spheres of influence and beyond. Sustainable Development  Goals No Poverty Eradicating poverty ensures dignity, equality, resilience, and opportunity, uplifting vulnerable populations toward sustainable, inclusive development. KNOW MORE Zero hunger Ending hunger strengthens nutrition, resilience, productivity, and food systems, ensuring equitable access for all people. KNOW MORE Good health and well-being Promoting health and wellbeing enhances longevity, productivity, equity, resilience, and sustainable societal development globally outcomes. KNOW MORE Quality education Quality education empowers minds, reduces inequality, drives innovation, builds skills, and enables lifelong opportunities worldwide. KNOW MORE Gender equality Gender equality unlocks human potential, ensures rights, strengthens economies, fosters justice, and transforms societies everywhere. KNOW MORE Clean water and sanitation Clean water and sanitation protect health, dignity, ecosystems, productivity, and resilience for communities worldwide today. KNOW MORE Affordable and clean energy Affordable clean energy powers development, reduces emissions, improves livelihoods, innovation, resilience, and energy security globally. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 Research Ethics Committee The Committee’s purpose is to constantly propagate among the researchers. The importance of adherence to integrity through training sessions and posters and investigate into cases of code of conduct and ethics violation. OBJECTIVES Promoting ethical research practices through training sessions, workshops, and awareness initiatives such as posters and seminars. Ensuring adherence to research integrity by guiding researchers on ethical compliance and responsible conduct. Investigating and addressing any cases of code of conduct or ethics violations, ensuring appropriate actions are taken to maintain
academic and research credibility. MODES OF GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL Drop a letter in Grievance/Suggestion Box available in front of the office. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 Examination Committee The Examination Committee is established to ensure the efficient, transparent, and fair conduct of all internal and external examinations within the institution. It is entrusted with the entire examination process and strictly adheres to institutional policies and regulatory norms, thereby upholding the integrity and credibility of the examination system. In addition, the committee assumes responsibility for quality assurance of examinations, maintaining academic standards and supporting outcome-based education. The Examination Committee members disperses their duties as per the directions of head of the institution and assists in all examinations related works, exam conduction, evaluation, result processing and declaration of results. OBJECTIVES To develop clear and transparent mechanism for assessment and evaluation of students. To prepare the examination calendar in alignment with academic calendar. To hold a pre-exam meeting to brief the members and faculties with regard to the examination procedures and their role and responsibilities. To communicate instructions effectively to the students through various channels, such as e-mails, notice boards and institute’s Learning Management System. To ensure that both internal and external examinations are aligned with the competencies and learning outcomes required by the respective programme and to participate in formal review panels for examinations as and when required. To address the grievances/ complaints of the students and staff concerning exam-related issues. Recommend appropriate action towards the malpractice cases in the examinations. To address cases of negligence or unfair means by paper setters, examiners, evaluators, scrutiny members or any individuals involved in the conduct of examinations and to determine and implement appropriate disciplinary actions as necessary. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL COMMITTEE (GRC) The Grievance Redressal Committee is established at Sri Eshwar to provide a platform for redressal of genuine grievances of students and staff. We believe that all grievances must be heard and addressed in the appropriate manner.
According to UGC, AICTE and Anna University regulations, the objectives, Mode of Grievance Redressal and the composition of the GRC Committee including faculty and student members for the academic year are given below. OBJECTIVES The Grievance Cell has been established with the aim of fostering a healthy and harmonious environment for both faculty and students, as well as addressing concerns from parents. Promoting an environment in which students feel comfortable expressing their concerns and issues freely, without the fear of facing any form of retaliation. Ensuring that student grievances are addressed effectively through an impartial and unbiased process, thereby facilitating fair resolutions.
List of Anti-ragging Committee MembersList of Anti-ragging Vigilance Squad Members. MODES OF GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL Drop a letter in Grievance/Suggestion Box available in front of the office. Mail to grc@sece.ac.in Use online Grievance module through Impress ERP using My performance module. Reach out to GRC members through their Mobile numbers. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 Library Advisory Committee In line with best practices in academic governance, Sri Eshwar College of Engineering has constituted a Library Advisory Committee to ensure effective planning, development, and administration of library services and resources. The committee functions as a consultative body to support the library’s mission in promoting research, teaching, and learning across undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programe. OBJECTIVES The Library Advisory Committee is established with the following key objectives: To recommend suitable annual budget allocations for library development and digital
resource subscriptions. To formulate and periodically review library policies related to procurement and
usage. To assess the academic and research needs of various departments and recommend
resources accordingly. To develop a strategic plan for enhancing library services and infrastructure in
alignment with institutional goals. To advise on the integration of technology and digital tools to improve user access
and experience. To approve or revise library rules and regulations, ensuring fairness and efficiency in
library operations. To support the preservation and archiving of physical and digital resources for long-
term access. To oversee the smooth and effective functioning of the Central Library. MODES OF GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL Drop a letter in Grievance/Suggestion Box available in front of the office. Mail to grc@sece.ac.in Use online Grievance module through Impress ERP using My performance module. Reach out to GRC members through their Mobile numbers. the direction and recommendations of the National Accreditation and Assessment Council, in order to create and maintain a community in which teaching, non-teaching staff and students can work together in an environment free of sexual violence, harassment, exploitation and intimidation. OBJECTIVES Prevent discrimination and sexual harassment against women, by promoting gender amity among students and employees. To ensure that victims and witnesses are not victimized or discriminated because of their complaint. To take proactive measures towards sensitization of the working and learning community on gender issues so that the University is an excellent work place for all. Recommend appropriate punitive action against the guilty. COMMITTEE MEMBERS 2025 - 2026 2024 -2025 2023 -2024 S. No Name Designation Role Mobile No Email ID 1 Mr.S.Richard, Advocate. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 COUNSELLOR COMMITTEE Need Counselling / Guidance  - Click Here Sri Eshwar is deeply committed to supporting the mental well-being of its community. A full-time counsellor, working under the guidance of the Head – Office of Student Welfare , is available to provide confidential support to students, faculty, and staff . The counsellor’s role focuses on: Providing professional guidance through one-on-one counselling sessions. Organizing awareness initiatives to promote mental health and emotional well-being. Creating a safe, supportive, and inclusive environment for individuals facing emotional, psychological, or personal challenges. STUDENT COUNSELLOR Ms.Bavithra Arumugam OBJECTIVES Personal Counseling (stress, anxiety, depression, homesickness, relationship and emotional issues, or any other personal issues) Therapeutic sessions (relaxation techniques, CBT, Art therapy, Play therapy, etc). Academic Counselling (facing academic challenges, feeling overwhelmed by coursework, or seeking guidance on career planning for future aspirations). Group Counselling (foster connections with peers who share similar experiences, promoting mutual support and growth). Conducting Workshops and Seminars for various topics such as stress management, time management, study skills, mental health awareness and personality development programs. Performing Psychometric Assessments to predict individual’s personalities and behavioural tendencies. Work-related stress (managing workload, time management, and work-life balance). Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 ANTI RAGGING COMMITTEE Sri Eshwar has a zero tolerance policy to ragging.  As per the guidelines from AICTE, UGC and Anna University and Directorate of Technical Education- TamilNadu, Anti-Ragging Committee is constituted at Sri Eshwar College with members from academics, government departments, NGO/society, parents and students. The Committee discharges its duty to preserve a Culture of Ragging Free Environment in the College Campus. OBJECTIVES Anti Ragging committee serves to ensure the campus has no incidents however minor related to ragging or bullying of any student. We promote an environment where students feel free to express themselves and share any incidents big or small which can be acted up immediately. Ensure that any grievance related to ragging or bullying, however small, can be investigated thoroughly and disciplinary action taken should the issue be justified. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 GOVERNANCE THREE INSPIRING VISIONARY LEADERS ONE GOAL. ONE DIRECTION. Mr.R.Mohanram Chairman In today’s fast paced and rapidly changing world, being agile and adaptive to technological changes is a must and this is what sets us apart. I can say with pride, that Sri Eshwar has been providing quality education on par with global standards. Since the inception, we have always been walking hand-in-hand with the needs of the industry, keeping ourselves updated with the trends, and producing best-in-class engineers who are ready to take on the world. With strong visionary leadership and highly committed faculty, Team Sri Eshwar has been able to bring out the best in each student by giving them all resources required to reach great heights. I once again heartily congratulate the college for taking ardent and intense interest in moulding the smart future engineers! Mr.R.Rajaram Director At Sri Eshwar, we believe that the journey towards your goals isn’t just a path to take, but an integral part of the experience. When you set your goals higher than what you believe you can achieve, then the path will begin to appear. Our role is to follow the path, cross hurdles and obstacles and keep on marching ahead. At Sri Eshwar, you’ll find yourself not just on the right path, but within a supportive community that prioritizes your holistic development, ensuring you reach the peak of success as a well-rounded professional. Our joy is to see each student leave Sri Eshwar to reach pinnacles of success in their chosen field. It is a true team work. Dr.Sudha Mohanram Principal & Joint Managing Trustee At Sri Eshwar, we try our best to provide the most industry-centric academics, highest quality of infrastructure and facilities, high ranking faculty, a lively and vibrant atmosphere to make this a learner’s paradise! Sri Eshwar is also a researcher’s haven. We inspire our staff and students to dive deep in research by giving them the infrastructure support and research mentorship. We ensure that the seeds of innovative thinking and problem solving are sown in the minds of every student and staff member. We are also committed to give students international study and work experience as it gives a big boost to their confidence and global exposure. Right from the inception of the college, we have focussed on placing our students at top companies and we are hugely successful in placements. Today we stand across Tamil Nadu as a top placements college. Every day at Sri Eshwar, every hour, every minute, every second – we stand unified with the goal of how to make students successful. Our team works very hard, with a smile on our face, towards this common vision to bring Sri Eshwar to the pinnacle of success. Our students’ success is our success. COME JOIN US TO EXPERIENCE LEARNING AT ITS BEST!
