Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 AWARDS & ACHIEVEMENTS Celebrating our journey, our Victories... We are humbled by the various awards and recognition we have received at every step of our journey so far. It is a testament for our hard work and dedication to be the best in every aspect of education. Each of these awards motivate us to run faster, jump higher and aim for the stars! Best Industry Linked Emerging Institute Award Awarded by AICTE-CII in 2014 out of 952 engineering colleges across India. Best Placement and Career Building Award Awarded by All India Technical and Management Council during the 3rd Annual Corporate Summit. Sustainable Institute Industry Partnership Award Awarded by the Society for Educational And Entrepreneurship Development (SEED), in 2014 under the Upcoming Engineering College with Good Potential category Distinguished Alumni Outstanding Achievement Award to our Chairman Mr.R.Mohanram Awarded by PSG College of Technology. The award was handed over by Shri YS Chowdary, Union Minister of State for Science and Technology. Best Industry Interface Institute Award Awarded by 24MRC Network in 2015. Best Organization Encouraging Entrepreneurs in MSME Awarded by ASSOCHAM in 2015. 9th Rank in DATAQUEST Survey Ranked by TOP T Schools 2016. National Level Award for Best Professional Institute for Skill Development Received from Hon.Union Minister Mr. Rajeev Pradap Rudi. Icon of Coimbatore Award Conferred on our Principal, Dr.Sudha Mohanram by Rathinam Group of Institutions in 2015. Woman Achiever Award 2018 Conferred on our Principal, Dr. Sudha Mohanram, by Aspire Systems.​ Igen Green Day Award Silver Category 2023 (SDG Desimination) Awarded by IGEN Sustainable partnership certification with UNSDG 2024 Awarded by the Institution of Green Engineers. Academic Excellence Award 2024 Awarded by the Institution of Engineers (IEI). capturing the moments COME JOIN US TO EXPERIENCE LEARNING AT ITS BEST! TOP RESULTS ACADEMICS @ SRI ESHWAR LEARNING MEETS EXCELLENCE At Sri Eshwar, we are committed to nurture the next generation of engineering leaders by seamlessly integrating theory and practice into our curriculum. Our continuously evolving, project-based curriculum, coupled with strong industry collaboration, fosters innovation and excellence, turning your ideas into real-world solutions. Join us to experience a world-class engineering education! EXPERIENTIAL LEARNING SMART CLASS ROOMS INDUSTRY ALIGNED CURRICULUM INDUSTRY MENTORSHIP LEADERSHIP Dr.R.K.Suresh Dean – Academics Know more Dr.R.Deepa Professor & Associate Dean – Academics Planning & Performance Know more academic courses We offer a project-based curriculum featuring a blend of integrated theory, practical and project-based courses which is continuously updated in consultation with industry experts. The project components of our courses are delivered by industry experts and industry-trained faculty, emphasizing hands-on learning and real-world application, ensuring our students are well-prepared to excel in the dynamic engineering landscape. This unique approach not only enhances students’ learning but also equips our students to succeed in contests, hackathons and setting them apart in the competitive job market. ACADEMIC COUNCIL Academic Council is a very important and integral part of the growth of the institution. The council’s constant support and inputs are valuable to us and helps us in our mission to offer the best academic courses to our students. FACULTY DEVELOPMENT At Sri Eshwar, faculty empowerment is not just a goal but a continuous journey. To ensure our teachers are at the forefront of technological and pedagogical advancements, FDPs are meticulously designed to equip our faculty members with best-in-class teaching skills and cutting-edge knowledge. Throughout the year, we conduct a series of FDPs, each crafted to bring about a positive transformation in our faculty members. The selection of FDP topics is strategically aligned with the semester-wise curriculum to ensure relevance and impact. We pride ourselves on bringing in resource persons from nationally reputed institutions and leading industries.Our faculty members also regularly participate in weekly pedagogy sessions to enhance their teaching strategies. TEACHING & LEARNING At Sri Eshwar, we quickly implement and adapt to new and modern teaching and learning methodologies. Our classrooms are equipped with wi-fi and smart interactive boards to bring a wide variety of learning possibilities to students. All students of the class can plug in their laptops to dedicated power outlets, to enable a truly hands-on learning experience. Our faculty are trained to use various software and simulation tools, enabling interactive learning experiences. We leverage Google Classroom and Moodle LMS for implementing hybrid and flipped classroom models, ensuring seamless online course content design and assessment. By prioritizing hands-on learning, critical thinking, and continuous professional development, we create an enriching academic environment that inspires excellence and innovation. INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 COMPUTER SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING 
(ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE & MACHINE LEARNING) 0 LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 0 + RECRUITERS 0 + PUBLICATIONS 0 + PATENTS 44LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 10+ PUBLICATIONS 10+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE Shape the future with intelligent machines. Fuse your CS foundation with AI & ML. Design, build, and deploy game-changing systems in CSE-AI & ML. Dive deep into Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Generative AI and Reinforcement learning – the AI & ML algorithms that unlock the secrets hidden within data. AI & ML are pushing the boundaries of intelligence. Young engineers with a data interest can join the mission to shape tomorrow’s intelligent systems. LEARNING SCOPE Students will understand how to gain insights through intellectual curiosity by learning diverse technologies, including the OOPS Concept, 
Data Structures, DBMS, Operating Systems, Networks, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, 
and Generative AI. CAREER PROGRESSION AI and ML revolution is sweeping across industries, igniting a surge of thrilling career prospects for students. Imagine leveraging your skills in healthcare, finance, astronomy, business, social media, and the internet of things—all while wielding the power of AI and ML! From data scientists deciphering hidden patterns to software developers building the future, these exciting roles will put you at the forefront of innovation. VISION To pioneer Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning education through Innovation & Experienced Learning, Developing Professionals who excel in Intelligence Systems and Society. MISSION Evolve curriculum and delivery approaches to provide broad exposure to learners to gain adequate knowledge in their field of study. Provide opportunities for faculty members to enhance their domain knowledge and skills required for the programs offered. Establish connections with local, national and global experts to share, utilize and exchange domain expertise. Conduct Outreach activities for the society that involve the use of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning solutions to address with societal issues. Create and provide a conducive ecosystem and facilities for offering education related to Artificial Intelligence. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will have successful careers in AI and ML-related fields, including positions such as Data Scientists, Machine Learning Engineers, AI Researchers and Consultants. PEO2: Graduates will recognize the dynamic nature of AI and ML technologies and engage in continuous learning to stay abreast of the latest advancements, tools, and techniques in the field. PEO3: Graduates will have the knowledge and skills to identify opportunities for applying AI and ML in various domains, potentially founding startups, or contributing to the growth and competitiveness of existing organizations. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Apply Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning techniques to design systems that support informed decision-making through data analysis and pattern recognition. PSO2: Integrate Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing with modern tools to develop effective solutions for complex data interpretation tasks. Dr.A.Babu Karuppiah B.E., M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 12.06.2024 Areas of Specialization Wireless Sensor Networks Dr.A.Babu Karuppiah is passionate about leveraging technology to create prototypes that address pressing societal issues. He has guided several students to participate in and received numerous accolades in various project competitions. Notably, one of the project received first prize from the District Collector of Madurai at the district-level project competition "Skill Summit 2017" for the project on "Block Detection in Sewage System and Removal Using Snake Technique". He was also a finalist in the prestigious 8th India Innovation Initiative – i3 National Fair 2016 and won the first prize at the district level for the "Biometric Assisted e-Health Record for Pregnant Women and Chronic Patients" project in 2015. He had acted as Principal Investigator for several projects, titled “Biometric Assisted e -Health Record for Pregnant Women and Chronic Patients linking Primary Health Centres (PHCs) and Government Hospitals using Cloud Computing” funded by MSME for a worth of Rs.10 lakhs (July 2023), project titled “Lifesaving IoT-based Hazardous Gas Monitoring and Drainage Block Detection & Removal System to Prevent Manual Scavenging” funded by MSME for a worth of Rs.15 lakhs (June 2022), a DST-funded project titled “Lifesaving IoT- based Hazardous Gas Monitoring and Drainage Block Detection & Removal System to Prevent Manual Scavenging” worth Rs.10 lakhs (February 2019). He has received a grant of Rs.15.42 lakhs for a project titled “Decentralized Grid Computing for Intrusion Detection in Wireless Sensor Networks for Military Personnel” from DRDO, New Delhi (February 2014) and anther grant of Rs.5.26 lakhs to organize an AICTE-sponsored two-week FDP on “Deep Learning and IoT” (November 2019). He hold 2 patents under his credit. He has won second prize in the “MY” program conducted by Velammal College of Engineering and Technology, Madurai (April 2016 and first prize in the district-level project competition, “The Honourable Chief Minister's Award for Excellence in eGovernance” for the project titled “Biometric Assisted e – Health Record for Pregnant Women and Chronic Patients linking Primary Health Centres (PHCs) and Government Hospitals using Cloud Computing” (November 2015). He has actively participated in contests conducted by Toastmasters International Club. He is also a finalist in the Best Techno Faculty category conducted by ICTACT, Tamil Nadu during the ICTACT Bridge 2014 conference (February 2014). Dr.V.Karunakaran M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 09.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing and Generative AI Dr. V. Karunakaran has 17+ years of teaching experience. He has published more than 30 research papers in International Journals and International Conferences and his research interests include Deep Learning, Optimization Techniques and Machine Learning. He has delivered over 10 talks on technical topics and conducted hands-on workshops in the domain of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Hadoop and Spark. He is a reviewer for reputed journals and has guided more than 20 projects in the domain of Image processing, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing and Machine learning. Dr.S.Brindha Senthil Kumar M.Tech., Ph.D D.O.J : 09.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Areas of Specialization: Machine Learning and Deep Learning Dr. Brindha Senthil Kumar had completed her Ph.D. in Computer Engineering from Mizoram University (Central University), specialization in machine learning for health care (especially in cancer genomics). Dr. Brindha Senthil Kumar holds more than 10 years of experience both in industry and academics (India and Overseas). She has been as judge in Hackathon events, resource person for workshops cum hands-on and had delivered talk in national events. She has published paper in Scopus and SCI journals. She is interested to work on human diseases and their causes using Machine learning and Deep learning models. Dr.N.Varatharajan M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 11.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Network Security, WSN With over 14 years of experience in Teaching and Mentoring students in the academic field, I possess a solid foundation in technical education, enriched by an active portfolio of research and innovation. My primary research interests lie in Network Security and Wireless Sensor Networks. My academic accomplishments include 3 published patents, several Scopus-indexed research articles, a Scopus-indexed book chapter, a published book, and around 15 conference presentations. To stay abreast of emerging technologies, I have pursued numerous certifications through reputed platforms like NPTEL, in domains such as Cloud Computing, Design Thinking, Internet of Things, Design and Analysis of Algorithms, and Database Management Systems. Dr.K.Kathiresan M.Tech., Ph.D D.O.J :  02.05.2024 Areas of Specialization Data Analytics, Deep Learning, Computer Vision Mr. Kathiresan K has 15+ years of teaching experience. His current research is based on Image Processing, Regression Testing, Deep Learning, Computer Vision and Data Analytics. He love to learn and teach data analysis and prediction techniques of Data Science. He has published more than 15 research papers in reputed journals and conferences with 3 patents published. He is also a CISCO Certified Academic Instructor in ITN and RSE level and acted as a resource person to the various institutions for workshops and FDP. Ms.P.Preethi M.E.,(Ph.D) D.O.J : 12.06.2024 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Deep Learning Ms.P.Preethi has an M.E. degree with over 11 years of teaching experience and is currently pursuing her research degree at Anna University. She has published 1 SCI Paper,5 Scopus Indexed Conference Papers and Published 3 Patents. She is Certified by the IUCEE Engineering Education Program and by AWS (Data Engineer). Guided around 10 projects in various Domains like Machine Learning, Network security and Cloud computing. Trained in various workshops organized by IIT Bombay and IIT Kharagpur. She is also certified with a Band score of 8/9 in the IELTS examination 2022. Ms.S.Sindhuja M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 03.07.2024 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Deep Learning Ms.S.Sindhuja is currently pursuing her Ph.D degree in the domain of Deep Learning. She has 10+ years and 8 months of experience in teaching. She has published 2 books, 9 Papers and published a patent too. Ms.T.Kalaivani M.E.,(Ph.D) D.O.J :  26.07.2024 Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence,Machine Learning,Image Processing Ms. Kalaivani T is currently working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She holds a B.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Nandha Engineering College, Anna University, Erode, and an M.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering with a specialization in Software Engineering from Anna University Regional Campus, Coimbatore. She is currently pursuing her research in Coral Reef Resilience at Anna University. With over 8 years of academic experience and 3 years of industry experience as a Technical Trainer and Developer, She is a dedicated educator and passionate technologist. She has imparted company-specific technical training to students, equipping them with specialized skills in Android Development, Java, and Front-End Design through customized training modules. She has also conducted several hands-on workshops in Android application development, fostering practical learning environments. As part of her technical contributions, she has developed and tested four Android applications, with feature enhancements implemented in three of them. She has published 8 research papers and holds 4 patents, including 1 granted patent. She is also the author of a book titled “Mastering Machine Learning”. Her areas of expertise include Object-Oriented Programming using Java, algorithmic problem solving with C and Python, Data Science, and Web Technologies. She is a Wipro Certified Faculty and has been recognized as a mentor for Project-Based Learning (PBL) in .NET Full Stack Development by Wipro Technologies, Hyderabad.She is a lifetime member of IETE (Indian Society for Technical Education) and actively contributes to academic and technical excellence through mentoring and knowledge-sharing. Ms.Charanya P M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 22.08.2024 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning , Networking,Artificial Intelligence Ms.Charanya P has 5 years of Teaching Experience.Currently pursuing her research degree in Anna University. She has Published 1 Patent. Ms.G.Sharmila M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 02.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Java Programming, Data Analytics With over four years of experience in teaching and mentoring students in the academic field, I bring a strong foundation in technical education, underpinned by an active portfolio of research and innovation. My core research interests include Cloud Computing and Quantum Computing, areas in which I continue to expand my knowledge and contribute through scholarly work. I have published three patents and a Scopus-indexed conference paper, reflecting my commitment to research excellence. To stay updated with emerging technologies, I have completed several certifications from reputed platforms such as NPTEL, covering domains like Cloud Computing, Big Data Analytics, Internet of Things (IoT), Database Management Systems, Java Programming, and Foundations of Cloud, Edge, IoT, and Machine Learning. In addition, I have gained practical industry exposure through training programs at Virtusa (Selenium Testing) and NTT Data (Data Science), further enriching my technical and pedagogical approach. Ms.G.Sandhya B.E., M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 02.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Cloud Computing, Internet of Things Ms. G. Sandhya holds a Master of Engineering (M.E.) degree and brings over 9 years of teaching experience to her academic and professional endeavors. She was a University Rank Holder in her postgraduate program, reflecting her strong academic foundation. She is currently pursuing her Ph.D. in Cloud Computing at Anna University, focusing on advancing research in this critical area of modern technology. Her scholarly contributions include the publication of 1 SCI-indexed journal paper, 2 Scopus-indexed journal papers, and 17 Scopus-indexed conference papers. Additionally, she published 3 patents, reflecting her commitment to innovation and applied research. She was also honoured as the Best Faculty of the academic year 2022 – 2023 by Sri Krishna College of Technology in recognition of her dedication and excellence in teaching. She has successfully guided around 20 student projects across cutting-edge domains such as the Internet of Things (IoT), Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. Her exceptional mentorship has been evident through active participation and leadership in prestigious national events including the Smart India Hackathon, MSME Hackathon, and Hack2Future, where she has consistently encouraged and shaped the next generation of tech innovators. Ms. A. Suganya M.E.,(Ph.D). Areas of Specialization Area of Specialization: IoT, WSN, ML With over 7 years of dedicated experience in teaching and mentoring students in Academics, I bring a strong academic background complemented by a robust portfolio of research and innovation. I am currently pursuing my Ph.D. with a focus on the Internet of Things (IoT). My academic journey is marked by 7 patents published, several Scopus-indexed research publications, 2 Scopus-indexed book chapters, a published book, and around 20 conference presentations. I also have a UGC-CARE-listed journal publication to my credit. I actively enhance my knowledge through certifications from global platforms such as Coursera and NPTEL, with credentials in areas including cloud computing, computer architecture, operating systems and design thinking. In addition to academic contributions, I have been instrumental in promoting innovation and technical communities. Notably, I inaugurated and deployed the Google Developer Student Club (GDSC), fostering a culture of tech collaboration and peer learning among students. Mr.R.Vikkram M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J :  05.06.2025 Areas of Specialization FULL Stack Java , Python , Data Analytics, MERN Stack I am Vikkram R, an Assistant Professor with over 11 years of academic experience in the field of Information Technology and Computer Science. Currently pursuing a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering, I have a strong foundation in Full Stack Development (Java, MERN Stack), Software Testing (Selenium), and Data Science. I have delivered hands-on technical training to students, enabling them to gain industry-relevant skills and practical exposure. I am a Wipro Certified Faculty and have enhanced my expertise through advanced training programs conducted by Virtusa and NTT Data in Software Testing and Data Science, respectively. My research interests include IoT, Deep Learning, Cloud Computing, and AI, with multiple contributions in the form of conference papers, journal publications, patents, and a book chapter. I am committed to fostering an environment that bridges theoretical learning with real-world applications. Mrs.A.Praveena M.E., M.B.A., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 11.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Networks Security, Computer Networks A.PRAVEENA  is currently working as an Assistant  Professor  in  Department of Computer  Science  and  Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore,  Tamil Nadu. She obtained his UG degree in B.E Computer Science and Engineering from Sona College of Technology, Salem in 2003, M.E Degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Sona College of Technology, Salem in 2005, M.B.A from Madras University, Pursing Ph.D (Submitted Thesis) in the field of Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University Chennai.  I have completed and passed Tamil Nadu State Eligibility Test (TNSET– 2016) – conducted by Mother Terasa Women's University in the year 2016 in Computer Science. She has acted as Jury Member in Smart India Hackathon, 2022. Her research area is focused on Wireless Networks and Artificial Intelligence. Currently, she has 3 International Patents (Granted), 5 Indian patents, 2 Australian Patents and more than 36 research papers indexed in SCOPUS, Web of Science, ACM, IEEE & UGC Care Approved Journals and 16 book chapters. She has received best paper awards in national and International Conferences. She has received “Padma Jyothi Gold Medal Award” for Excellence in respective field on the occasion of 27 th National Seminar on “Individual Achievements & National Development” on 26th January 2018, at Bangalore. She has worked in INFOSYS SABBATICAL PROJECT WORK as part of Campus Connect Programme while working at Sri Ramakrishna Engineering College. The project involves designing of an interface communication card between ECU (Electronic Control Unit) and RTS (Real Time Simulator). She is life member in the professional societies like ISTE, IAENG, MIR Labs etc. She has authored the books titled “Introduction to Artificial Intelligence”, “R Programming Fundamentals” and “Fundamentals of Data Science”. She has Received Grant of Rs 7500/-from Tamilnadu State Council for Science and Technology (TNSCST) for Student Project Scheme for the project titled “Smart- Site: Real Time Construction Project Management with IoT and AI(Project Code : CSE007) during the Academic Year 2023-2024. She has completed 11 NPTEL Courses, 10 Professional Development Programmes conducted by NITTTR and 12 ATAL FDP Programmes. She has acted as Advisory Committee member in various International Conferences and as reviewer in reputed journals. She has acted as Editor of the Book titled “Contemporary Research in Engineering and Management – CREM 2021”, Manglam Publications Delhi-110053 (India), 202, Chief Editor of the Book titled “ Recent Innovations in Engineering and Management”, Published by Tech Press, First Edition : 2023, ISBN : 978-93-91697-14-3 and Book titled “Multidisciplinary Research in Arts, Science & Commerce (Volume – 1)”, Published by : The Hill Publication, July 2024, ISBN No : 978-81- 971947-9-5. Mr.M.Gowrisanker M.Tech., (Ph.D) D.O.J  : 01.07.2025 Areas of Specialization Image processing ,
Deep Learning Mr. M. Gowrisanker is an accomplished educator and technology enthusiast with over 9 years of experience in academia and 2 years in the software industry. His core areas of expertise include Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Deep Learning, and Image Processing. With a passion for bridging the gap between theory and real-world application, he is known for designing engaging and outcome-based learning environments that prepare students for both research and industry. He holds multiple industry-recognized certifications from reputed platforms including Infosys Springboard, Cisco Networking Academy, Coursera, and NITTTR Chennai, reflecting his strong commitment to continuous learning and academic excellence. His dedication to shaping future-ready professionals is evident through his consistent contributions to curriculum innovation, skill development initiatives, and student-centered learning environments. He has contributed to the field of computer science through the publication of four conference papers, showcasing his commitment to advancing research in emerging technologies. His efforts in promoting student-led innovation were recognized through a research grant from the Tamil Nadu State Council for Science and Technology (TNSCST), awarded in support of academic project development. Mr.G.Aravindraj B.E D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Cloud Computing, DevOps, Networking Aravindraj G is an experienced Cloud & DevOps professional with over 12 years of industry experience and 5+ years as a technical trainer. His areas of expertise include Cloud Computing, DevOps, Networking, and Windows & Linux Server Administration, with strong hands-on experience in designing, implementing, and managing enterprise IT infrastructure. He has trained 3,000+ students in industry-relevant technologies such as AWS, DevOps, Networking, and Server Administration, following a structured, practical-oriented training approach. His focus on real-time labs, industry-aligned curriculum, and mentoring has enabled many learners to successfully achieve AWS Global Certifications and confidently address real-world IT challenges. Aravindraj G is passionate about simplifying complex technologies and is dedicated to empowering aspiring IT professionals with the technical skills, practical exposure, and confidence required to succeed in today’s evolving technology landscape. PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 30+ PUBLICATIONS 10+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE The biggest ever technological advancement this century has witnessed is making machines to think and act like human, engaging the science of Artificial Intelligence, powered by Data.

AI driven by Data will be dominant in every aspect of human life with the scope for its application becoming limitless. Autonomous Vehicles, Virtual Assistants (Alexa, Siri), Domestic Assistants (maid robots), are some of the existing examples, while many are being developed every single day.

The field of AI & DS is emerging as the most promising one for young engineers who have a flair for data and visualization. LEARNING SCOPE Students studying this programme will be able to design, develop and apply AI and DS based solutions to real world business challenges.
The students will know to develop out insights with intellectual curiosity, by learning various technologies including Deep learning, Computer Vision, Data Science, Predictive Analytics, AR/VR, Natural Language Processing and Robotics, Software Technologies, OOPs and Database Management Systems. CAREER PROGRESSION With rapidly increasing focus on AI & DS by the industry, the students have abundant scope for employment in various industries including Healthcare, Travel & Transportation, Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) as Data Scientist, Data Analyst, Machine Learning Architect, Software Developers. VISION To build a conducive academic and research environment in the stream of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science for enabling global education, research and entrepreneurship. MISSION Update and enrich the curriculum by integrating global trends and   technological advancements to ensure the academic excellence. Promote a research-driven environment by providing access to state-of-the-art infrastructure with emerging technologies. Empower the faculty through continuous upskilling, international collaborations, and active research engagement to provide globally competent education. Encourage student-centric, industry-aligned learning that nurtures innovation and entrepreneurship activities for solving real-world and societal challenges. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Build a progressive professional career in industry, or pursue higher education, or succeed as an entrepreneur. PEO2: Excel in cutting-edge technologies of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science to address real world challenges. PEO3: Exhibit professional ethics, involvement in team work in their profession and contributing to the advancement of society. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Apply programming, problem-solving, and hardware integration skills with AI and data science to design intelligent, secure and efficient systems. PSO2: Develop an AI-driven application by exploring optimized coding competencies using predictive modeling and data analytics technologies. M is a highly accomplished academician and researcher with over 23 years of teaching experience and 17 years of research expertise. He holds a B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Madras University, an M.E. in Communication Systems from Anna University, and a Ph.D. from VIT University. Currently, he serves as Professor and Dean IQAC at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore, Tamilnadu, India. Dr. Lakshmanan is a NAAC Assessor in the peer team visit. He is a recognized expert in NBA, NAAC & ABET Accreditation, and NIRF & QS Ranking. He has mentored numerous professional institutions and universities across the nation to achieve the highest grades and ranks in accreditation and rankings respectively. With a Senior Member status in IEEE and UACEE, and fellow in IETE and IEI, he also holds Life Memberships in ISTE, ACM, IACSIT, and IAENG. Dr. Lakshmanan is an Executive Committee Member of IETE Noida Section since July 2022. His extensive research contributions include over 100 papers published in reputed SCI/SCIE/ESCI and Scopus indexed journals, along with 4 patents published in India and 2 patents granted in Australia. He is a sought-after speaker, having delivered more than 50 keynote talks and invited lectures in various FDPs, workshops, and seminars. Actively involved as a reviewer for SCI/SCIE and Scopus indexed journals, he has reviewed more than 200 papers. Dr. Lakshmanan has received multiple prestigious awards, including the Best Administrator Award and Best Researcher Award for 2024 awarded by The Innovative and Advanced Multidisciplinary Research Foundation (IAMRF) in collaboration with the Prerna Education Research Society, Award of Excellence in Research for 2022-23 in National Faculty Award, Researcher of the Year Award (Engineering, Male) for 2021 in 3rd International Business & Academic Excellence Awards, Best Researcher Award for 2021 in International Excellence Award, and the Award of Emerging Leader for 2018 in Higher Education Leadership Meet – 2018 (HELA 2018). Additionally, he has been honored with the Active Researcher award five times from VIT University. His current research interests span Wireless Communication and Networks, Security Algorithms, Device to Device Communications, Digital Communication, Information Theory and Coding, Signal and Image Processing, Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning, and Machine Learning. PUBLICATIONS 45+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE Computer Science is a dynamic and fast growing area that has become an integral part of our daily lives. In the new age world, almost everything revolves around information technology and software.While the automation we have seen in the past is far and wide, the automation we are going to witness in the future is going to be still more exciting. LEARNING SCOPE The scope of learning for you in our CSE program will include Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Agile Software Development, Cybersecurity, AR/VR , OOPS Concepts, Computer Architecture, Computer Networks, Database Management System, Software technologies including C, Python for Data Science and Java Full Stack.The department having highly experience and capable faculty who are trained by the Industry, state of the art infrastructure and Industry Powered Nextgen Laboratories in AI-ML, Cloud Technologies,Data Science and Design Thinking. CAREER PROGRESSION The scope of career progression, studying CSE, is abundant and unlimited with leading multinational IT companies recruiting fresh CSE graduates in large numbers, or becoming an entrepreneur, developing your own software products,or pursuing higher studies. The students are prepared to start their career as Software Developers, Data Scientist, System Analyst and Architect ,Network Engineers, Database Administrator , Web developers, AI Engineers etc., VISION To groom students into globally competent software professionals and meet the ever changing requirements of the industry. MISSION Creating a quality academic environment with relevant IT infrastructure and empowering faculty and students with emerging technologies. Motivating staff and students to actively involve in lifelong learning and fostering research. Inculcating leadership and entrepreneurship skills in students. Generating opportunities for students to evolve as competent software professionals with societal consciousness. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will build successful careers in computing and information technology domains by applying strong foundations in engineering principles, computer science fundamentals, and professional best practices. PEO2: Graduates will pursue higher education, research, and entrepreneurial endeavours by demonstrating self-directed and life-long learning capabilities to continuously adapt to emerging technologies, industry trends, and societal needs. PEO3: Graduates will conceive, design and implement innovative, and ethically responsible computing solutions to address real-world challenges in industry and society. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. She has 10 years of experience, of which she served in Wipro Technologies for 6 years. Her research areas include Cognitive Radio Networks, Wireless Sensors, Machine Learning, and Network Security. Her area of interest includes Database Management Systems, Object Oriented Programming using C++, and Cryptography. She has published 8 papers in IEEE Conferences. She is passionate about innovation with 6 published patents and one applied for the grant. She has received a Distinguished Honor award from Gyan Matrix Technologies, Bangalore.  She acted as a mentor for the different winning teams of the Internal Project Expo Students group. She is a Life member of the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE).  She has received the Wipro Certified Faculty award and was recognized as a mentor for Project Based Learning (PBL) in Java Full Stack from Wipro Technologies, Bangalore. Ms.B.Gomathi M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 22.08.2019 Areas of Specialization Cognitive Radio Network,Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Ms.B.Gomathi has received her Bachelor’s Degree and Master’s Degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University. She is currently pursuing her PhD in Information and Communication Engineering under Anna University, Chennai. She has 5years of Experience in Engineering education and her research areas include Cognitive Radio Networks, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Deep Learning. She has published 5 papers in reputed IEEE conferences and Journal. She has published 4 patents and she has authored 3 books. She is a Lifetime Member of ISTE. In her career span, she is trained by industry and possesses an expertise in Saleforce CRM. Mr.B.Saravanan M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J :  03.06.2020 Areas of Specialization software Engineering, Full stack development, Advanced Java Programming Mr. B. Saravanan is an Assistant Professor in the Computer Science and Engineering department at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering in Coimbatore. With 12 years of experience in engineering education, he has established himself as an expert in his field. Mr. Saravanan holds a Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology and a Master’s degree in Software Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. He is currently pursuing his PhD in Information and Communication Engineering at Anna University. His research focuses on Image Processing and Blockchain technology, and he has published 6 research papers in reputable journals and Scopus. Additionally, he has filed four patents with the Intellectual Property Rights office in India. He’s also an active member of professional societies ISTE, IAENG, and IGEN. He is trained by Aspire Systems and contributes to the institution’s Centre of Excellence on Full Stack Development. Ms.J.Keerthika M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 04.06.2020 Areas of Specialization Cognitive Radio Network,Wireless Sensor Network,Database Management System Ms.J.Keerthika serves as an Assistant Professor in CSE at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She has 11 years of experience in engineering education. She has completed her B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.E.  in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. She is currently pursuing Ph.D. in Information and Communication at Anna University, Chennai. Her research areas include Cognitive Radio Networks, Mobile Communications, Networking Protocols and Machine Learning She has published 8 research papers in reputed International Journals and IEEE conferences and published 4 patents. She is a member of POSH Cell, Women Welfare Committee and Discipline Committee. She has lifetime membership in professional societies like ISTE and IAENG. Ms.B.Suchithra M.E.,M.B.A., (Ph.D) D.O.J :  26.07.2021 Areas of Specialization Data Structures and Algorithms, OOPS  Networks and Cyber Security Ms Suchithra is working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She has completed her B.Tech and M.E in Computer Science Engineering domain at Anna University, Chennai. She has obtained her MBA in Human Resources Management from Bharathiyar University. She is a Gold Medalist in both her UG & PG programs. She is currently pursuing her research in Space Data Analytics at Anna University. She has a teaching experience of 11 years, a technology enthusiast and a researcher, who has published 13 papers and 10 patents to her credit, out of which 2 patents have been granted. She has authored two books in Artificial Intelligence & Cyber Security. Her areas of specializations are Data Structures and Algorithms, Object Oriented Programming with Java, Networks and Cyber Security. She is a Wipro Certified Faculty and is recognized as the mentor for Project Based Learning (PBL) in Java Full Stack from Wipro Technologies, Bangalore. She is an Intel Certified Instructor for Intel Rendering Toolkit, for Machine Learning, for oneAPI C SYCL Essentials and for CUDA to C SYCL. She is a Saptang Labs trained Cyber Security Faculty. She is a Cybercrime Intervention Officer and a Cybercrime Incident Responder. She has received funding of $500 for the establishment of WiCyS Student Chapter and is a faculty mentor of WiCyS – SECE Student Chapter. She has served as a resource person & a keynote speaker at various events. She is the reviewer of “International Conference on Electrical, Computer, Communications and Mechatronics Engineering (ICECCME)”. She is a lifetime member of ISTE. She remains as a Director Board Member in many student startups.  She is the SPOC for British Petroleum Mentoring. Mr.A.Mohanraj M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 02.08.2021 Areas of Specialization DATA STRUCTURES,ALGORITHMS DESIGN TECHNIQUES,
AUTOMATA THEORY Mr. A. MOHANRAJ, is working as Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore. He has 11 years of experience in Engineering Education. He completed his Bachelor’s degree and Master’s Degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. He is pursuing Ph.D in Information and Communication Engineering in Anna University Chennai. He has research interests in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. He is a life member of the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE). He has published 10 Scopus Indexed papers, 3 Book Chapters and 4 papers in international journals He has published 5 patents. He is also the Department Placement Coordinator and NBA Coordinator. Ms.D.Mohanapriya M.E. D.O.J :  21.02.2022 Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence,UI/UX Design Ms. D. Mohana Priya, serves as an Assistant Professor in CSE. She has completed her BE in CSE and M.E in CSE from Anna University, Chennai. She has 3 years of experience in Engineering Education. Her areas of specialization include Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and UI/UX Design. She has published 4 papers in IEEE Conferences and also has published 5 patents. She is a Wipro Certified Faculty in Java Technology and a Lifetime Member of ISTE. She is the Placement Internship coordinator in the department. She has collaborated with industry, mentored students and developed UI/UX projects. Mr.V.Lakshmanan M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 01.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Data Structure and algorithms, Problem solving in C, Object Oriented Programming. Mr. V. Lakshmanan, Assistant Professor / CSE, Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore, He has 19 years of experience, of which 10 years in Industry. During his tenure in industry, he worked on technologies such as Java, SQL, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and 9 years in engineering education. He has received his B.E. from the Government College of Technology, Coimbatore, and his M.E. (CSE) from Anna University, Chennai. He is currently pursuing a Ph.D. in information and communication at Anna University, Chennai. His research areas include Machine Learning, Deep Learning and Image processing. He has authored 3 research papers in reputed international journals and IEEE conferences and has also published 1 patent. He had a Lifetime Member of ISTE. He is a passionate teacher who is committed to teaching students the foundations of computer science. Ms.K.Agalya M.Tech.,(Ph.D) D.O.J :  04.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Wireless Sensor Networks,Image Processing,
 Web Application & Development Ms.K.Agalya  serves as an Assistant Professor in CSE at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She has 12 years of experience in Education.She has received her B.E from Anna University, Chennai and Master of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering from Prist University  and pursuing PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University ,Chennai. Her research areas include Quantum Computing,Wireless sensor Networks & Machine Learning.She has authored 6 research papers in reputed International Journals and IEEE conferences.She has authored 1 book chapter with reputed publishers. She has attended 3 international conference in reputed colleges.She has published 4 patents.. She has a life time member of ISTE.She also serves as the department coordinator for ERP and Infrastructure. Mr.M.Karthick Raja M.Tech.,(Ph.D) D.O.J :  18.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Data Structures,Java Programming, Compiler Design Mr M. Karthick Raja is currently serving as Assistant Professor in the department of CSE at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. He received his Master of Engineering in Computer Science & Engineering, and his Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science & Engineering from Anna University,Chennai. He has six years of teaching experience and one year of industry experience. He is a member of the ISTE and IAENG professional societies. He has published four patents and eight research articles, with five citations. He is also Wipro Certified Dot Net Faculty.He is the faculty advisor of “Sri Eshwar DevHub” and the faculty mentor of the Centre of Excellence for UI/UX Design at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. Ms.E.Saranya M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 01.08.2022 Areas of Specialization Cognitive Radio Networks Edge Computing Artificial Inteligence Ms. E.Saranya serves as an Assistant Professor in Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She has 8 years of experience in Engineering Education. She has received her Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Computer Science and Engineering at Anna University, Chennai. She is pursuing her Ph.D in Information and Communication Engineering at Anna University. Her research areas include Cognitive Radio Networks, Edge Computing and Data Science. She has published more than 10 research papers in reputed Journals. She is the Department Consultancy coordinator. She is a life-time member of ISTE. Ms.A.Suganyamahalakshmi M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 01.08.2022 Areas of Specialization Deep Learning,
Machine Learning
,AI & ML Ms A. Suganyamahalakshmi serves as an Assistant professor in CSE, at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore. She holds a B.Tech degree in Information Technology, a Master of Engineering degree in Computer Science and Engineering and she is currently pursuing her Ph.D in Information and Communication Engineering at Anna University, Chennai. Her areas of research interests include Deep Learning and Machine Learning. She has 4 years of experience in teaching.  She is a University rank holder in her Bachelor’s degree. She has authored 3 research articles in reputed conferences and also published 1 Indian Patent. She is a Department Time-table coordinator. She is a Lifetime member of IAENG. Ms.M.Abinaya M.E. D.O.J :  01.08.2022 Areas of Specialization AIML, Software  Engineering, Networking, Edge AI Ms. M. Abinaya is working as an Assistant Professor in Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She has completed her UG and PG degree in Computer Science stream at Anna University, Chennai. She has 2 years of experience in teaching. Her research areas include AIML, Big Data, Software Engineering and Edge AI. She has published 6 research papers and 4 patents. She has received “Star Performer Award” for the outstanding performance and dedication in completing the Virtusa Orientation for the Faculty (VTOF) under Informatica by Virtusa Technologies. She is a Lifetime member of ISTE. Mr.P.Arun Prakash M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 07.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Neworking, Cloud Computing, Network Seciruty Mr. P. Arun Prakash works as an Assistant Professor (Sl.G) in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. He has 11 years of experience in Engineering Education. He is pursuing his Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering at Anna University, Chennai. He holds a Master’s and Bachelor’s in Computer Science and Engineering from Thiagarajar College of Engineering, Madurai. In addition to his teaching responsibilities, He holds several roles in the department, including Exam Cell Coordinator, SESSWA Coordinator, COE- Cloud Computing Coordinator and Programming Event Coordinator. He has authored three research papers in reputed journals and patented 2 of his ideas. He is a member of various professional societies like ISTE, IAENG, and IGEN. He has completed CCNA Enterprise Networking, Security and Automation course. Ms.N.Priyanka M.E D.O.J : 02.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Internet of Things She is currently working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She holds a Master of Engineering (2023–2025) from Sri Eshwar College of Engineering and has prior experience as a Corporate Trainer, where she handled various technologies including Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things (IoT), Text Analytics, Predictive Modeling, and programming languages such as Java, Python, and C. She has published two IEEE papers and has guided students in developing projects across multiple domains. She delivered an FDP for the Tamil Nadu Government’s Naan Mudhalvan initiative in collaboration with Oracle. Additionally, she has been invited as a resource person for various events on emerging trends in technology and innovations at several colleges and holds professional certifications such as Oracle OCI Foundation and IBM Certification. Ms.P.Anusha Devi M.E D.O.J : 11.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Optimization Techniques, Network Security Ms. P. Anusha Devi is currently working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She pursued her M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering from Madras Institute of Technology, Chennai. She has 3 years of experience in Engineering Education. She has published 3 research papers and filed 4 patents. She has also successfully completed certification programs under the Naan Mudhalvan scheme of the Government of Tamil Nadu in UI/UX Design and Big Data Analytics. Her research interests include Machine Learning, Optimization Algorithms, and Network Security. Ms.P.V.Arunasree MTech D.O.J : 12.06.2025 Areas of Specialization COMPUTER SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING Ms. P.V. ARUNASREE serves as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering. She has MTech in Computer Science and Engineering from Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, where she graduated with a Gold Medal. She has published two research papers in reputed Springer publications. Her paper titled “Enhancing the Performance of Proof of Work Consensus Mechanism for Sustainable Blockchain — A Systematic Review” has been published in the Proceedings of Data Analytics and Management (ICDAM 2025), Springer Nature. Another significant contribution is her article “GA-PoW: A Novel Genetic Algorithm–Based Proof of Work Approach for Optimal Nonce Selection in Blockchain Network”, published in the International Journal of Information Technology (IJIT), Springer in November 2025.Her technical interests span Machine Learning, Data Structures, Software Engineering, Full Stack Development, and her primary research domain is Blockchain Networks. She actively works on blockchain consensus mechanisms, network optimization, and intelligent computation approaches for distributed systems. Mr.R.Kirubakaran B.E, M.E D.O.J : 02.07.2025 Areas of Specialization Software Engineering, Learning Analytics Mr. R. Kirubakaran is an accomplished academician with over 11 years of teaching experience in Computer Science and Engineering. He is currently pursuing a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering at Anna University, Chennai. He holds an M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering from Thiagarajar College of Engineering, Madurai. His core areas of interest include Learning Analytics, Software Engineering, and Educational Technology. He has authored over 10 research publications in reputed journals and conferences including IEEE and Springer, and holds certifications from Oracle, Microsoft, Google, NPTEL, Coursera, and Cambridge (BEC). He has successfully led consultancy projects for industries such as ABT Foods Pvt Ltd and Sakthi Group of Industries and has guided student projects in collaboration with Samsung. His contributions include the development of MIS tools, educational dashboards, AI-powered applications, and industrial websites. As an active organizer, he has conducted national-level hackathons and faculty development programs. Recognized by Infosys as a Bronze Partner Faculty and awarded for student development efforts, he is known for his dynamic mentoring, technical facilitation, and commitment to bridging academia and real-world practice. Mr.K.Sabarigirivason B.E, M.E D.O.J : 02.07.2025 Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence Mr. K. Sabarigirivason is working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. He obtained both Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Computer Science and Engineering. He has two years of teaching experience. He has research interests in the field of Artificial Intelligence. He has actively participated in numerous national and international FDPs. He has published and presented research papers at IEEE conferences and other reputed international forums. Mr.R.Karthick M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 23.07.2025 Areas of Specialization Algorithm Design and Optimization, Machine Learning, NLP Mr.R. Karthick is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore. He holds a B.Tech. in Information Technology and an M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University, and is currently pursuing a Ph.D. at Galgotias University. He brings over nine years of academic experience and two years in industry, with expertise in Android development and Java technologies. He has completed NPTEL certifications in Cloud Computing and Python for Data Science and has been trained in Outcome-Based Education (OBE). He has filed five patents under IPR, Govt. of India, and has published six SCOPUS-indexed journal papers and twelve IEEE and ACM international conference papers. He has technical proficiency in Android, iOS, and web application frameworks. He is an active member of ACM, IAENG, IFERP, and ICSES. He has served as an LMS (Moodle) developer and trainer. He also delivered a two-week virtual training program for students on problem-solving and programming using C and Python at the University of Kadiri, Indonesia. Dr. Pethuru Raj Ph.D., SMIEEE D.O.J  : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Generative & Agentic AI, AI Model Optimization, Cloud of Things (CoT), Cloud-native & Edge Computing, Platform Engineering, 6G Communication, Blockchain Technologies, Quantum-safe Cryptography Dr. Pethuru Raj serves as the Principal AI Architect at Infocion Inc., Bangalore. He has more than 25 years of experience in the IT industry and nine years of research experience. Prior to his current role, he has held senior technical leadership positions including Vice President and Chief Architect (AI Division) at Reliance Jio Platforms Ltd., Bangalore, and key architect roles at IBM Global Cloud Centre of Excellence (CoE), Wipro Consulting Services (WCS), and Robert Bosch Corporate Research (CR). He completed his CSIR-sponsored Ph.D. at Anna University, Chennai, followed by UGC-sponsored Postdoctoral Research in the Department of Computer Science and Automation at the Indian Institute of Science (IISc), Bangalore. He subsequently received two prestigious international research fellowships—JSPS and JST, enabling him to work as a Research Scientist for 3.5 years in two leading Japanese universities. His expertise spans a wide spectrum of emerging technologies, including Generative and Agentic AI, AI Model Compression and Optimization, Cloud of Things (CoT), Cloud-native and Edge Computing Paradigms, Platform Engineering, 6G Communication Techniques, Blockchain, and Quantum-safe Cryptography Algorithms. Dr. Pethuru Raj is a prolific contributor to the technology community. He has authored and edited over 75 books, published more than 60 research papers, and contributed to over 55 book chapters in reputable international publications. His work has significantly influenced modern AI, cloud, and distributed computing practices across industries. Mr.V.Chandran Ph.D., D.O.J :  01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Predictive Modeling, Pricing Analytics, Incentive Optimization, Attribution Modeling, Customer Analytics, Clinical Image-based Diagnostics Mr. Chandran Venkatesan is a Lead Data Scientist with over 9 years of experience in building and delivering AI-driven solutions across the healthcare, pharma, CPG, and retail industries. He specializes in advanced machine learning, deep learning, generative AI, predictive modeling, and end-to-end model development. He has strong expertise in pricing analytics, incentive optimization, attribution modeling, customer behavior insights, and clinical image-based diagnostic systems. Throughout his career, he has led the development of impactful analytical solutions such as pricing recommendation engines, incentive effectiveness measurement models, multi-touch attribution frameworks, and healthcare engagement models. He is proficient in cutting-edge tools and technologies including XGBoost, SHAP, Dataiku, TensorFlow, and various cloud platforms. He holds a M.E degree in VLSI. He has an outstanding research profile, having authored more than 35 peer-reviewed publications and secured 10 patents in the fields of AI and machine learning. His work has received significant academic visibility with 1200+ citations on Google Scholar. Mr.A.Jeeva M.E., D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Front-End Development, UI Engineering, Web Technologies, Responsive Design, Angular & JavaScript Development Jeeva A is an experienced Front-End Developer and UI Engineer with over 10 years of professional experience in designing and developing scalable, responsive, and user-focused web applications. He has previously served as a Technical Team Lead at GDKN Technologies, where he led front-end architecture for enterprise-grade SaaS platforms such as eNotary On Call and DocVoice. His technical expertise spans Angular, React, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, SCSS, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, and modern UI/UX practices. He is proficient in building component-driven architectures, delivering multilingual and cross-platform interfaces, and applying industry-standard coding practices to improve performance, accessibility, and user experience. Earlier in his career at Amphisoft Technologies, Jeeva contributed extensively as a UI Designer, creating responsive LMS interfaces and pixel-perfect web layouts. His strong understanding of design tools such as Figma and Adobe Photoshop, combined with hands-on expertise in front-end engineering, enables him to craft visually appealing and functionally robust user interfaces. He holds an M.E degree. in Computer Science and is passionate about teaching, mentoring, and simplifying technical concepts for learners. His teaching interests include Web Development, Angular Framework, UI/UX Fundamentals, Responsive Design, and Front-End Architecture. Mr.R.Vasanth Kumar Ph.D., D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Digital Signal Processing (DSP),Audio Codec Processing ,Algorithm Development, Porting and Testing of DSP Algorithms, Python-based Tools Development, Automation Framework Development. Mr. R. Vasantha Kumar has been serving as a Staff Engineer at Borqs Technologies Inc., Bangalore, since March 2024. With over 20 years of experience in the Digital Signal Processing domain, he specializes in audio codec processing, algorithm development, porting, testing, Python-based tools development, and automation. He holds a B.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. Throughout his career, he has contributed to multiple organizations across India and has successfully led teams on various projects for global clients. He also received the top prize in a technical symposium for his innovative tool titled Development of Simulink Models Using Python. Beyond his professional pursuits, Mr. Vasantha Kumar is passionate about writing poems and fiction, having published more than 300 eBooks on Amazon Kindle. RECRUITERS 10+ PUBLICATIONS 10+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE Computer Science Engineering with a specialization in Cyber Security addresses the rising demand for secure digital systems amid growing cyber threats. The program blends core computer science with advanced security skills to prepare students for real-world challenges. Graduates are equipped to combat AI-driven attacks, quantum risks, and global cyber warfare, ensuring resilient and secure digital environments. LEARNING SCOPE The Cyber Security curriculum is aligned with global standards, combining core computer science subjects with specialized training in areas like ethical hacking, cryptography, cyber forensics, and secure software development. Students gain hands-on experience in advanced labs, learn tools and techniques from global leaders like EC-Council. The program also builds expertise in programming (C, Python, Java Full Stack, MERN Stack) and covers key compliance frameworks such as GDPR, HIPAA, and ISO 27001. Delivered by industry-trained faculty, it equips students to tackle evolving cyber threats with confidence. CAREER PROGRESSION Graduates of this program are in high demand across MNCs, government agencies, and specialized cyber security firms. Career roles include Cyber Security Analyst, Ethical Hacker, Security Architect, and Cloud Security Engineer, among others. They are also well-suited for roles in defense sectors or for pursuing higher studies. VISION To produce globally competitive cybersecurity professionals capable of addressing evolving cyber threats through innovation, research, and ethical practices. MISSION Establishing a world-class academic environment with cutting-edge cybersecurity infrastructure and industry-driven faculty expertise. Encouraging research and innovation in cybersecurity, fostering lifelong learning among students and faculty. Developing leadership and entrepreneurial skills to drive cybersecurity advancements. Creating opportunities for students to evolve as ethical cybersecurity professionals with a strong societal impact. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: To prepare graduates for careers in cybersecurity, ensuring they can secure digital ecosystems effectively. PEO2: To equip students with the ability to pursue higher studies, research, entrepreneurship, and leadership roles in cybersecurity. PEO3: To enable students to develop innovative solutions for real-world cybersecurity challenges. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Demonstrate expertise in open-source cybersecurity tools and frameworks. PSO2: Develop innovative security solutions by integrating emerging technologies such as AI, blockchain, and quantum cryptography. PSO3: Implement Secure Software Development Lifecycle (SSDLC) principles for robust cybersecurity solutions.
