Dr.S.Yasotha M.E., Ph.D D.O.J :  01.03.2021 Areas of Specialization Wireless Sensor Network,Web Application and Development Dr. S.Yasotha has 14 years of experience in Engineering Education.  She has received her master’s in VLSI Design from Anna University, Coimbatore and PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Government College of Technology, Coimbatore. Her research areas include Wireless Sensor Networks, Computer Networks, Web Application Development. She has published 10 research papers in reputed International Journals and IEEE conferences. She acted as Co-Chair in conferences. She has mentored Students and developed projects for industries. She has a life time membership of ISTE. Dr.S.K.Harikarthik Ph.D D.O.J : 22.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Software Engineering, Software Testing,Computer Networks Dr.S.K.Harikarthik has 17 years of experience in Engineering Education. He has received his Bachelor’s in Information Technology from Kumaraguru College of Technology, Master’s in Information Technology from Anna University and PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. His research area includes Software Engineering and Networks. He published research papers in reputed Journals and Conferences. He had been the Session Chair, and Panellist in several conferences. He guided 30+ Undergraduate and Postgraduate Projects for Anna University and Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University students. He is nominated as Program Advisory Committee member for formulating syllabus for the Computer Engineering department of Nachimuthu Polytechnic College, Pollachi.  He is life time member in ISTE and he acted as Nodal officer for Anna University examinations. Ms.B.Suchithra M.E.,M.B.A., (Ph.D) D.O.J :  26.07.2021 Areas of Specialization Data Structures and Algorithms, OOPS  Networks and Cyber Security Ms Suchithra is working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She has completed her B.Tech and M.E in Computer Science Engineering domain at Anna University, Chennai. She has obtained her MBA in Human Resources Management from Bharathiyar University. She is a Gold Medalist in both her UG & PG programs. She is currently pursuing her research in Space Data Analytics at Anna University. She has a teaching experience of 11 years, a technology enthusiast and a researcher, who has published 13 papers and 10 patents to her credit, out of which 2 patents have been granted. She has authored two books in Artificial Intelligence & Cyber Security. Her areas of specializations are Data Structures and Algorithms, Object Oriented Programming with Java, Networks and Cyber Security. She is a Wipro Certified Faculty and is recognized as the mentor for Project Based Learning (PBL) in Java Full Stack from Wipro Technologies, Bangalore. She is an Intel Certified Instructor for Intel Rendering Toolkit, for Machine Learning, for oneAPI C SYCL Essentials and for CUDA to C SYCL. She is a Saptang Labs trained Cyber Security Faculty. She is a Cybercrime Intervention Officer and a Cybercrime Incident Responder. She has received funding of $500 for the establishment of WiCyS Student Chapter and is a faculty mentor of WiCyS – SECE Student Chapter. She has served as a resource person & a keynote speaker at various events. She is the reviewer of “International Conference on Electrical, Computer, Communications and Mechatronics Engineering (ICECCME)”. She is a lifetime member of ISTE. She remains as a Director Board Member in many student startups.  She is the SPOC for British Petroleum Mentoring. Mr.R.Karthick M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 23.07.2025 Areas of Specialization Algorithm Design and Optimization, Machine Learning, NLP Mr.R. Karthick is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore. He holds a B.Tech. in Information Technology and an M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University, and is currently pursuing a Ph.D. at Galgotias University. He brings over nine years of academic experience and two years in industry, with expertise in Android development and Java technologies. He has completed NPTEL certifications in Cloud Computing and Python for Data Science and has been trained in Outcome-Based Education (OBE). He has filed five patents under IPR, Govt. of India, and has published six SCOPUS-indexed journal papers and twelve IEEE and ACM international conference papers. He has technical proficiency in Android, iOS, and web application frameworks. He is an active member of ACM, IAENG, IFERP, and ICSES. He has served as an LMS (Moodle) developer and trainer. He also delivered a two-week virtual training program for students on problem-solving and programming using C and Python at the University of Kadiri, Indonesia. Ms.B.Gomathi M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 22.08.2019 Areas of Specialization Cognitive Radio Network,Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Ms.B.Gomathi has received her Bachelor’s Degree and Master’s Degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University. She is currently pursuing her PhD in Information and Communication Engineering under Anna University, Chennai. She has 5years of Experience in Engineering education and her research areas include Cognitive Radio Networks, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Deep Learning. She has published 5 papers in reputed IEEE conferences and Journal. She has published 4 patents and she has authored 3 books. She is a Lifetime Member of ISTE. In her career span, she is trained by industry and possesses an expertise in Saleforce CRM. Mr.S.Arul Prakasham M.E D.O.J : 19.09.2019 Areas of Specialization Core Java and cyber security Mr. S. Arul Prakasham has five years of experience in Engineering Education. He obtained his Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Computer Science and Engineering from Sri Krishna College of Engineering and Technology. He also brings three years of professional experience as a Mainframe Developer at Tata Consultancy Services, where he specialized in COBOL programming and the maintenance of high-volume enterprise systems, developing a strong foundation in software reliability and structured problem-solving. Currently, he is enhancing his expertise in emerging technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, and Full Stack Development, with a focus on integrating his experience in robust legacy systems with modern, scalable, and intelligent computing solutions. Ms.K.S.Dharani M.E D.O.J : 23.07.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning Ms. Dharani K S is a dedicated academician and researcher who holds a Master of Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering with a specialized focus on Cybersecurity. With an academic background featuring a CGPA of 8 from Sri Eshwar College of Engineering and a B.E. from Vivekanandha College of Engineering for Women, she combines technical expertise with a passion for classroom teaching and curriculum development. Her research contributions include a published paper in IEEE Xplore regarding Machine Learning-based cardiovascular disease prediction and presentations on vehicular accident monitoring at international conferences. Technically proficient in Python, C, C++, Java, and HTML/CSS, she is also certified in C by the Spoken Tutorial Project, IIT Bombay. Her professional profile is further distinguished by achievements in Java8 and PHP, as well as specialized training in bioinformatics software tools, reflecting a comprehensive commitment to advancing the fields of network security and computer engineering. 120+ RECRUITERS 30+ PUBLICATIONS 15+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE The IT industry has always been looking for software engineers with business knowledge, so that the use case requirements can be understood better to easily design and develop the required software application. This program is a perfect blend that provides the student with exposure to computer software and business systems. LEARNING SCOPE The programme will develop students into professionally competent engineers with good business insights. The students graduating from this program would not only know the core topics of Computer Science but also develop an equal appreciation of humanities and management sciences. The students are also exposed to emerging topics such as Analytics, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Computational Statistics, Business Science, Financial Management, Cloud Computing, Blockchain Technologies, Internet of Things and Design thinking to enable them to become industry ready and employable. CAREER PROGRESSION Since the students from this program possess a combination of technology and business sense, they are the most wanted by the industry. Students from this program are in great demand in IT companies across the globe. Apart from the career oppurtunites of computer science graduates like Software Developers, Data Scientist, System Analyst, the CSBS students have additional advantage of taking up their career as business analyst, Associate consultant ,Project Cost Controller and MIS Administrator. VISION To become a centre of excellence in Software Engineering and Business Systems domains and evolve as an integrated facility in providing academic services that drive research and innovation, leading to industry advancements that serve society. MISSION Develop a curriculum that meets the evolving demands of the industry, integrating inventive teaching approaches for comprehensive education. Provide professional development opportunities for faculty members to enhance their expertise in IT and Management courses. Promote connections with stakeholders to encourage the sharing, utilization, and exchange of managerial expertise. Initiate community-based activities that apply managerial expertise to effectively address societal issues. Build and upgrade facilities to ensure the delivery of modern IT and management education. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will pursue careers in IT and management specializations offered by institutions, utilizing the essential core competencies gained within an assessment-focussed learning environment. PEO2: Graduates will enrol in a postgraduate program focussed on Information Technology and Management Sciences, paying the way for academic and research -oriented career path. PEO3: Graduates will embark on an entrepreneurial path for their careers. Dr.C.Arunkumar BE., M.Tech., Ph.D D.O.J : 09.05.2025 Areas of Specialization Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning Dr. C.Arunkumar has completed his Ph.D. under the faculty of Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, in 2019. Prior to his doctoral studies, he obtained his Master’s degree and Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Vellore Institute of Technology university, Vellore and Bharathiar University Coimbatore respectively. He has 19 years of teaching and research experience. Dr. C.Arunkumar’s research interests encompass Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. He has published 22 papers in scopus-indexed journals and conferences. He was the Vice Chairman – Council of Wardens, Hostels at Amrita University, Coimbatore where he effectively managed 6000+ students residing in 11 hostels in the campus.He has also assisted the Amrita University in conducting a one day tutorial in the area of Network Security in association with Symantec Corporation at IIT Madras during May 2010 as a part of IFIP�Networking 2010. Under his leadership, IEEE chapter of Amrita received an Award from IEEE Madras Section for organizing maximum number of events in 2011. It is worthy to note that only 6 colleges in Tamilnadu have received this award out of 500 colleges and universities in Tamilnadu. I have also proctored and mentored the IEEE Extreme programming contest, a 24 hour online coding contest during October 2011 in which his team received the All India Ranking of 8 among 1500 teams that took part in the contest across the globe at the same time. IEEE Chapter of Amrita School of Engineering, Coimbatore won the Third prize in the IEEE Region 10(Asia Pacific Region) in the website design competition under my leadership. He was also appointed as the Organizing Secretary for the International Conference on Distributed Computing and Networking 2014 which is one of the top 10 conferences in the world in the area of Distributed Computing hosted at Amrita in Jan 2014. He has received an award from Dean Engineering for Outstanding contribution to the university on 10 Jan 2018 during Institution Day at Amrita University, Coimbatore. He has handled critical and sensitive issues of students in hostels as Vice Chairman – Council of Wardens, Hostels and Chief Faculty Warden since 2014. He is instrumental in starting IETE student forums in Engineering Colleges in Western Tamilnadu that spans 12 districts. Dr.P D.Mahendhiran M.Tech, Ph.D D.O.J : 09.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Opinion Mining, Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Quantum Computing Dr. P. D. Mahendhiran has completed his Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, in 2022 and received Supervisor Recognition from Anna University. He holds an M.Tech in Information Technology and a B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering. He has over 14 years of teaching, training, and research experience in the field of Computer Science and Engineering. Dr. Mahendhiran is a Wipro Certified Trainer and has played a key role in industry-academic training programs such as Wipro TalentNext and Tech Mahindra IMS, achieving the highest student conversion ratios at the national level. His research interests include Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Sentiment Analysis, Quantum Computing. He has published 7 research papers in reputed SCI and 13 research papers in Scopus indexed journals, and has filed one patent. He has also served as a peer reviewer for reputed journals. Dr. Mahendhiran has delivered numerous guest lectures, workshops, FDPs, and hands-on training programs across Anna University campuses and other institutions, demonstrating his commitment to academic outreach and faculty development. He is a life-time member in technical societies like ISTE and IETE. Dr. A. Sandana Karuppan B.E.,M.E., PhD. D.O.J :  12.06.2024 Areas of Specialization Distributed and Cloud Computing, Network management and Mining Dr. A. Sandana Karuppan, Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems, possesses over 19.1 years of teaching experience, including one year of industrial experience. He obtained his B.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering with First Class and Distinction from Madurai Kamaraj University, Madurai, and his M.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore. During his postgraduate studies, he developed a novel real-time scheduler for distributed scheduling services based on a genetic algorithmic approach. He has published 16 research papers in reputed international and national journals, as well as in the proceedings of international conferences. His current research interests include distributed algorithms, web services, cloud computing, and multi-cloud optimization for business applications. Dr.K.Cholaraja M.Tech.,PhD D.O.J : 26.07.2021 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Image Processing,Data Analytics Dr. K. Chola Raja is a distinguished academician with a PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. His thesis focused on “CERTAIN INVESTIGATIONS ON THE IDENTIFICATION OF AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER USING DEEP LEARNING MODELS.” With an M.Tech. from Anna University Regional Centre, Coimbatore, and a B.Tech. from PSNA College of Engineering and Technology, Dindugal, Dr. Chola Raja brings a robust educational background. He has published two patents and two research articles in SCI-indexed journals, including notable works on autism prediction using deep learning and hybrid meta-heuristics. Recognized for his exceptional skills, he received the Best Programmer Award in 2023-24. With 13 years of teaching experience, Dr. Chola Raja excels in mentoring students, fostering innovation, and bridging academic knowledge with industry demands. His expertise spans programming languages, data structures, and algorithms. As a lifetime member of ISTE and IEI, Dr. Chola Raja remains committed to advancing engineering education and professional excellence. Dr.C.S.Shylaja B.E.,M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 26.12.2023 Areas of Specialization Image Processing, Neural Networks, Machine Learning. Dr. C. S. Shylaja Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems With 2 Years Experience in Computer Science and Engineering Domain. She Pursued her M.E Computer Science in National Engineering College- Affiliated to Anna University. She Has Published 8 Articles in Internation Journals. Her Current Research work includes Computer Vision, Artificial Intelligence and Neural Networks. Mr.K.P.Siva M.E., MBA., D.O.J :  15.06.2015 Areas of Specialization Capital markets, Digital Finance, Fintech, Structural Engineering Siva K.P. is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems with 9 years of teaching experience, holding an M.E. in Structural Engineering and an MBA in Digital Finance from Shiv Nadar University. He specializes in Fintech and Digital Finance, providing comprehensive analysis and insights into modern financial markets, and excels in mentoring students and integrating academic knowledge with industry demands. With a pioneering patent in Robotic Hand Technology and a robust portfolio of published research papers and book chapters in Fintech, Capital Markets, and related fields, he provides expert insights into cutting-edge trends and innovations. He is actively involved in Unnat Bharat Abhiyan, contributing to rural development and community empowerment, and is a key member of the institution’s Sustainable Development Committee, promoting eco-friendly practices. Ms.E.Saranya B.Tech., M.E., D.O.J : 22.06.2017 Areas of Specialization Data Mining, Optimization algorithms, Image Processing Saranya E, Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems with 10.5 years of teaching experience has obtained B.Tech degree in Information Technology with Distinction and M.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Government College of Technology, Coimbatore with Distinction. She has published 8 papers in renowned journals and in proceedings of international conferences. Her current research work includes Data Mining and Meta-heuristic algorithms. She proudly achieved a highly esteemed NPTEL certification with a distinguished silver medal, placing among the top 2% of total participants in two courses namely Problem Solving using C and Operating System Fundamentals. Ms.G.Priyanka M.E. D.O.J : 24.08.2020 Areas of Specialization Data Analytics,BlockChain,SQL Priyanka G. holds an M.E. in Computer and Communication Engineering from Kongu Engineering College, specializing in Networking and Communication, and a B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering with distinction from Dr. Mahalingam College of Engineering and Technology, with a focus on Computer Applications and Programming. With over 5.10 years of teaching experience, She excels in academia, mentoring students, and fostering a learning environment that encourages innovation and critical thinking. She has authored multiple patents. Her research has been published in renowned journals and conferences, such as IEEE Xplore and the International Journal of Intelligent Networks. She has significant expertise in designing and delivering undergraduate and graduate courses in Java Programming, Data Analytics, JavaScript, and Application Design and Development. Mr.D.Shyam Prakash B.Tech,M.Tech D.O.J :  01.08.2022 Areas of Specialization DBMS,Machine learning and Deep learning,Full Stack Mr.Shyamprakash completed M.Tech in IT from Anna University and is doing PhD in Anna University. He is dedicated towards the teaching profession and started his career in teaching profession in 2010.From the inception he is giving hands-on training in oracle sql,Machine learning and Deep learning models and Full stack exercises in Freecodecamp platform.He is a lifetime member in Professional Bodies Understanding the student talent either in development or design and guiding them accordingly. He has published 4 papers and 1 patent. Ms.D.Ramya M.E D.O.J : 07.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Image Processing,Machine Learning,Speech Recognition Ms.D.Ramya Assistant Professor in the department of Computer Science and Business systems with 6 years experience in computer science and Engineering domain.She Pursued her M.E Computer Science in Dr.Mahalingam College of Engineering.she has published 8 publications in international and national journal and one book related to C Programming .Her Current research work includes meta heuristic algorithms, image processing and speech recognition. Mr.M.Mohanraj B.Tech,M.E,MBA D.O.J : 15.05.2024 Areas of Specialization Software Engineering, Human Resource Management Mohanraj, Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems. He brings 10 years of experience to the classroom, including 8 years in industry and 2 years in teaching. Mr. Mohanraj holds an impressive academic background, with a B.Tech (IT) degree with First Class Distinction from Anna University, Chennai, an M.E. in Software Engineering from Anna University Regional Centre Coimbatore, and an MBA in Human Resource Management from Bharathiyar University. This unique combination of technical and business expertise allows him to bridge the gap between technology and human resources. His industry experience includes successfully developing HR systems and structures, along with extensive recruitment experience identifying top talent across various industries. Currently, his research interests focus on cybersecurity, Internet of Things (IoT) applications, and optimizing HR systems using Artificial Intelligence (AI). This blend of skills positions him to develop innovative solutions for modern organizations. Ms.K.Bhuvaneswari B.E., M.E., (Ph.D.) D.O.J : 09 May 2025 Areas of Specialization Quantum computing , machine learning and software engineering Ms. K. Bhuvaneswari is a dedicated and detail-oriented software testing professional with over five years of hands-on experience at Netgen Soft Solutions Pvt. Ltd., Bengaluru. She holds undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in Computer Science and Engineering and has demonstrated an excellent academic record, including a diploma completed with distinction. She possesses strong analytical abilities, a systematic approach to problem-solving, and a deep commitment to quality assurance, making her a valuable contributor in software development and testing environments. Currently, she is pursuing a part-time Ph.D. at the Indian Institute of Information Technology Tiruchirappalli in the area of Quantum Computing, where her research focuses on advanced computational methodologies and emerging technologies. Mr.S.Arul Prakasham M.E D.O.J : 19.09.2019 Areas of Specialization Core Java and cyber security Mr. S. Arul Prakasham has five years of experience in Engineering Education. He obtained his Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Computer Science and Engineering from Sri Krishna College of Engineering and Technology. He also brings three years of professional experience as a Mainframe Developer at Tata Consultancy Services, where he specialized in COBOL programming and the maintenance of high-volume enterprise systems, developing a strong foundation in software reliability and structured problem-solving. Currently, he is enhancing his expertise in emerging technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, and Full Stack Development, with a focus on integrating his experience in robust legacy systems with modern, scalable, and intelligent computing solutions. Mr.A.Bharathiraja B.E, M.S D.O.J :  01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Analog and Mixed Signal IC design, Low power VLSI architectures for signal and image processing. Mr. Bharathi Raja A is an experienced IT professional with nearly twenty years in the industry, specializing in software development, solution architecture, and project and program management. He has worked across major domains such as ecommerce, web portals, banking, and CRM, delivering reliable digital solutions and leading teams through complete project lifecycles with strong stakeholder engagement. He is proficient in PHP, Python, Java, JavaScript, MySQL, Shell Scripting and modern web technologies, and has significant experience in digital transformation and automation initiatives. He is currently pursuing a PhD in Graph Neural Networks at Bharathidasan University and holds an MS in Software Systems from BITS Pilani and a BE in Computer Science from Madurai Kamaraj University. His achievements include multiple STAR Performer awards, participation in international conferences, and a published research paper in the Journal of Applied Global Research. He also holds several professional certifications and contributes as a blogger on the Infosys Digital platform. Through his technical expertise, leadership, and commitment to continuous learning, he continues to make valuable contributions to the IT field Mr.S.Shankara Varshith B.Tech, M.S D.O.J : 25.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Analog and Mixed Signal IC design, Low power VLSI architectures for signal and image processing. Mr. Shankara Varshith, with six years of professional experience, is a skilled expert in product management, data science, and analytics. He holds a Master of Science in Data Science from Deakin University with First Class distinction and has completed prestigious postgraduate programs in Product Management from the Kellogg School of Management and in Data Science and Business Analytics from the University of Texas at Austin. His professional journey spans fintech, AI-driven analytics, and large-scale data operations, where he has contributed significantly to the development of intelligent and user-centric digital solutions. Mr. Shankara Varshith’s contributions include leading payment product initiatives at FairMoney, driving merchant-focused innovations, and shaping data-driven strategies through market research and analytical insights. His earlier roles strengthened his expertise in AI project delivery, machine learning workflows, KPI design, operational optimisation, and cross-functional collaboration. He has also demonstrated leadership by mentoring analysts and data scientists and contributing to in-house analytics product development. PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 50+ PUBLICATIONS 15+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE With most of the electronics and communication systems being driven by software today, there is an imminent need for the Electronics & Communication Engineer to be well versed with software too. The Programme of Computer & Communication Engineering at Sri Eshwar offers the students with an excellent combination of electronics & communication engineering and software. This dual advantage expands the scope of career progression for the students in electronics, communication and IT companies. LEARNING SCOPE CCE is a dual advantage program where the students, acquire software skills on par with CSE students along with ECE skills. The curriculum of CCE imparts the strong fundamental knowledge on electronic courses including Digital systems, Communication Technologies, Embedded Systems, and IoT, and on computer related courses like C, Data Structures, Python & Java programming, Data base management systems, Object Oriented Programming, Networking & Cybersecurity, Web & Mobile application Development. CAREER PROGRESSION The students pursuing Computer and Communication Engineering (CCE) will have the dual opportunity of getting placed in core communication and electronics companies or in leading IT companies. There is a great demand for fresh engineers with both software and communication engineering knowledge. VISION To emerge as a pioneering department, nurturing students into futuristic and globally competent Computer and Communication Engineering professionals. MISSION To offer high-quality engineering education emphasizing practical outcomes. To foster innovative research and project development among students and instil a sense of social responsibility. To equip students with industry-relevant skills and robust leadership qualities through pedagogical methodologies and industry engagement. To inculcate a culture of socially relevant values and nurture moral, ethical, and interpersonal skills among students. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Acquire core competencies in computational technologies and communication engineering with the ability to utilise the latest software tools to effectively address real time challenges. PEO2: Active involvement in research, innovation, or entrepreneurial ventures, resulting in significant societal contributions. PEO3: Demonstrate industry-relevant skills, effective leadership qualities, and strong ethical values to exhibit professionalism and foster collaborative work experience. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Apply the concepts of computer and communication systems to develop software for different applications. PSO2: Acquire skills and knowledge to solve real time challenges in communication networks. Dr.R.Deepa B.E, M.E, Ph.D. D.O.J : 09.05.2025 Areas of Specialization Wireless communication Expert in Signal Processing | Researcher in Advanced Communication Systems | Academic Leader | Mentor With over 20 years of experience in academia and research, I specialize in high-performance, low-complexity signal processing algorithms, software-defined radio, and image transmission. My work bridges innovation and education—spanning doctoral mentorship, curriculum design, and extensive publications in reputed journals. I’m passionate about fostering research-driven learning, driving interdisciplinary collaboration, and contributing as an editor, peer reviewer, and subject matter expert across global academic platforms. Dr.R.Solomon Roach M.Tech., Ph.D D.O.J : 03.06.2025 Areas of Specialization Semiconductor Dr. R.SOLOMON ROACH is an accomplished academician and industry professional with over 20 years of combined experience, including 6 years in semiconductor industry and 14 years in academia. His core expertise lies in the semiconductor domain, with specialization in Design for Testability (DfT), integrating theoretical foundations with real-world industrial practice. He completed his Ph.D. in VLSI Design from Anna University, Chennai in 2018. He holds an M.Tech in VLSI Design from Bharath Institute of Higher Education and Research (2005) and a B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from St. Xavier’s Catholic College of Engineering (2002). Currently, he serves as Manager – DfT Division at sVIOS Technologies Pvt. Ltd., Chennai (since February 2025). Prior to this, he held key leadership roles at Tessolve Semiconductor Pvt. Ltd., Bangalore, including Manager – Design Engineering (2023–2025) and Senior Design Lead Engineer (2020–2023). He has also worked as an ASIC Design Engineer at Test and Verification Solutions Ltd., Chennai. Through Tessolve, he has worked on several high-end client projects including Intel, Analog Devices, and Alphawave and Renesas. His industrial expertise includes scan architecture design, ATPG, fault coverage analysis, DfT implementation, and ASIC verification methodologies. He has led multiple high-impact semiconductor projects, ensuring quality, reliability, and test optimization in complex SoC designs. In academia, he has served as Head of the Department (ECE) at Cape Institute of Technology and as Assistant Professor and Lecturer in reputed engineering institutions in Tamil Nadu. During his academic tenure, he played a pivotal role in curriculum development, research mentoring, and fostering industry-academia collaboration. He is deeply committed to advancing research in VLSI systems, mentoring students in cuttingedge semiconductor technologies, and integrating research-driven insights into teaching. His areas of interest include VLSI testing, low-power design methodologies, DfT architecture, and ASIC implementation strategies. With a strong foundation in both academic research and semiconductor industry practices, he continues to contribute toward innovation, excellence in engineering education, and practical advancements in the field of semiconductor. Dr.C.Ganesh M.E, (Ph.D) D.O.J : 24.02.2021 Areas of Specialization Natural Language Processing, AI and Machine Learning Dr.C.Ganesh has a strong academic and professional background in engineering and research. With a B.E. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering in 2008, an M.E. in Applied Electronics in the year of 2013, and a Ph.D. in Information and Communication in the year of 2022, Dr. C Ganesh has built a solid foundation in the communication field. Dr C. Ganesh started his career as a software engineer at Hexaware Technologies, Chennai, from 2011 to 2013. He has contributed to research with 5 SCI publications, 15 Scopus-indexed conference papers, and 3 patents. He is currently guiding 10 undergraduate batches and 2 postgraduate students and he has also earned 200 Scopus citations and obtained certifications from NPTEL, E-Box, and Udemy. As a member of ISTE, IETE, and IAENG, he actively participates in professional activities and has submitted various research proposals to ICMR, MNRE, SERB, and AU. Dr.S.Dhamodharan M.E, (Ph.D) D.O.J : 22.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Wireless Communication Dr. S. Dhamodharan holds a distinguished academic background, with a BE in ECE (2009), ME in Applied Electronics (2011), and PhD in Wireless Communication (2022). As an accredited trainer for Entrepreneurship Educators and Mentors, certified by the Entrepreneurship Development Institute of India, Ahmedabad, he has a proven track record of fostering entrepreneurial skills. He has been recognized through various grants, including Rs. 1,20,000 from the DST NIMAT Project, Government of India, for conducting Entrepreneurship Awareness Camps. He has also received grants from TNSCST, Government of Tamil Nadu, EDI – Tamil Nadu, and MIC, AICTE, for various projects and programs. Additionally, he has recieved Rs. 70,000 from the Centre of Faculty and Professional Development, Anna University, Chennai, for conducting Faculty Development Programs in Data Science and Cybersecurity. He has further enhanced his expertise by participating in AICTE QIP Short-Term Training Programs and other Training programs at prestigious institutions like IIT Bombay, IIT Kharagpur, IISc Bangalore, and ISRO Hyderabad. Dr.R.Babitha Lincy M.E, (Ph.D) D.O.J :  18.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Image Processing, Deep Learning, Computer Vision Dr.R.Babitha Lincy is an accomplished academic professional. She has obtained her Ph.D. in Information and communication Engineering from Anna University, in 2022. As an Assistant Professor at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, she is a dedicated faculty to nurture the next generation of engineers. With over 30 research papers published in SCI journals, Scopus, and international conferences, she has significantly contributed to advancing knowledge in the Deep Learning domain. A strong proponent of continuous learning, she has also obtained NPTEL certifications in Introduction to IoT and Digital Electronics, demonstrating expertise in these cutting-edge areas. As a member of the Institute of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineers (IETE) and the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE), she actively participates in professional communities, staying updated with the latest industry trends and innovations. She is passionate about combining research with teaching, striving to inspire students and make a lasting impact in academia. Dr.R.R.Thirrunavukkarasu M.E, (Ph.D) D.O.J :  12.06.2024 Areas of Specialization VLSI Design, Signal and Image Processing, Machine Learning Dr. R.R. Thirunavukkarasu completed his Doctorate of Philosophy in Bio-signal Processing in 2023, Master’s of Engineering in VLSI Design in 2012, and Bachelor’s of Engineering in Electronics and Communication Engineering in 2008. Throughout his career, he has demonstrated a commitment to research and innovation. He has published five patents and obtained NPTEL certificates in Python for Data Science, CMOS Digital VLSI Design, and Digital Design for Verilog. In 2022, he received NVIDIA Jetson Nano Developer Kits worth Rs.72,000, and in 2024, he secured NVIDIA Jetson Nano Developer and Orion Kits worth Rs. 1,18,000 to set up an industry-supported lab. Additionally, he received a grant of Rs. 75,000 from SERB for conducting an International Workshop on “Antenna Design Techniques for Wireless Power Transfer: Current Trends and Future Prospects”.He is a lifetime member of ISTE and received a certificate as a Toycathon Evaluator. Ms.G.G.Sreeja M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 04.01.2021 Areas of Specialization Data Structures & algorithms, Software Engineering, Deep Learning Ms. Sreeja completed her M.E. in 2016, which laid a strong foundation for her career in academia. She began her professional journey in the year 2017, and since then she has consistently contributed to the academia with her interest and expertise in Data Structures, Software engineering and Deep Learning. As an Assistant Professor at Sri Eshwar, she continues her journey to passionately nurture young minds in the field of engineering. Throughout her career, she has actively engaged in continuous professional development, attending more than six Faculty Development Programs (FDPs) related to her areas of expertise. Her passion for research has led her to present more than three papers at IEEE conference proceedings, significantly contributing to her research domain. Additionally, she holds 2 patents, showcasing her commitment to innovation and advancing technology. These experiences reflect her dedication to both education and research in the engineering field. Ms G.Dency Flora M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J  : 26.08.2021 Areas of Specialization Signal Processing ,Image Processing & IOT Ms.G.Dency Flora Completed her Bachelor’s degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering at Sri Ramakrishna Engineering College in 2016. Subsequently she completed her master’s degree in Communication System at PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore in 2018. She started her teaching career in the year 2018. Ms.G.Dency Flora joined Sri Eshwar College of Engineering in the year 2021. She has Completed 5 NPTEL Courses and has published 2 journal papers and 11 conference papers. She fosters academic growth through continuous knowledge enhancement forums like FDPs, online courses and by publishing various research papers. Ms.R.Megala M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 28.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Database, Cloud, Deep Learning Ms. R. Megala completed her M.E. in 2018 with a background in Computer Science and Engineering. She started her career in 2012, and since then has been extensively working to uplift research and academic quality. She has gained significant experience in teaching and learning methodologies, developing curricula, and mentoring students. As an Assistant Professor at Sri Eshwar, Ms. Megala is passionate to develop her abilities, face fresh challenges and support the growth of the institution. Her goal is to provide students with modern education, through a collaborative learning atmosphere and keeping up with the most recent technology developments. Ms.N.Banupriya M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 02.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Embedded Systems Design, IOT, Deep learning Ms.N.Banupriya completed her M.E.,in Embedded System Technologies in 2011 and B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering in 2009. She has over 12 years of experience in teaching in various institutions. She has successfully completed an Industry collaborative project with GE Healthcare Pvt Ltd, Bangalore in 2019. She has received multiple awards, including the Best Innovative Project Mentor award in Smart India Hackathon and TITAN Wear Your Smarts Hackathon. She has also been an evaluator in AICTE, MHRD’s Toycathon. She has received appreciation awards from Texas Instruments and FOSSEE, IIT Bombay for her exceptional student mentorship. She has attended a 5-day Faculty Development Program organized by the Centre for Development of Technical Education, IIT Kanpur. She holds online certifications from NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute, NPTEL, and Coursera. She is a lifetime member of ISTE. Ms.P.Megala M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J :  12.06.2023 Areas of Specialization IoT and Deep Learning Ms.P. Megala has a strong academic background and valuable teaching experience. She has completed her M.E. in the year of 2019. After gaining significant knowledge and exposure, working in multiple institutions, she joined Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, in June 2023. In addition to teaching, she is also active in research and innovation. She has published a patent titled “IoT and Cloud-based Camera for Healthcare Surveillance” and secured a patent on “IoT-based Fast Ticket System using Machine Learning and Deep Learning”. With two NPTEL Elite Certifications and more than six Faculty Development Programs under her belt, she is committed to continuous learning. Ms. Megala has also organized the Tech Fusion’24 Intra-College Hackathon and presented four conference proceedings related to her area of interest. Mr. Arun R M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 02.05.2024 Areas of Specialization Data Analytics, GIS, Remote Sensing Arun Rangaswamy has an impressive academic and professional background. He has completed his Master’s in Computer Science and Engineering and is pursuing his Doctor of Philosophy at Anna University, Chennai. With more than 15 years of experience in teaching at  various engineering colleges in and around Tamil Nadu, he also served as a Junior Research Fellow in a DST-NRDMS sponsored project entitled “Land Use-Based Flood Damage Assessment: A Case Study of Chennai Floods.” Additionally, he has published more than 35 papers in national and international journals. He has received funding from AICTE – Scheme for Promoting Interests, Creativity, and Ethics among Students (SPICES). His areas of specialization are Geographical Information Systems, Remote Sensing, and Data Analytics. Ms. R. Sangeetha M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 12.06.2024 Areas of Specialization Wireless Sensor Networks & Machine Learning Ms. Sangeetha has graduated with a Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics and Communication Engineering in 2017. Subsequently, she completed her Master’s of Engineering in Communication Systems at Anna University Regional Campus, Coimbatore, in 2019. She embarked on her career as an educator in 2019. Having served multiple institutions and gaining significant exposure, Ms. Sangeetha joined Sri Eshwar College of Engineering in 2024. She has attended more than 10 Faculty Development Programs (FDPs) focusing on various facets of Machine Learning. She has also contributed to the academic community by publishing a research paper at an IEEE International Conference, presenting more than five papers at various international and national conferences, and authoring a book chapter. Ms.R.Preethi M.E. D.O.J :  01.07.2024 Areas of Specialization Embedded systems, VLSI Design, IOT Ms.Preethi has completed her Bachelor’s of Engineering in 2016 and Master’s of Engineering in 2019. She has gained good experience after working in various engineering institutions and is currently working at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering since 2024. She has made her contribution to research by publishing 3 patents with the titles “An Image Processing based technique to help HR predict the pulse of the working environment” , “Low Cost Solar-Powered LED Lighting System” and “IoT based smart monitoring and control of smart city”. She has also published 1 conference paper, and 2 journal articles. She has submitted a research proposal to DST (SERB) as Co-Principal Investigator. She continues to stay committed to academic excellence, focussed on research and innovation. Admission Enquiry 2025 Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 450+ PUBLICATIONS 40+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE Over the last decade, Electronics and Communication systems have become an integral part of our lives like never before. The modern-day sophistication enjoyed by the common public, like smart phones, incredibly thin computing devices, Ultra HD Television systems, interconnected wireless nodes, etc., is the outcome of innovations of world’s best Electronic and communication engineers. The technological advancements in this field have shrunk the distance between continents, making global communication an affordable one for even a common citizen. The powerful fusion of VLSI, IoT and Networking has propelled the Electronics and Communication sector onto an accelerated growth trajectory, paving the way for extensive career prospects for emerging Electronics engineers. LEARNING SCOPE Sri Eshwar’s ECE programme is supported by a team of right blend of rich technical knowledge and experienced faculty members to ensure students receive robust education in essential subjects such as Circuit Theory, Electronic Devices and Circuits, Digital Systems, Antennas, Communication Systems, Embedded Systems, Signal Processing, VLSI Technology, Wireless Communication, and Programming skills to meet the demands of the Hardware and Software industry. Moreover, students gain exposure to cutting-edge advancements in latest technologies like Artificial Intelligence, IoT, Machine Learning, and modern EDA tools, aligning them with current industry demands and technological trends. CAREER PROGRESSION With the Central Government’s “Make in India” policy, the Electronics manufacturing industry is poised to have exponential growth in India in the next decade and the ECE students will have abundant opportunities to contribute to that growth. The field of ECE is emerging as one of the most prominent fields of engineering studies with substantial demand for ECE engineers all over the world. Upon acquiring the core competencies in Electronics and Communication Engineering and its latest EDA tools, the students will be able to start their career as Embedded System Engineers, Electronics design engineers, Network engineers, Software developers, System Control Engineer, Electronics desing and development engineer, Electronics Engineer. VISION To groom students into futuristic and globally competent Electronics and Communication engineering professionals. MISSION To impart quality education with moral and ethical values to develop competent engineers, leaders and successful entrepreneurs To establish state-of-art infrastructure and provide opportunities to update on emerging tools and technologies To empower the faculty towards excellence in teaching – learning, consultancy, research and development activities To foster socially relevant and industry oriented innovation among students. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Pursue career in multinational organizations, research organizations and core industries, higher studies at premier institutions and establish start-ups. PEO2: Acquire core competencies in Electronics and Communication Engineering and exposure to latest Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools. PEO3: Exhibit professional skills and collaborative work experience. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Interpret and design electronic systems using internet of things, VLSI technology and efficient signal processing and computing algorithms. PSO2: Apply knowledge to solve challenges in communication systems and networks . INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 ELECTRONICS  ENGINEERING (VLSI Design and Technology) 0 LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 0 + RECRUITERS 0 + PUBLICATIONS 0 + PATENTS 25LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 450+ PUBLICATIONS 40+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE Driven by the Indian Semiconductor Mission (ISM), this program prepares the students for India’s booming Semiconductor chip ecosystem. The students will master semiconductor devices, CMOS design, FPGA implementation, ASIC development, and CAD tools. The curriculum bridges the gap between theory and industry by providing deep learning in fabrication, testing, and verification methodologies. As the ISM fuels massive domestic growth in chip manufacturing and design, graduates are uniquely positioned for high-paying placement opportunities. The students will be fully equipped to secure elite roles in Digital, Analog and Testing Domains in Semiconductor Industry.. LEARNING SCOPE The B.E. (VLSI Design and Technology) programme at Sri Eshwar is driven by a team of highly qualified faculty blending strong technical expertise with industry experience. Students receive comprehensive education in core areas such as Semiconductor Devices, Network Analysis, Digital Electronics, Analog Electronics, Integrated Circuits, VLSI Design, and various Professional Electives in Semiconductor Chip design. The curriculum is enriched with exposure to advanced domains like Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and modern EDA tools, ensuring alignment with current industry practices. This holistic approach equips graduates with both hardware and software skills, preparing them for careers in semiconductor design, chip fabrication, and emerging technologies. CAREER PROGRESSION With the Central Government’s “Make in India” policy, the Electronics manufacturing industry is poised to have exponential growth in India in the next decade and the ECE students and in particular VLSI students will have abundant opportunities to contribute to that growth. The field of Semiconductor chip design and fabrication is emerging as one of the most prominent fields of engineering studies with substantial demand for VLSI engineers all over the world. Upon acquiring the core competencies in VLSI Design and its latest EDA tools, the students will be able to start their career as RTL Design Engineers, Design and Verification Engineers, DFT Engineers, STA Engineers, Analog IC Design Engineers, Physical Design Engineers, Analog Layout Engineers and Post Silicon Validation Engineers. VISION To groom students into futuristic and globally competent VLSI Design and Technology engineering professionals. MISSION To impart quality education in VLSI Design and Technology with strong moral and ethical values, nurturing competent engineers, innovators, and future leaders. To establish state-of-the-art infrastructure and provide opportunities to master emerging tools, technologies, and advanced EDA platforms. To empower faculty towards excellence in teaching–learning, consultancy, research, and development in semiconductor and VLSI domains. To foster industry-oriented and socially relevant innovations among students, driving. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will develop strong foundations in VLSI design, semiconductor technology, and embedded systems, applying their knowledge to create innovative, efficient, and industry-relevant electronic solutions. PEO2: Graduates will continuously enhance their skills in emerging domains such as AI, Machine Learning, and advanced EDA tools in Semiconductor domain, ensuring adaptability to evolving technologies and global industry demands. PEO3: Graduates will demonstrate leadership, teamwork, and entrepreneurial abilities while upholding professional ethics, contributing to sustainable and socially relevant advancements in electronics and VLSI technology. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Ability to apply advanced concepts of analog/digital CMOS design, ASIC/FPGA design flows, and hardware description languages (Verilog/SystemVerilog) to design, simulate, and verify integrated circuits using industry-standard EDA and CAD tools. PSO2: Understanding of semiconductor fabrication processes, testing methodologies, and packaging technologies. All Rights Reserved. Dr.K.N.Vijeyakumar M.E., Ph.D. Areas of Specialization Analog and Mixed Signal IC design, Low power VLSI architectures for signal and image processing. Vijeyakumar K N has 18+ years of experience in Teaching of which 6+ years in Core Research. He has completed Masters in Engineering at Government College of Technology, Coimbatore, TamilNadu in the year 2007, and PhD in the area of Low power Processor design under the Faculty of Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, in the year 2013. His areas of research include Analog and Mixed Signal IC design, Processor design, VLSI architecture design for signal and image processing, and chip design for Biomedical applications He was the Chief Investigator of two research projects with cumulative grant of Rs.1.72 crores, funded by ISRO & MEITY, and completed three chip Tape-Outs He had published nearly 50 research papers in reputed journals that include IET, Elsevier, Springer, and more than 100 research articles in conference proceedings 6 Ph.D scholars have completed their research under his supervision and guided more than 50 PG scholars. He is a review committee member of Springer and few SCI indexed journals. Dr.V.V.Teresa B.E, M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 15.05.2013 Areas of Specialization VLSI Design, Networking, Design Thinking Dr.V.V.Teresa received her B.E degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU), M.E degree in VLSI Design from Karpagam University and Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University,Chennai. She has received AICTE funding for the Scheme -Promoting Interests, Creativity and Ethics among Students (SPICES) in the year 2022. She has acted as Resource person for a SERB- Three day National level workshop on Emerging Trends in Power Electronics, Energy Storage and Renewable Technologies (PEESRT) for E-Transportation in India, also invited as Resource person for ICSSR Sponsored “Two-day National webinar on Effective Utilization of Renewable Energy for Smart Cities”. She has published more than 25 journals,3 book chapters and 3 patents. She has also organized several workshops, seminars, interaction programmes on health, safety, literacy, entrepreneurship, legal rights for women, Women empowerment and gender equity programs under Women’s Welfare Committee and POSH Cell. She has coordinated the flagship events like Technovanza for two consecutive years and Technovista a National level technical symposium under Sri Eshwar’s Technical Club. Her Research area includes Low power VLSI, Image processing, Biomedical Instrumentation. She is a professional body member of SSI, IETE, IAENG and IGEN. Mr.A.Vignesh M.E., (Ph.D.) Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence, Natural Language Processing, Generative AI, Conversational Agents, Deep Learning, Embedded Systems & IoT A. Vignesh is an Assistant Professor in the Department of ECE at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore, specializing in Natural Language Processing and Conversational AI. He has published 3 SCI-indexed journal papers, 7 Scopus-indexed conference papers, and holds 8 Indian innovation patents. With over 5 years of experience in AI and embedded systems. He received the Best Research Paper Award at ICACCS 2024 and serves as Co-PI for a funded AI robotics project. Mr.A.Kandeeban BE(EEE) , ME (Applied Electronics) D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization VLSI, Digital design and Verification, IP architecture Kandeeban received his BE degree in EEE from Erode Sengunthar Engg college (Bharathiar University) and completed his ME degree in Applied Electronics at Coimbatore Institute of Technology (CIT) as a GATE qualified candidate. He holds a gold medal in both UG and PG. Subsequently he worked in Wipro as a Chip design engineer which included a stint in the US. Later he worked in Nvdia in a world-class IP design team followed by an 8 year stint in Intel as a Verification Architect. In these roles he was involved in creating high-quality IPs with zero bugs, and in leading junior engineers to first-pass success, as well as in publishing multiple papers within Intel.Currently he is the co-founder of a Coimbatore based startup specializing in IP Design and Verification. PACKAGE 100+ RECRUITERS 70+ PUBLICATIONS 10+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE In today’s context, human life without electricity and electronic appliances is simply unimaginable. Human civilization has seen a great development with the invention of electricity. As we develop more and more gadgets to automate our activities, the field of electrical and electronics engineering becomes more and more exciting. With the faster depletion of fossil fuels and with the advent of electric vehicles and solar powered systems and the extensive industrial automation that takes place, the study of electrical & electronics engineering is gaining substantial significance with larger number of students choosing to study. LEARNING SCOPE At Sri Eshwar, in the program of EEE, we strive to develop world class electrical and electronics engineers, by teaching them Internet of Things (IOT), Electronic Design and Automation, Robotics, Industrial Automation, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Image Processing, Wireless Technologies, E-Vehicles, Design and Manufacture of Special Purpose Machines and the need of the hour Renewable Energy Solutions and tools like ECAD,MATLAB etc., In addition to the above the students are also provided exposure to software courses like Database Management System, OOPs Concepts, Java Technologies. CAREER PROGRESSION With many countries rapidly shifting to electric vehicles and increase in demands in the energy sector, Electrical and Electronics engineering students have abundant opportunities with high demand in power generation, transportation, medical electronics, communication, aerospace, automation and process industries. Electrical and Electronics graduates can also serve in government organizations, public sector companies and private industries. For this field of engineering, sky is the limit. VISION To become a centre of excellence that focusses on Embedded Systems, Industrial Automation, Electronic Design and Automation domains and evolve as an integrated facility provider for academic services that includes research and innovation that are practically useful to the society. MISSION Evolve curriculum and delivery approaches to provide broad and wide exposure to gain knowledge in their field of study. Provide opportunities to enhance domain knowledge and skills required for the programs offered. Establish connections with local, national and global experts to share, utilize and exchange domain expertise. Conduct Outreach activities for the society that involve the use of electrical engineering solutions to address societal challenges. Create and provide conducive eco system and facilities for offering education related to electrical and electronics engineering. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will take up careers in Electrical and Electronics Engineering like design and manufacture of Electrical and Electronic and its related systems and involve in carrying out engineering projects related to societal issues. PEO2: Graduates will engage in a post graduate program in the field of Electrical and Electronics Engineering Sciences and Management Sciences leading to academic and research careers. PEO3: Graduates will take up entrepreneurship as a career. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Design, analyse and control the energy conversion systems and power systems integrated with renewable energy ensuring sustainable and ethical engineering solutions. PSO2: Design, implement and optimize embedded systems and industrial automations ensuring the development of efficient, reliable and advanced automation solutions.
