and Power systems. Dr.V.Chandrasekaran, served in various leading Engineering institutions from the level of instructor to the Head of the Department. He has successfully faced NBA and NAAC accreditation committee wherever he worked.He has developed a new model of three phase induction machine for energy conservation, performance improvement and Power quality improvement. Dr. D. Gunapriya M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 15.06.2022 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics and Drives, Electric Vehicles and Intelligent Control Dr.D.Gunapriya ,is an Associate Professor in the department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering with over 18 years of experience. She has an extensive publication record , including 32 technical articles , 6 patents and 3 book chapters. Her research interests encompass Power Electronics and Drives , Electric Vehicles and Intelligent Control. She actively serves as reviewer for reputed Journals and holds lifetime memberships with ISTE and IETE.Her commitment to academic excellence and leadership in various accreditation and quality assurance processes have significantly contributed to the advancement of the department. Dr.M.Geetha M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 19.07.2023 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics and Drives, Analog Electronics, Microprocessor and Microcontroller Dr. M. Geetha is an Assistant Professor (Selection Grade) in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering with 16 years of extensive teaching experience. Obtained UG Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering  and PG Degree with specialization in Power Electronics & Drives. Awarded with Doctorate in the year 2023 from Anna University, Chennai. Her research area includes Power Electronics and Drives, Renewable energy and embedded systems. She has published more than 20 research articles in various journals, authored 2 Books in the field of Renewable Energy, published 5 patents including 1 patent grant in design. She is an active life time member in ISTE, IETE and IGEN. Dr.P.Anbarasu M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 19.06.2013 Areas of Specialization Control Engineering, Autonomous Vehicle, Nature Inspired Algorithms, Machine Learning, Integration of Renewable Energy Dr.P. Anbarasu completed his Doctor of Philosophy from Anna University, Chennai, India; PG Degree in Power Electronics and Drives and UG in Electrical and Electronics Engineering. His current research focuses on Integration of Renewable Energy Systems in the Smart Grid and Autonomous Vehicle. He has 2 years of industrial experience and 13 years of academic and research experiences. He has published 32 research articles in various journals He has completed 4 Government of India funded research projects, 2 Government of Tamil Nadu funded projects and 1 Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) project. He has 1 patent to his credit. He is a Member of ISTE, SSI and IAENG . Also he has organized various FDPs, Conferences, Workshops and Seminars. He has completed 6 NPTEL courses successfully and received NPTEL Top performing mentor recognition from IIT Madras. Dr.N.Pushpalatha M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 06.01.2010 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics and Drives, Power quality, Renewable Energy system, Artificial Intelligence in Electrical Engineering, Internet of Things Dr.N.Pushpalatha is an Assistant Professor (Selection Grade) in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, obtained her UG Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering in 2009 and PG Degree with specialization in Power Electronics and Drives in the year 2013. Awarded with Doctoral Degree in Electrical Engineering from Anna University Chennai in 2024. She is an active life time member in ISTE , IETE and Graduate Member in IEEE. She has acted as Technical Program Committee member, session chair and reviewer for various international and national conferences in India and Abroad. Authored and published more than 40 research articles in various journals, published 14 patents including 1 Design patent grant. She has also acted as resource person in “NSTEDB DST Government of India EDII, Ahmedabad Funded Women Entrepreneurship Development Program” consecutively for four years. Acted as Project Evaluator for “Toycathon 2021” organized by the Innovation Cell, Ministry of Education, New Delhi. Dr.S.Sheikameer Batcha ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 23.11.2011 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics , Embedded System , Internet of Things , Solar PV systems Dr. Sheikameer Batcha completed his UG Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and PG Degree in with specialization in Power Electronics and Drives and received his PhD at Anna University, Chennai. He has been honored as an Innovation Ambassador by the Ministry of Education through the Institution Innovation Council (IIC). He is a certified trainer for Solar PV Installation, accredited by the Skill Council for Green Jobs, and a Master Trainer in “Foundation Skills in Integrated Product Development,” certified by Anna University and NASSCOM. He is also a trainer in “Design Thinking” certified by the School of Design. He has published 14 research articles in various journals. He is a life member in ISTE and IGEN. He has contributed in establishing a Centre of Excellence in Embedded System and Automation. Mr.B.Hemananth ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 21.01.2009 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics, Renewable Energy Sources Mr. B. Hemananth obtained his UG Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and PG Degree with specialization in Power Electronics and Drives. He is currently pursuing his Ph.D at Anna University, Chennai. His research work includes fault classification, machine learning and renewable energy. He has published 9 research articles in various journals and 2 patents. Authored 1 book in High Voltage Engineering.He is a trainer for the Suryamitra program organized by National Institute of Solar Energy (NISE), New Delhi. He is a life time member in ISTE, IAENG and IGEN. Mr.R.Premkumar ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 01.06.2011 Areas of Specialization Control Systems Mr.R.Premkumar received his BE Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from Bannari Amman Institute of Technology in 2007 and Post Graduate Degree in Control Systems from PSG College of Technology in 2009. He cleared the GATE Exam in 2007. He is pursuing his Doctorate Degree in Anna University, Chennai. His research areas include Control Systems, Power Systems and Digital Electronics. He is Life time member in ISTE and IETE. He has published 10 research articles in various journals and 4 patents. He is a technical trainer in PLC and Industrial Automation. Mr.R.Hariharan ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 04.06.2012 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning, Embedded Systems, IOT, Automation Mr.R.Hariharan obtained his UG Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering in 2006 and PG Degree with specialization in Embedded System Technologies in 2012. He is currently pursuing his PhD in the area of Embedded Systems in Anna University Chennai. He has specialization in Implanted Frameworks Advances, with an emphasis on ML and IOT. He has published 4 research articles in various journals.He has contributed in establishing a Centre of Excellence in Embedded System and Automation. Also, he is a certified licensed holder for small scale Drones. Mr.K.Raj Thilak ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 19.06.2013 Areas of Specialization Renewable Energy, Electric Vehicles, Energy Auditing and Management, Fuel Conversion Systems Mr.K.Raj Thilak obtained his UG Degree in Electrical & Electronics Engineering in the year 2011 and PG Degree with specialization in Energy Engineering in 2013. Currently pursuing his Doctoral program in Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr.Sagunthala R&D Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai. His research area includes Renewable Energy, Alternative Fuels, Electric Vehicle and Energy Management. He has published 15 research articles in various journals. He is a Life time member in ISTE and IGEN. He has also assisted in carrying out consultancy activities in Energy Auditing for various industries & institutions and completed over 30 consultancy activities so far. Mr.C.Mohan Raj ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 23.12.2013 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics and Drives, PLC and Industrial Automation, Power Quality Mr.C.Mohan Raj obtained his UG degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and PG Degree with specialization in Power Electronics and Drives.He is currently pursuing his PhD in Faculty of Electrical Engineering from PSG College of Technology, Anna University. He has completed 5 certified courses in Embedded Systems and Industrial Automation. He is the authorized trainer for the Mitsubishi ATC for PLC and Industrial Automation. He has successfully completed 3 IEDC funded projects and organized ATAL FDP on Topic “ Robotics – The Machine Power for Industrial Automation”. He has acted as resource person for various programs related to Industrial Automation for academic and industrial persons. He has published 10 research articles in various journals and 6 patents and authored 3 books. He is a life member in ISTE, IAENG and IGEN. He has created and uploaded more than 100 Educational Videos in Youtube channel “Learn Electrical Concepts and Mathematics” and received more than 2.3 K Subscribers so far. Mr.R.Sasikumar M.E., MISTE., MIAENG D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Industrial Automation, PLC, HMI, VFD & SCADA , Electrical Drives, System Integration Sasikumar completed his UG Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and PG Degree in Electrical Drives and Embedded Controls. He brings over 10+ years of industry experience along with 6 years of teaching experience, creating a strong balance between practical industrial exposure and academic expertise. He has worked at various professional levels including Application Engineer, Automation Engineer, Project Coordinator, and Assistant Manager, contributing to the design, execution, and management of complex automation projects. His experience spans multiple industrial domains such as Automotive, Food Processing, Special Purpose Machines (SPM), Mining, and Defence, where he has successfully delivered reliable and scalable automation solutions. He has hands-on expertise with global automation platforms from leading brands such as Siemens, Rockwell, ABB, Delta, Mitsubishi, Omron, and Autonics, with strong skills in PLC programming, HMI & SCADA development, control panel design, and complete system integration. With a passion for both industry and teaching, he continues to mentor students and professionals while delivering industry-oriented automation solutions aligned with modern engineering standards. PUBLICATIONS 25+ PATENTS PROGRAMME SCOPE Over the last 25-30 years, we have witnessed extraordinary developments in the field of information technology. These developments have changed the way live and have opened several avenues of opportunities for young engineers. Information has become a powerful tool to run organizations efficiently and effectively and hence enormous investment is made by organizations in information technology which has enhanced the overall scope of this field. LEARNING SCOPE In the B. Tech IT program at Sri Eshwar, through strong association with IT companies, technically competent faculty with rich academic experience and lab infrastructure on par with the IT companies. Students are provided with a holistic learning environment in modern and futuristic IT technologies including AI-ML, Data Integration, Big data, DevOps, Blockchain, Advanced Java Technologies, User Experience Design, Data Science and topics such as Software Engineering and Database Management Systems. CAREER PROGRESSION The students studying B.Tech IT have abundant and unlimited opportunities with leading multinational IT companies recruiting fresh IT graduates in large numbers as Graphic Designers, Multimedia developers, Software Developers, AI Engineers or becoming an entrepreneur, developing their own software products or purse higher studies. VISION To groom students into globally competent IT professionals and meet the ever changing requirements of the industry MISSION Develop the curriculum and deliver with strong fundamentals with creative thinking Empower the faculty to be highly qualified and competent Build strong connectivity with various stakeholders to enrich the knowledge Create technical solutions to the societal problems Develop and upgrade the facilities for the efficient execution of academic and research activities PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will take up careers in Software Development and Testing and Involve in IT service and support management PEO2: Graduates will engage in a post graduate program in the field of Information Technology and Management science leading to academic and research careers. PEO3: Graduates will take up Entrepreneurship as a career. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Demonstrate the ability to apply knowledge and skills in the development and deployment of software projects. PSO2: Create innovative solutions by leveraging emerging technologies to effectively manage IT infrastructure. She was awarded a Doctorate of Philosophy (Ph.D.) by Anna University in the year 2019 and recognised as research supervisor by Centre for Research, Anna University and guiding 6 scholars.. She has been awarded “Best Paper Publication” in 2018.. She published 14 research articles, 2 books, 1 patent. She has reviewed an ample number of papers at IGI Global, Springer as reviewer. Poongodi received her Ph.D. degree from Anna University, Chennai in the year 2022 and M.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from PA College of Engineering and Technology, Pollachi in 2014. With a distinguished portfolio, she has published 10 high-impact research papers, authored a book chapter, and holds 8 patents. Her dedication and contributions have been recognized with several institutional accolades, including “Best Mentor,” “Best Researcher,” and “Best Brander.” Ms. Jayapratha plays a crucial role in the development and maintenance of the institutional website and has guided students in designing websites for various in-house events, further showcasing her technical expertise. She is a certified Oracle trainer, a Wipro-certified faculty member in Java Full Stack Development, and an AWS-certified trainer. PROGRAMME SCOPE A mechanical engineering program offers scopes across various industries and sectors. Students who successfully completes the Mechanical engineering program can design and manufacture vehicles including electric vehicle, engines, various automotive systems, aircraft, spacecraft, missiles, solar systems, wind turbines, hydroelectric power systems, medical devices, prosthetics and biomedical equipment. Graduates can also design and develop robotic systems, automation systems and implement AI/ML techniques in this field. This program also paves the way to research and development activities across various industries, exploring new materials, technologies, and processes to drive innovation and improve performance and provides solid foundation for becoming consultant and entrepreneur Eventually, the scope of a mechanical engineering program is vast and diverse, offering numerous opportunities for graduates to pursue rewarding careers in various industries and make meaningful contributions to society through innovation and problem-solving. LEARNING SCOPE Mechanical Engineering provides a solid foundation in engineering principles and prepares students for a dynamic and rewarding career in various industries. Students will learn fundamental principles of materials, mathematics, and mechanics that form the basis of mechanical engineering. This includes topics such as statics, dynamics, thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, manufacturing, and mechanical design. Students can design, analyse, and optimize mechanical systems and components by the use of Computer-Aided Design (CAD), Finite Element Analysis (FEA), and Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) knowledge. Other important scope of this program is additive manufacturing (3D printing), quality control, process optimization, robotic and industrial automation, control systems, mechatronics, renewable energy systems, HVAC (Heating, Ventilation, And Air Conditioning), green technologies, vehicle dynamics, propulsion systems, aerodynamics and Applications of Artificial Intelligence, Machine learning, Data science and Industrial IOT. CAREER PROGRESSION With the advent of Nanotechnology, Acoustical Engineering and Additive Technology, the scope of Mechanical Engineering has expanded rapidly. There are limitless opportunities for the freshly minted Mechanical Engineers, whether they want to be employed or become an entrepreneur or pursue higher studies. The Students have huge scope for employement as Design Engineer, R&D Engineer, ERP Consultant, Process Engineer, Systems Engineer, Sales Engineer, Product Quality Engineer, Test Engineer and Project Engineer. VISION To become an integrated center of excellence focusing on design, manufacturing and industrial engineering, providing societal benefits through academic services including research and innovation. MISSION Develop curriculum and delivery approach ensuing horizontal exposure and vertical expertise to the learners. Provide opportunities for faculties to enrich their knowledge and skills. Establish connections for local, national and global expertise for an active enhanced learning environment. Execute societal outreach activity providing solutions to industries and society Establish contemporary facilities for providing practical learning experience. PROGRAMME DETAILS Programme Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will take up careers in Mechanical Engineering fields like Manufacturing, Design, Thermal and involve in carrying out mechanical engineering products. PEO2: Graduates will engage in a post graduate program in the field of Engineering Design leading to academic and research careers. PEO3: Graduates will take up entrepreneurship as a career. Programme Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Programme Specific Outcomes PSO1: Apply contemporary approaches in the field of manufacturing and design. PSO2: Apply concepts and approaches for improving the productivity in a professional working environment. All Rights Reserved. Dr.T.Ramakrishnan M.E., PhD Areas of Specialization Bio-Composites, Composite Materials, Polymer Matrix Composites, Natural Fiber Reinforced Composites. Dr. Ramakrishnan holds a PhD in Polymer composites from Anna University, Chennai. He is recognized as an Anna University Supervisor and presently guiding 6 research scholars. Actively involved as Co-PI in Advanced Material Processing and Testing Research Center funded by Department of Science and Technology under FIST scheme. He has 20 + quality publications to his credit and is an active editor and reviewer in reputed journals. He has received the Best Researcher Award and recognition for the best paper from Sri Eshwar College of Engineering for two consecutive years. Recently, he received the Top 5% Researchers Award and the Best Researchers Award in SECE during the Annual Day Function 2024. Dr.S.Venkatesh M.E., PhD., PDF D.O.J : 	18.06.2014 Areas of Specialization Particle Technology, CFD, Mulitphase Flow, Turbomachinery, Optimization, Emission Control Equipment Design. Dr. Venkatesh is a Post Doctorate with specialization in Particle Technology and Computational Fluid Dynamics. He is recognized as an Anna University supervisor guiding four research scholars. Recently he received a grant of 18.3 lakh grant from the SERB-TARE scheme and is a Co-PI in DST FIST funding of 59 Lakhs. He has published more than 27 articles in SCI and Scopus-indexed journals and published two books. He is also an active editor and reviewer in many reputed SCI journals. He has received an outstanding reviewer award from Journal of Aerosol Science and an recipient of top 5% researcher award from Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. Dr.N.K.Millerjothi M.E., PhD D.O.J : 	04.04.2022 Areas of Specialization Thermo-fluid Engineering, Energy Conservation Audit, Energy Management, Renewable Energy systems, Alternative fuels Dr. Millerjothi holds a PhD in alternative fuels and is an Anna University recognized supervisor guiding one scholar. He has 25 years of academic experience in Mechanical Engineering, and 6 years of industrial experience both in India and abroad. He is the Principal Investigator for energy consultancy projects in around 35 industries. He has 40 research articles in peer-reviewed journals to his credit and has 1 patent granted and 5 patents published. He has received research funding from Germany worth $10,500 and CSIR funding for organizing international conferences. He has participated in over 15 national and international seminars, attended around 25 workshops,12 training programs and served as a peer reviewer for over 5 international conferences. He has also evaluated more than 8 PhD theses as a foreign examiner and 3 PhD theses as an Indian examiner. He holds membership to 6 professional bodies in India and abroad. Dr.P.Ganeshan M.E., PhD., M.B.A D.O.J : 10.12.2021 Areas of Specialization Composite Material for Engineering Applications, Additive Manufacturing Dr. Ganeshan holds a PhD in Mechanical Engineering and is an Anna University recognized supervisor guiding 10 scholars. He has more than 15.6 years of experience in teaching, research, and industry. He has published 102 research articles in peer reviewed Journals and has 10 patents published with 3 patents granted. He has participated in 12 International and National conferences. He is an active member in various professional bodies. Dr.G.Gokilakrishnan M.E., PhD D.O.J : 04.06.2010 Areas of Specialization Materials and Manufacturing Dr. Gokilakrishnan holds a PhD from Anna University, Chennai and has more than two decades of experience in technical education. He is a Co-PI for DST-FIST grant of 59 Lakhs and spearheaded consultancy worth ten lakhs. He has received project grants worth of Rs. 1,70,000 from IE India. He is the recipient of Innovative Professional Award from Society of Professional Engineers India during the year 2016. He has published 21 papers in Scopus and SCI journals. He is also a member of ISTE, IWS and IE (India) and special invitee of Coimbatore Productivity Council (CPC). He has also authored a textbook on Engineering Graphics. Dr.B.Sugumaran M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 23.06.2014 Areas of Specialization Composite Materials, Concrete Technology Dr. Sugumaran holds a PhD in Fiber Reinforced Self Compacting Concrete from Anna University, Chennai.  He is having 15 years of experience in academic teaching, consultancy and research works. He also serves as Deputy Controller of Examination, Planning & Development Officer in Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. Dr. S. Ganeshkumar M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 21.07.2010 Areas of Specialization Smart Manufacturing, Tool condition Monitoring, Artificial Intelligence & Robotics Dr. S. Ganeshkumar holds a PhD in Tool Condition Monitoring from Anna University, Chennai.  He has 3 years of industrial experience and 14 years of teaching experience. He has authored 5 books, published 5 patents, 5 book chapters, and more than 30 research articles in various international journals. He is the mentor for the Centre of Excellence – Artificial Intelligence and Robotics, where he has guided students in autonomous mobile robots and automation. He is guiding research scholar in autonomous pathfinding and navigation for autonomous mobile robots. He has delivered many guest lectures in Schools and Colleges on Robotics. Dr.Y.Sureshbabu BE.,ME., PDAuE.,PhD D.O.J : 04.06.2012 Areas of Specialization Automotive –Surface Coating Dr.Y.Suresh Babu holds a PhD in IC Engine Piston Coating from Anna University, Chennai and has 15 years of teaching and 5 years in Automotive Industry experience. As part of his research endeavours, he has published over 20 papers in reputed journals, with 10 papers indexed in SCI and Scopus. In 2024, he received the IGEN Sustainability Champions Award from the Institute of Green Engineers. He mentored a team and developed an, E-Cycle, E-MUV and E-Bike, incorporating a gearbox as a technical specialty. To stay updated with industry standards, he underwent two months of training at Messer Cutting Systems Limited in 2019. Dr.V.Naveenprabhu M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 	15.07.2015 Areas of Specialization Energy - Heat Transfer Dr. V. Naveenprabhu holds a PhD in Heat Transfer from Anna University, Chennai and has 9 years of teaching experience. As part of his research endeavors, he has published over 20 papers in reputed journals, with 10 papers indexed in SCI and Scopus. In 2018, he received the Green 9 Energy Research Initiative Award from Sri Ramakrishna Engineering College, Perambalur. He mentored a team and developed an E-bike incorporating a gearbox as a technical specialty. To stay updated with industry standards, he underwent two months of training at Messer Cutting Systems Limited in 2018 and a three-month faculty internship at Thermax Limited in 2023. Dr.Bipin Kumar Singh M.Tech, Ph.D D.O.J : 19.04.2022 Areas of Specialization Manufacturing, Statistical Modeling & Optimization, Digital Twin, Material Science and Engineering, Advanced Ceramics, Self-Lubricating Ceramics, Tribology, Nano-materials, Additive Manufacturing. Dr. Bipin Kumar Singh holds a PhD in Manufacturing Engineering & Ceramics Composites from NIT Durgapur, West Bengal, India. He completed his M. Tech in Mining & Machinery Engineering from IIT (ISM) Dhanbad and B. Tech in Mechanical Engineering from Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University Maharashtra. He has 5 years of research experience at CSIR-Central Mechanical Research Institute. He was a recipient of the CSIR-SRF Scholarship for Doctoral Study and presently he is one of the Co-PI in DST FIST funding of 59 Lakhs. He is He published more than 57 research papers in reputed journals and conferences along with 7 patents & 1 copyright. Dr.Amit Kumar M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 11.04.2022 Areas of Specialization Thermal  and Fluid Engineering, Heat Transfer, Solar Energy. RAC, Nano-fluid, PCM Dr. Amit Kumar holds a PhD from National Institute of Technology, Durgapur, India. He has 7 plus years of experience holding different projects, academic and research responsibilities in different organizations. He has completed his research in Thermo-hydraulic Performance Enhancement of Solar Air Heater Using Winglet Type Vortex Generator over Absorber Plate at the National Institute of Technology, Durgapur. He has authored several scientific articles in high impact journals. He published more than Thirty (30) Journal papers (SCI) in highly reputed journals. Dr.K.Sathish M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 21.06.2013 Areas of Specialization Fluid Flow analysis, CAD/CAM, Design Optimization Dr. Sathish holds a PhD in Shape and Size Optimization from Anna University, Chennai and has 11 years of teaching experience. He has certifications at Associate level in Solid Works and Solid Edge. He is also an expert in CFD analysis and optimization. He also spearheads consultancy activities in design and New Product Development NPD. He also mentored a team and developed an electric ATV for agricultural purposes. Mr.A.Vimal M.E. D.O.J : 15.06.2015 Areas of Specialization Thermal Engineering Mr. Vimal completed his post-graduation in Thermal Engineering from Government College of Technology, Coimbatore. Currently he is pursuing his research in hydrodynamic behavior and separation performance of the multi hydro cyclone through CFD and experimental approach. He has 9 years of teaching experience. He is actively involved in placement and internship activities for the department. Mr.S.Gokul M.E. (Ph.D.) D.O.J : 01.06.2017 Areas of Specialization Engineering Design, Machine Design and Vibrations, Autonomous Vehicle, Smart Manufacturing, 
Industrial Robotics & Expert Systems Mr. Gokul is a post-graduate in Engineering Design and currently pursuing his research in Autonomous Vehicle. He has 10 years of teaching experience. He currently serves as an Assistant Controller of Examinations. He is also recipient of Best Mentor award and Best Teacher award in Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. His ability to lead high-level competitions influences students’ lives and society at large. He has undertaken various certification courses including Six Sigma (Green Belt certification), Advanced Manufacturing technologies and Digital skills. Mr.R.Vivek M.E. (Ph.D.) D.O.J : 19.06.2017 Areas of Specialization Manufacturing Engineering Mr. Vivek is a post-graduate in Manufacturing Engineering with over 8 years of experience in academia. Currently he is pursuing his research in Computational Fluid Dynamics.  He is a lifetime member of ISTE and contributed 7 papers in refereed journals. He recently completed his NPTEL Online course on NBA Accreditation for Teachers in Engineering Education and obtained Silver Elite Certification. He is actively involved in establishing relations with industries in terms of internship for the knowledge enrichment for the under graduates. Mr. N. Vishnu Sakaravarthy M.E, M.B.A, (Ph.D) D.O.J : 24.06.2019 Areas of Specialization Industrial Engineering, Entrepreneurship, Innovations, Project Management,
Operations Management, Manufacturing Technology Mr. Vishnu Sakravarthy is a post-graduate in Engineering Design and MBA in Operations and Marketing. Currently he is pursuing his research in Operation Management. Previously he worked as Project management trainee at Roots Industries India PVT LTD – High Precision Engineering Division, Coimbatore for a period of two years. He has 5 years of teaching experience to his credit. He also acted as resource person and evaluator for more than 40 programs related to Innovation, Startup and Entrepreneurship in reputed Institutions. He is also acting as Mentor for Entrepreneurship and startups in Meity Startup Hub, Micro Mentors, AIM Mentor of Change and Master trainer in Entrepreneurship Development Innovation Institute, Tamil Nadu. He is also an active Innovation Ambassador since 2020. He is one of the co-principal Investigator for DST -NIMAT project Mr.S.Gowtham M.E. D.O.J : 01.05.2021 Areas of Specialization Design, Composite Materials, Additive Manufacturing Mr. Gowtham is a post-graduate in Engineering Design and currently pursuing his research in Composite Materials. He has 3 years of teaching and 2 years of industry experience. He has published 5 research articles. He is a Certified Designer of Dassault Systems – SolidWorks, Siemens – Solid Edge, Autodesk – AutoCAD & Fusion 360. He is an active member of ISTE and IAENG. He has mentored 25+ teams to participate and achieve in AAKRUTI Global level Design Competition in 2 consecutive years. Dr.A.Sivakami M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 03.05.2023 Areas of Specialization Nanomaterials: Electrochemical sensors, Supercapacitors, DSSCs & LDSS Dr. A. Sivakami is currently working as an Associate Professor in the Department of Physics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering since May 2023. She has over 11 years of teaching experience, having served in various academic positions including Lecturer, Assistant Professor, and Associate Professor. Dr. Sivakami regularly serves as a reviewer for reputed journals from Elsevier (such as Journal of Molecular Structure, Materials Today: Proceedings, Obesity Medicine, Internet of Things), Springer (including Topics in Catalysis, Journal of Materials Science: Materials in Electronics, Journal of Materials Science), and RSC Advances.She was recognized as a research supervisor by Anna University, Chennai, in 2016, and is currently guiding one full- time research scholar in the field of supercapacitors. Dr.V.Arul M.Sc., Ph.D D.O.J : 01.09.2022 Areas of Specialization Nanochemistry, Material Science, Catalysis, Bio-imaging, Electrochemistry, Energy Storage Dr. V. Arul is a dedicated materials scientist and academic leader with extensive experience in advanced functional nanomaterials for environmental, biomedical, and energy applications. He received his M.Sc. (2011) and Ph.D. (2020) from The Gandhigram Rural Institute (Deemed to be University). With over 7 years of teaching experience and 12 years of research experience , Dr. Arul has built a strong academic and research portfolio. He has authored 25+ SCI-indexed publications in reputed international journals, contributed three book chapters in the Springer book series , and holds four patents (three in 2024 and one in 2025), reflecting his consistent innovation and research productivity. His core research focuses on the synthesis of highly fluorescent carbon dots an eco-friendly catalyst for environmental remediation, through detoxification industrial waste water from organic dyes and pollutants. He has also explored their fluorescent staining capabilities for cancer cell detection through bio-imaging applications , bridging materials science with biomedical research. Currently, his research extends to the design and development of luminescent sensors for biomolecules, metal ions, and small molecules, emphasizing high sensitivity and selectivity. In addition, he is actively working on energy storage and conversion technologies , including supercapacitors and electrocatalytic water splitting (HER and OER) , utilizing green carbon quantum dots and metal-based nanocomposites. Beyond research, Dr. Arul plays significant academic administrative roles at SECE. He presently serves as the Institute-level IQAC Coordinator for Research, Extension & Outreach and as an Internal Auditor , supporting institutional quality initiatives and NAAC/NBA accreditation processes . Since June 2025, he has also taken on additional leadership responsibilities as the Overall Event In-charge, ERP Coordinator, and Department Research Head , contributing strategically to academic excellence and institutional development. Dr. Arul’s work reflects a strong commitment to sustainable materials innovation, interdisciplinary collaboration, and academic leadership aligned with global scientific and societal needs. Dr.R.Sivagurusundar MSc.Ph.D. NET, GATE, IIPP (Taiwan) Areas of Specialization Physical chemistry, environmental chemistry,water research Dr. R. Dr.R.Sree Parimala M.Sc.,M.Phil.,PGDCA.,HDCA., Ph.D., D.O.J : 26.06.2018 Areas of Specialization Queueing models Dr. R.Sree Parimala, M.Sc., M.Phil., PGDCA.,HDCA.,Ph.D. is employed with Sri Eshwar College of Engineering in Coimbatore as an Associate Professor in department of Mathematics. Own more than 19 years of experience in teaching.. She holds a doctorate in Queueing models and its applications from Anna University, Chennai. She has contributed significantly to academia, with over 14 published papers in esteemed scholarly journals, two patents, authored a book titled “Engineering Mathematics – II,” and published chapters in “Asian Book of Records”, “Multi-disciplinary subjects for research”. She completed 13 online courses from various foreign colleges on Coursera and life memberships in professional bodies. She addressed as a resource person in various colleges and Board of studies member for CIET, Coimbatore. Dr.B.Vennila M.Sc., B.Ed., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 07.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Queueing theory, Stochastic Processes, Neutrosophic logic Dr. B. Vennila has 12 years of teaching experience and 10 years of research experience. She cleared Tamilnadu State Eligibility Test(TNSET) in the year 2017. She awarded Ph.D in the year 2019. She has published more than 13 research articles and 4 book chapters in the field of Queueing theory. She has attended various national and international conferences, workshops, FDPs. She has presented more than 5 papers in international conferences. She received best book chapter award in the year 2021. Dr.C.Gokila M.Sc.,Ph.D D.O.J : 17.06.2022 Areas of Specialization Mathematical Biology, Nonlinear Dynamics, Stochastic Differential Equations She completed a Bachelor of Science at Nirmala College for Women in 2014. Also, she was selected for the postgraduate merit scholarship for the university rank holder under UGC, New Delhi. In 2016, she completed a Master of Science at Bharathiar University, Coimbatore. She was awarded a JRF & SRF -INSPIRE Fellow under DST, New Delhi. Dr. Gokila achieved her Doctoral degree at Periyar University, Salem in 2022. Moreover, she cleared the State Eligibility Test (SET) for a lectureship in 2018. She has published nine papers in SCI and Scopus. She was awarded Research Supervisor Recognition from Anna University, Chennai, in 2023 based on her credit. Dr.R.Saranya M.Sc.,Ph.D D.O.J : 01.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Automata theory, Algebraic Graph Thoery Dr. R. Saranya received her Bachelor’s in PSGR Krishnammal College for Women, Coimbatore in the year 2014 and At 2016 she received her Master’s degree in Presidency College, Chennai. She was awarded her Doctor of Philosophy in Mathematics in 2022 at Anna University, Chennai. Her title of the Ph.D thesis is “A Study on Graph Cellular Automata using Fuzzy Set Theory and Rough Set Theory” which plays a vital role in real-world phenomena. Her research interests also include Graph theory and Soft set theory but are not limited to. She acted as a resource person in FDP which is organized by the AICTE-Skill and Personality Development Centre and Department of Mathematics during the year 2023. She has published 3 Scopus indexed, 2 woS and 1 SCIE journal. She also acted as a reviewer for various reputed journals. Dr.D.Prasantha Bharathi M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 11.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Differential Equations Dr. Prasantha Bharathi Dhandapani, also known as Dr. D. Prasantha Bharathi, is an Assistant Professor (Sl. Gr) of Mathematics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. He is a member of the teaching faculty of the Center for Research and Development, Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. His research interests lie in Differential Equations, Number Theory, Epidemic Modeling, and Fuzzy Theory and Applications. He earned his BSc, MPhil, and Ph.D. in Mathematics from Sri Ramakrishna Mission Vidyalaya College of Arts and Science. After his undergraduate studies, he did his MSc in Mathematics at CMS College of Science and Commerce; both institutions are autonomous and affiliated with Bharathiar University, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. He has contributed 37 published papers and one book chapter, of which 16 are in SCIE and 2 in ESCI; 11 have indexed entries in Scopus and 7 in peer-reviewed journals. In addition, he has presented his findings at two international conferences and is a reviewer for many journals indexed in both SCseminars, from Vedic Mathematics to motivational talks and career guidaI and Scopus. Further, he delivered many invited talks, lectures, and nce for mathematics graduates at various institutions. More importantly, very recently, at the International Conference on Science & Humanities: Building Science and Mechanical Engineering, ICSBM-2024, he chaired a session. Dr.M.P.Sindhu M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 07.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Topology, Graph Theory Dr. M. P. Sindhu have completed her B.Sc degree in Arulmigu Palaniandavar Arts College for Women, Palani under Mother Teresa Women’s University, Kodaikanal during 2010-2013. She have finished her M.Sc degree in Sri G.V.G. Visalakshi College for Women, Udumalpet under Bharathiar University, Coimbatore during 2013-2015. Secured First class with distinction in both my B.Sc and M.Sc degrees with no arrear was highly notable. She have finished her M.Phil degrees in Sri G.V.G. Visalakshi College for Women, Udumalpet under Bharathiar University, Coimbatore during 2015-2017. During her M.Phil presented a paper in a National level Seminar and secured First prize in 2017. Accomplished her Ph.D degree in Annamalai University, Chidamparam during 2017-2022 and Commended by external examiners. Authored over 9 research papers published in Scopus, Web of Science and UGC CARE journals. Published a Book in International level publication LAP LAMBERT Academic Publishing in 2022. Participated in several number of International level FDPs, National Level Seminars/Webinars. Coordinated few events organized in Department level. Completed many Online Courses organized by SWAYAM NPTEL got certificate with ELITE & SILVER. Got interested in Coding and participated in recent trends of International level FDPs and Online Courses regarding Data Science, R-Programming, Python, etc., Got International level certificate by CodeChef on Learn Python. Dr.M.Tamilarasi M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 07.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Control theory and Differential Equations Dr. Tamilarasi Mathivanan is currently employed as an Assistant Professor of Mathematics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore. She has accumulated six years of teaching experience. Dr. Tamilarasi holds a Doctorate under under the guidance of Dr. B. Radhakrishnan, Assistant Professor, Mathematics, from PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore, Anna University. Her educational background also includes an M.Phil. from Madras Institute of Technology, Chennai, Anna University. She obtained her bachelor’s and master’s degrees in Mathematics from GVG Visalakshi College for Women, Udumalpet, Bharathiar University. Dr. Tamilarasi’s research endeavors were supported by the Tamilnadu State Council for Science and Technology under the project TNSCST/RFRS/VR/15/2018-19. Additionally, she successfully completed the Graduate Aptitude Test for Engineering (GATE) conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) in 2012. She has made significant contributions to her research field, having published seven research articles in reputable SCI/SCOPUS indexed journals. Furthermore, she has authored a book chapter published by LAMBERT publishing. Dr.J.Gowri M.Sc., B. Ed.,M.Phil D.O.J : 04.06.2012 Areas of Specialization Difference Equations Ms. J. Gowri has 13 years of teaching experience. She has published 3 research articles in scopus indexed journals. She has attended various international conferences, workshops, FDPs. She has completed a Bachelor of Science at Nallamuthu Gounder Mahalingam college in 2006. In 2008,  completed  Master of science at Nallamuthu Gounder Mahalingam college . In 2010, She has completed Master of Philosophy Nallamuthu Gounder Mahalingam college . Dr.S.Vinnarasi M.Sc.,M.Phil.,Ph.D.,PGDOR Areas of Specialization Topology Dr. S. Vinnarasi, M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D., PGDOR, is a distinguished academician specializing in Topology, a core domain of pure mathematics. With extensive expertise in abstract mathematical structures and continuity theory, her research focuses on advanced topological spaces and their theoretical applications. She has a strong academic background supported by her postgraduate and doctoral qualifications. Dr. Vinnarasi is actively engaged in teaching, research, and mentoring students in higher mathematics. Her scholarly interests include general topology, algebraic topology, and related analytical frameworks. Ms.R.Hemalatha M.Sc., M.Phil D.O.J : 10.07.2013 Areas of Specialization Graph Theory Ms. R. Hemalatha has an impressive educational and professional background. Her tenure in the field of education spans over 18 years and 5 months, showcasing her dedication and commitment. With over 16 years and 7 months of experience in engineering colleges, she currently serves as an assistant professor (Sl. grade) in mathematics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore. Previously, she held a similar role at Dr. Mahalingam College of Engineering, Pollachi for 5 years and 6 months. Her journey in education began as a PG Teacher in Maths at SRV Higher Secondary School, Rasipuram where she dedicated 2 years to shaping young minds. Her academic journey continues with a pursuit of a Ph.D. in Mathematics at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Coimbatore, under  the guidance of  Dr. K. Somasundaram, Chairperson of the Department of Mathematics, represents a focused exploration in the field of Graph Theory. This new endeavour adds another layer to her already impressive educational background and  professional experience. Her academic pursuits include M.Phil. in Mathematics with a focus on fluid dynamics, completed in 2008, and M.Sc. in Mathematics from L.R.G. Govt College for Woman in Tirupur in 2006. She laid the foundation for her career with B.Sc. in Mathematics  from  N.G.M. College, Pollachi, in 2004.Beyond her academic qualifications, she actively engages in professional development by participating in Faculty Development Programs (FDPs) and workshops relevant to research and academics. She has also contributed to the academic community by presenting research papers at both International and National conferences. Dr.A.Revathy M.Sc., M.Phil D.O.J : 18.06.2009 Areas of Specialization Fuzzy topology and fuzzy decision making Ms. Revathy Aruchsamy is working as an Assistant Professor (Sl. Gr) of Mathematics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India since 2009. She has 17 years of teaching experience. Currently, she is pursuing Ph.D degree at Bharathiar University. She completed her B.Sc., M.Sc., and M.Phil. in mathematics in 2002, 2005, and 2007 at Bharathiar University affiliated colleges also she cleared SET in the year 2017. Her areas of research include Fuzzy Topology and Fuzzy Multi Criterion Decision Making. She has published six papers in which two are SCI indexed, one is ESCI indexed ant two are SOPUS in indexed conference journals. Ms.K.Sivaranjani M.Sc.,M.Phil D.O.J : 07.06.2010 Areas of Specialization Graph Theory Ms.K.Sivaranjani is currently employed as an Assistant Professor (Sl.Gr.) of Mathematics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore, with 14 years of experience. Also, she worked as a lecturer at R.V.S. College of Engineering and Technology, Dindigul, with 2 years and 3 months of experience. She is pursuing her doctorate at Sree Saraswathy Thiyagaraja College, Pollachi, under the guidance of Dr. O.V. Shanmuga Sundaram, PG HOD, Department of Mathematics, Sree Saraswathy Thiyagaraja College. She completed her M.Phil. at N.G.M. College, Pollachi, her M.Sc. degree at Sri GVG Visalakshi College for Women, Udumalpet, and her B.Sc. degree at Government Arts College, Udumalpet. She has participated in FDPs and conferences relevant to research and academics and received the Best Tutor Award for the I-Year Batch 2019-20 in SECE. Ms.V.Deepa M.Sc., M.Phil D.O.J : 	01.05.2011 Areas of Specialization Topology Ms.V.Deepa is currently employed as an Assistant Professor (Sl.Gr.) of Mathematics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore, with 13 years of experience. Also, she worked as a lecturer at Bannariamman Institute of Technonogy, Sathyamangalam, with 2 years and 2 months. She is pursuing her doctorate at Kongunadu Arts and Science, Coimbatore, under the guidance of Dr. V.Kokilavani, PG HOD, Department of Mathematics, Kongunadu Arts and Science, Coimbatore. She has participated in FDPs and conferences relevant to research and academics. Ms.M.M.Shalini M.Sc.,M.Phil.,PGDCA D.O.J : 11.06.2012 Areas of Specialization Stochastic Differential Equation Ms. M. M. Shalini is presently serving as an Assistant Professor (Sl. Gr) of Mathematics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore boasting 11 years and 10 months of experience, she brings a wealth of knowledge to her role. Prior to this, she held a position as an Assistant Professor at P.K.R Arts College for Women, Gobichettipalayam, accumulating 1 year and 9 months of experience. She is currently pursuing her doctoral studies at PSG College of Arts and Science, Coimbatore, under the guidance of Dr. K. Banupriya, the Head of the Department of Mathematics with Computer Application at PSG College of Arts and Science, Coimbatore. Ms. Shalini earned her M.Phil. degree from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore. She completed her bachelor’s and master’s degrees from Providence College for Women, Coonoor. Moreover, she successfully cleared the Tamil Nadu State Eligibility Test (TNSET) for Assistant Professor conducted by the Government of Tamil Nadu in 2017. She has participated in FDPs and conferences relevant to research and academics. She has begun making valuable contributions to her research field through her publications. Ms.N.Akiladevi M.Sc., M.Phil D.O.J : 10.07.2013 Areas of Specialization Topology She completed the Bachelor’s degree in 2004, Master’s degree in 2007 and M.Phil., in 2008 in NGM College affiliated to Bharathiar university. Cleared Tamilnadu State Level Eligibility Test in 2017.Currently pursuing Ph. D., in the field of Topology under Bharathiar university. Published two  papers in IEEE scopus indexed conference. Worked as Assistant Professor for 5 years in Dr. Mahalingam college of engineering. Has a total teaching experience of 16 years. COMMITTED. RESEARCH ORIENTED. CENTRE FOR RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT Centre for Research and Development plays a pivotal role as a catalyst for academic advancement and societal progress. By fostering a vibrant research culture, it encourages interdisciplinary collaboration, generates new knowledge, and addresses pressing societal challenges. By promoting innovation, it not only enriches the quality of education but also drives economic growth by facilitating the translation of research outcomes into practical applications. Leveraging partnerships with industry, government agencies and other academic institutions, the center maximizes its impact, contributing significantly to the advancement of knowledge and the socio-economic development of communities. RESEARCH INSTITUTE RECOGNITION BY ANNA UNIVERSITY 1 CRORE+ RESEARCH INCENTIVES 4 TOP 2% SCIENTISTS OF THE WORLD @ SRI ESHWAR WORLD CLASS RESEARCH FACILITIES LEADERSHIP Dr. G. Karuppusami Dean – Research & Outreach Know more Dr. H. Anandakumar Associate Dean – Research Know more RESEARCH ADVISORY BOARD The Research Advisory board comprises senior researchers from some of the best institutions in India. They provide guidance for the overall direction of our R&D initiatives and timely inputs to our research activities and initiatives. Dr.P.Santhi Thilagam Professor and Head, Department of Computer Science and Engineering
National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Mangalore, Karnataka, India Dr.S.Karunanidhi Director, CSL,RCI-Senior Scientist, DRDO(Hyderabad), India Dr.Anand Nayyar Professor, Scientist, Vice-Chairman (Research), Duy Tan University, Vietnam Dr.M.Santhakumar Dean, Industry collaboration and sponsored research, IIT Palakkad, Kerala, India RESEARCH ETHICS COMMITTEE Sri Eshwar College of Engineering is dedicated to promoting and maintaining high standards of integrity in academic research. Committed to fostering a culture of honesty and transparency, the institution prioritizes academic freedom and innovative thinking while striving to eliminate all forms of academic fraud, including plagiarism. SECE emphasizes the importance of original thought and expression, ensuring these standards through a rigorous review process. Faculty, staff and students are expected to adhere to the high ethical standards outlined in the Ethics and Values Policy of SECE, reinforcing the college’s commitment to academic honour and integrity. KNOW MORE 0 + SCOPUS PUBLICATION 0 + PATENTS PUBLISHED 0 + AU RESEARCH SUPERVISORS 0 Cr+ SEED FUND GRANTS 0 Cr+ RESEARCH FUNDS ACADEMIC RESEARCH Quality Research Outcome is beneficial for the industry, region and nation. Sharing of knowledge especially theoretical and practical findings of research through various platforms enhances the quality of research. Researchers at Sri Eshwar possess great research acumen, leading to publications in SCI, WoS, Scopus, Indexed Journals and Filing of patents. Research Publications & Book Chapters Intellectual Property Rights (ipr) AU approved research institute SPONSORED RESEARCH Sri Eshwar encourages members of faculty to seek support and secure research funds from industry and various funding agencies such as DST, AICTE, TNSCST, MHRD, CSIR, DRDO, ISTE, Industry etc to develop research facility and to carry out research projects. The Institute also supports by sponsoring seed fund to the departments to set up research laboratories and promote research. Research Grants seed fund consultancy funding ADVANCED RESEARCH CENTRES Sri Eshwar Advanced Research Centre is fully committed to the advancement of research and development across a wide range of disciplines. Our 9 Advance Research Centres promotes multidisciplinary research in engineering and technology. Through the Advanced Research Centres, funded research projects, publication of research articles, commercialization of patents, short term training programs and development programs for faculty and students are conducted. Our multi-disciplinary approach and collaboration with industry partners, government agencies and academia enable us to address complex challenges and make significant contributions to various fields. DRDO sponsored  Centre for Quantum Computing and Nanotechnology DST Sponsored Centre For Advanced Materials And Testing Centre for Human-Centric AI and Augmented Intelligence Centre for Next-Generation Semiconductor and Microelectronics Technologies Centre for Blockchain, Cybersecurity and Secure Systems Centre for Future Networks and Digital Twin Technologies Centre for Green Technologies and Sustainability Centre for Computational Imaging and Machine Vision Systems Centre for Advanced Signal Processing and Translational Biomedical Engineering RESEARCH FACILITIES Sri Eshwar is committed to investing in high quality research facilities that enhance the quality of research and bring out the best research outcomes. KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCES Sri Eshwar is proud to host the following international conferences every year, to bring together globally renowned research professionals to share knowledge and collaborate for high quality research outcomes. These conferences also aim at exhibiting the technical expertise of budding technocrats, research scholars and representatives from academia and industry. International Conference on Advanced Computing and Communication Systems Series International Conference on Sustainable Materials and Technologies Series International Conference on Intelligent Computing and Smart Communication Systems Series RESEARCH EVENTS We host a vibrant array of research events designed to foster collaboration, knowledge exchange and innovation within our academic community. Our events provide valuable opportunities for networking, learning and sharing insights. KNOW MORE INSTITUTIONAL RESEARCH COMMITTEE Research Committee at Sri Eshwar is established to monitor the research initiatives and activities of the Institute. The committee consists of Deans, HoDs and Department Research Coordinators. To motivate and develop research culture among faculty and students. To establish a Research Centre in every department. The committee encourages the faculty members to enroll for PhD. programmes in their fields of interest. To motivate the faculty to take up research and consultancy projects. To encourage submission of proposals to the funding agencies for carrying out research projects and conducting national/International Conferences, Seminars, Faculty Development Programmes. To arrange timeline presentation of Research Scholars and provide assistance wherever required. To assist faculty and students in filing patent applications. To motivate faculty and students to publish papers in internationally reputed journals and in collaboration with industry experts. RESEARCH COORDINATORS Dr. T. Ramakrishnan , Professor, Mech Dr. P. Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS 800+ Patents Published 45+ Patents Granted 250+ Student Patents Published 25L+ Patent Incentives PATENTS & COPYRIGHTS At Sri Eshwar, we provide expert guidance on patents and copyrights to protect valuable ideas as intellectual property. Our Intellectual Property Rights team assists faculty and students in navigating the patent application process for their inventions, including conducting novelty searches, drafting applications, and managing submissions. We also assist in the registration of copyrights to protect original research works. Our team follow all legal requirements and standards. The dedicated IPR cell at Sri Eshwar is committed to protecting our innovations and creative works, enabling our community to focus on advancing their research and development efforts. COMMITTED. RESEARCH ORIENTED. CENTRE FOR RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT Centre for Research and Development plays a pivotal role as a catalyst for academic advancement and societal progress. By fostering a vibrant research culture, it encourages interdisciplinary collaboration, generates new knowledge, and addresses pressing societal challenges. By promoting innovation, it not only enriches the quality of education but also drives economic growth by facilitating the translation of research outcomes into practical applications. Leveraging partnerships with industry, government agencies and other academic institutions, the center maximizes its impact, contributing significantly to the advancement of knowledge and the socio-economic development of communities. RESEARCH INSTITUTE RECOGNITION BY ANNA UNIVERSITY 1 CRORE+ RESEARCH INCENTIVES 4 TOP 2% SCIENTISTS OF THE WORLD @ SRI ESHWAR WORLD CLASS RESEARCH FACILITIES LEADERSHIP Dr. G. Karuppusami Dean – Research & Outreach Know more Dr. H. Anandakumar Associate Dean – Research Know more RESEARCH ADVISORY BOARD The Research Advisory board comprises senior researchers from some of the best institutions in India. They provide guidance for the overall direction of our R&D initiatives and timely inputs to our research activities and initiatives. Dr.P.Santhi Thilagam Professor and Head, Department of Computer Science and Engineering
National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Mangalore, Karnataka, India Dr.S.Karunanidhi Director, CSL,RCI-Senior Scientist, DRDO(Hyderabad), India Dr.Anand Nayyar Professor, Scientist, Vice-Chairman (Research), Duy Tan University, Vietnam Dr.M.Santhakumar Dean, Industry collaboration and sponsored research, IIT Palakkad, Kerala, India RESEARCH ETHICS COMMITTEE Sri Eshwar College of Engineering is dedicated to promoting and maintaining high standards of integrity in academic research. Committed to fostering a culture of honesty and transparency, the institution prioritizes academic freedom and innovative thinking while striving to eliminate all forms of academic fraud, including plagiarism. SECE emphasizes the importance of original thought and expression, ensuring these standards through a rigorous review process. Faculty, staff and students are expected to adhere to the high ethical standards outlined in the Ethics and Values Policy of SECE, reinforcing the college’s commitment to academic honour and integrity. Sharing of knowledge especially theoretical and practical findings of research through various platforms enhances the quality of research. Researchers at Sri Eshwar possess great research acumen, leading to publications in SCI, WoS, Scopus, Indexed Journals and Filing of patents. The Institute also supports by sponsoring seed fund to the departments to set up research laboratories and promote research. Research Grants seed fund consultancy funding ADVANCED RESEARCH CENTRES Sri Eshwar Advanced Research Centre is fully committed to the advancement of research and development across a wide range of disciplines. Our 9 Advance Research Centres promotes multidisciplinary research in engineering and technology. Through the Advanced Research Centres, funded research projects, publication of research articles, commercialization of patents, short term training programs and development programs for faculty and students are conducted. Our multi-disciplinary approach and collaboration with industry partners, government agencies and academia enable us to address complex challenges and make significant contributions to various fields. KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCES Sri Eshwar is proud to host the following international conferences every year, to bring together globally renowned research professionals to share knowledge and collaborate for high quality research outcomes. These conferences also aim at exhibiting the technical expertise of budding technocrats, research scholars and representatives from academia and industry. International Conference on Advanced Computing and Communication Systems Series International Conference on Sustainable Materials and Technologies Series International Conference on Intelligent Computing and Smart Communication Systems Series RESEARCH EVENTS We host a vibrant array of research events designed to foster collaboration, knowledge exchange and innovation within our academic community. Our events provide valuable opportunities for networking, learning and sharing insights. The committee consists of Deans, HoDs and Department Research Coordinators. To motivate and develop research culture among faculty and students. To establish a Research Centre in every department. The committee encourages the faculty members to enroll for PhD. programmes in their fields of interest. To motivate the faculty to take up research and consultancy projects. To encourage submission of proposals to the funding agencies for carrying out research projects and conducting national/International Conferences, Seminars, Faculty Development Programmes. To arrange timeline presentation of Research Scholars and provide assistance wherever required. To assist faculty and students in filing patent applications. INNOVATE. INCUBATE CENTRE FOR INNOVATION THE LAUNCHPAD FOR STUDENT INNOVATORS Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation is a hub for students from different streams of specialization to come together to collectively build products through active collaboration and creative thinking using emerging technologies. With the state of art facilities and excellent mentorship, we are excited about nurturing young innovators who can push the boundaries of innovation and make a great impact in the the world. Who knows! We may well be nurturing the next biggest innovator! 25+ SUMMER INTERNSHIPS IN IIT, NIT, CSIR 9 STARTUPS ACCELERATED THROUGH IGNITE 18 CoEs ACROSS INDUSTRY VERTICALS TO FOSTER INNOVATION 100+
HACKATHON WINS IN 1 YEAR LEADERSHIP Dr.Maheswari Raja Dean – Innovation Know more INNOVATION ADVISORY BOARD In order to be successful in our mission and to create a top-notch innovative ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, we actively consult and engage with the following Advisory board members from prestigious institutions. Their periodic guidance and help is valuable to us and our students. Mr.Jaiber John Director, Revobots AI Inc, Former Senior Software Architect, Intel Dr.Kannan Moudgalya Head of Application Software Cell and head of the Centre for Distance Engineering Education Programme at IIT Bombay VISION To cultivate a dynamic ecosystem where ideas flourish, technologies advance, and inter disciplinary collaboration thrives for empowering future engineers by promoting innovations, problem solving, sustainable solutions to the real world challenges. MISSION To serve as a platform for innovation by providing state of the art facilities, resources, mentorship, and a collaborative environment where students and researchers can explore, develop, and implement cutting edge technologies. Our mission is to empower future engineers and innovators to create sustainable, impactful solutions, nurturing a culture of creativity and interdisciplinary collaboration. CENTRES OF EXCELLENCE Centres of Excellence(CoE) provides a platform for all department students from 1st year onwards, to gain knowledge on emerging technologies of their choice. Using the skills and knowledge gained here, students form teams with like-minded peers, and solve real world problems, develop products, publish papers, obtain international certifications, participate in Hackathons, bag internship opportunities. CoEs actively involve industry professionals for knowledge sharing and product guidance. Today companies are moving towards skill-based hiring, and CoEs serve as an excellent platform for students to become highly skilled, specialized and certified in their areas of interest and get placed in the companies that match their interest. In short, CoEs is a multi-disciplinary platform for students to stay ahead of the game! Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence and Robotics Centre of Excellence in Data Science Centre of Excellence in  Gen AI Centre of Excellence in  Full Stack & App Development Centre of Excellence in  Cloud Computing Centre of Excellence in  Business Analytics Centre of Excellence in Cyber Security Centre of Excellence in  Gaming and Animation Centre of Excellence in Augmented Reality and Virtual Reality Centre of Excellence in  System on chip Centre of Excellence in  Embedded and IOT Centre of Excellence in Drone Technologies Centre of Excellence in Networking Centre of Excellence in  Electronic Design and Automation Centre of Excellence in  Robotics and Industrial Automation Centre of Excellence in  3D Printing and Reverse Engineering Centre of Excellence in  E-Vehicles Centre of Excellence in  Graphics and Design INSTITUTION INNOVATION COUNCIL (IIC)​ The Institution Innovation Council (IIC) is an initiative by the Ministry of Education to systematically foster a culture of innovation and startup ecosystem into educational institutions. IIC’s role is to engage students and faculty in innovation and entrepreneurship related activities such as ideation, problem solving, proof of concept development, design thinking, IPR, project handling and management at pre-incubation and incubation stage, etc. In order to foster innovative culture and start-up ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, IIC activities such as projects, workshops, hackathons, ideation and brainstorming sessions are carried out. IIC provides a way for students and faculty members to further upskill and empower themselves with innovative thinking and entrepreneurship skills. KNOW MORE HACKATHONS Hackathons are an integral part of the innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar. These exciting events bring together a diverse set of students, to tackle a specific challenge or develop a new product with certain specified themes within a compressed time frame. By participating in hackathons, students gain tremendous exposure, networking opportunities with peers, new perspectives to solve problems, mentorship from senior industry professionals to fine tune their ideas and design, internship opportunities and even early placement opportunities. At Sri Eshwar, winning hackathons has become a habit! In fact it is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Vulnheist Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Hacksmithsv2 Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Black Squad Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Runner up Hack Summit 2024 Presented By Temenos II & III Year EEE Students Runner Up with 50,000 Cash Reward Decentralized Solar Energy Generation Hackathon III Year EEE Students Winners with Cash Rewards Anoka Ideathon 2024 Team ECE (II & III) Runner Up With Cash Reward Cellbot Healthcare Jam 2024 Team Drastic Innovators Standing first among 70 Teams with Cash Reward Hackfest2k24 3rd Year AI&DS Students Grabbed 3rd Place Standing out of 200+ teams IIT's Mint Hackathon Tech Mavericks Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states IIT's Mint Hackathon Team Weavers Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states The Future AI Tech Hackathon 2024 Mohamed Abubakker S & Sanjai L Secured 2nd Runner Up with Cash Reward Idea Ignite Hackthon 3rd Year CSE Students Secured 2nd Position among 2340 Participants Ninjacart AgriTech Hackathon 2024 Team Eshwarites Won cash prize of Rs. 50,000/- UNESCO-India-Africa Hackathon 2022 N.Sudarsan, AI&DS Won cash prize of Rs. 3,00,000/- National Level Hackathon Team ECE 6th Position among 250+ Clans IEEE - PROJECT EXPO 2024 4 Member Team Won 2nd Prize with Cash award BOOTCAMP (Phase  I) INTERNSHIPS In order to give our students a holistic learning experience, we are committed to ensuring our students get the best internship opportunities. We are proud of Eshwarites who shine across the country, with their internships in prestigious institutions including IIT Bombay, CSIR etc. These internships begin as early as second year! PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT A thirst for challenges along with a product mindset is deeply ingrained in Eshwarites. We are proud to showcase some products built from scratch through teamwork and innovative spirit. These products are solutions for real-word problems that have made life easy. Eshwarites never stop their inquisitive thinking and are always looking for the next problem to solve. IGNITE - STARTUP ACCELERATOR GET READY TO TURN YOUR IDEA INTO A MARKETABLE PRODUCT. The state-of-the-art facilities of Ignite, creates an exciting ecosystem for students to collaborate using prototyping labs and a collaborative workspace. Ignite, staying true to its name is the birthplace of many start-ups. The first few years in the life of a start-up is crucial. At Sri Eshwar, we give students the experience of how to convert an idea to a finished product by mentoring them through structured processes, conducting bootcamps and providing the infrastructure required to build the product. We also provide financial support if required, to support the launch of the product. Once the startup is stable and mature,, the young entrepreneurs fly off into their own offices and grow the business further. Sri Eshwar has been the birthplace of many such young entrepreneurs. ENTREPRENEURSHIP Here’s a sneak peak of some Eshwarites who are now flying high as successful entrepreneurs. SKILL DEVELOPMENT Sri Eshwar not only nurtures successful students but also plays a vital role in uplifting the skill levels of the people in the society and upgrading the economy as a whole. At Sri Eshwar, we empower aspiring entrepreneurs with the skills required to establish their businesses. Special skill building programs are conducted for women entrepreneurs to enable them to set up small businesses to support themselves and their families. Sri Eshwar is dedicated to uplifting women of nearby localities by training them with the necessary skills and empowering them to lead their lives as successful entrepreneurs. Through grants received and seed funds sponsored by the Institution, WEDP programmes (Women Entrepreneurship Development Programmes) are conducted by Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation as a way to uplift those women around us.
