INNOVATE. INCUBATE CENTRE FOR INNOVATION THE LAUNCHPAD FOR STUDENT INNOVATORS Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation is a hub for students from different streams of specialization to come together to collectively build products through active collaboration and creative thinking using emerging technologies. With the state of art facilities and excellent mentorship, we are excited about nurturing young innovators who can push the boundaries of innovation and make a great impact in the the world. Who knows! We may well be nurturing the next biggest innovator! 25+ SUMMER INTERNSHIPS IN IIT, NIT, CSIR 9 STARTUPS ACCELERATED THROUGH IGNITE 18 CoEs ACROSS INDUSTRY VERTICALS TO FOSTER INNOVATION 100+
HACKATHON WINS IN 1 YEAR LEADERSHIP Dr.Maheswari Raja Dean – Innovation Know more INNOVATION ADVISORY BOARD In order to be successful in our mission and to create a top-notch innovative ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, we actively consult and engage with the following Advisory board members from prestigious institutions. Their periodic guidance and help is valuable to us and our students. Mr.Jaiber John Director, Revobots AI Inc, Former Senior Software Architect, Intel Dr.Kannan Moudgalya Head of Application Software Cell and head of the Centre for Distance Engineering Education Programme at IIT Bombay VISION To cultivate a dynamic ecosystem where ideas flourish, technologies advance, and inter disciplinary collaboration thrives for empowering future engineers by promoting innovations, problem solving, sustainable solutions to the real world challenges. MISSION To serve as a platform for innovation by providing state of the art facilities, resources, mentorship, and a collaborative environment where students and researchers can explore, develop, and implement cutting edge technologies. Our mission is to empower future engineers and innovators to create sustainable, impactful solutions, nurturing a culture of creativity and interdisciplinary collaboration. CENTRES OF EXCELLENCE Centres of Excellence(CoE) provides a platform for all department students from 1st year onwards, to gain knowledge on emerging technologies of their choice. Using the skills and knowledge gained here, students form teams with like-minded peers, and solve real world problems, develop products, publish papers, obtain international certifications, participate in Hackathons, bag internship opportunities. CoEs actively involve industry professionals for knowledge sharing and product guidance. Today companies are moving towards skill-based hiring, and CoEs serve as an excellent platform for students to become highly skilled, specialized and certified in their areas of interest and get placed in the companies that match their interest. In short, CoEs is a multi-disciplinary platform for students to stay ahead of the game! Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence and Robotics Centre of Excellence in Data Science Centre of Excellence in  Gen AI Centre of Excellence in  Full Stack & App Development Centre of Excellence in  Cloud Computing Centre of Excellence in  Business Analytics Centre of Excellence in Cyber Security Centre of Excellence in  Gaming and Animation Centre of Excellence in Augmented Reality and Virtual Reality Centre of Excellence in  System on chip Centre of Excellence in  Embedded and IOT Centre of Excellence in Drone Technologies Centre of Excellence in Networking Centre of Excellence in  Electronic Design and Automation Centre of Excellence in  Robotics and Industrial Automation Centre of Excellence in  3D Printing and Reverse Engineering Centre of Excellence in  E-Vehicles Centre of Excellence in  Graphics and Design INSTITUTION INNOVATION COUNCIL (IIC)​ The Institution Innovation Council (IIC) is an initiative by the Ministry of Education to systematically foster a culture of innovation and startup ecosystem into educational institutions. IIC’s role is to engage students and faculty in innovation and entrepreneurship related activities such as ideation, problem solving, proof of concept development, design thinking, IPR, project handling and management at pre-incubation and incubation stage, etc. In order to foster innovative culture and start-up ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, IIC activities such as projects, workshops, hackathons, ideation and brainstorming sessions are carried out. IIC provides a way for students and faculty members to further upskill and empower themselves with innovative thinking and entrepreneurship skills. KNOW MORE HACKATHONS Hackathons are an integral part of the innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar. These exciting events bring together a diverse set of students, to tackle a specific challenge or develop a new product with certain specified themes within a compressed time frame. By participating in hackathons, students gain tremendous exposure, networking opportunities with peers, new perspectives to solve problems, mentorship from senior industry professionals to fine tune their ideas and design, internship opportunities and even early placement opportunities. At Sri Eshwar, winning hackathons has become a habit! In fact it is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Vulnheist Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Hacksmithsv2 Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Black Squad Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Runner up Hack Summit 2024 Presented By Temenos II & III Year EEE Students Runner Up with 50,000 Cash Reward Decentralized Solar Energy Generation Hackathon III Year EEE Students Winners with Cash Rewards Anoka Ideathon 2024 Team ECE (II & III) Runner Up With Cash Reward Cellbot Healthcare Jam 2024 Team Drastic Innovators Standing first among 70 Teams with Cash Reward Hackfest2k24 3rd Year AI&DS Students Grabbed 3rd Place Standing out of 200+ teams IIT's Mint Hackathon Tech Mavericks Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states IIT's Mint Hackathon Team Weavers Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states The Future AI Tech Hackathon 2024 Mohamed Abubakker S & Sanjai L Secured 2nd Runner Up with Cash Reward Idea Ignite Hackthon 3rd Year CSE Students Secured 2nd Position among 2340 Participants Ninjacart AgriTech Hackathon 2024 Team Eshwarites Won cash prize of Rs. 50,000/- UNESCO-India-Africa Hackathon 2022 N.Sudarsan, AI&DS Won cash prize of Rs. 3,00,000/- National Level Hackathon Team ECE 6th Position among 250+ Clans IEEE - PROJECT EXPO 2024 4 Member Team Won 2nd Prize with Cash award BOOTCAMP (Phase  I) INTERNSHIPS In order to give our students a holistic learning experience, we are committed to ensuring our students get the best internship opportunities. We are proud of Eshwarites who shine across the country, with their internships in prestigious institutions including IIT Bombay, CSIR etc. These internships begin as early as second year! PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT A thirst for challenges along with a product mindset is deeply ingrained in Eshwarites. We are proud to showcase some products built from scratch through teamwork and innovative spirit. These products are solutions for real-word problems that have made life easy. Eshwarites never stop their inquisitive thinking and are always looking for the next problem to solve. IGNITE - STARTUP ACCELERATOR GET READY TO TURN YOUR IDEA INTO A MARKETABLE PRODUCT. The state-of-the-art facilities of Ignite, creates an exciting ecosystem for students to collaborate using prototyping labs and a collaborative workspace. Ignite, staying true to its name is the birthplace of many start-ups. The first few years in the life of a start-up is crucial. At Sri Eshwar, we give students the experience of how to convert an idea to a finished product by mentoring them through structured processes, conducting bootcamps and providing the infrastructure required to build the product. We also provide financial support if required, to support the launch of the product. Once the startup is stable and mature,, the young entrepreneurs fly off into their own offices and grow the business further. Sri Eshwar has been the birthplace of many such young entrepreneurs. ENTREPRENEURSHIP Here’s a sneak peak of some Eshwarites who are now flying high as successful entrepreneurs. SKILL DEVELOPMENT Sri Eshwar not only nurtures successful students but also plays a vital role in uplifting the skill levels of the people in the society and upgrading the economy as a whole. At Sri Eshwar, we empower aspiring entrepreneurs with the skills required to establish their businesses. Special skill building programs are conducted for women entrepreneurs to enable them to set up small businesses to support themselves and their families. Sri Eshwar is dedicated to uplifting women of nearby localities by training them with the necessary skills and empowering them to lead their lives as successful entrepreneurs. Through grants received and seed funds sponsored by the Institution, WEDP programmes (Women Entrepreneurship Development Programmes) are conducted by Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation as a way to uplift those women around us. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INNOVATION IDEATE. INNOVATE. INCUBATE CENTRE FOR INNOVATION THE LAUNCHPAD FOR STUDENT INNOVATORS Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation is a hub for students from different streams of specialization to come together to collectively build products through active collaboration and creative thinking using emerging technologies. With the state of art facilities and excellent mentorship, we are excited about nurturing young innovators who can push the boundaries of innovation and make a great impact in the the world. Who knows! We may well be nurturing the next biggest innovator! 25+ SUMMER INTERNSHIPS IN IIT, NIT, CSIR 9 STARTUPS ACCELERATED THROUGH IGNITE 18 CoEs ACROSS INDUSTRY VERTICALS TO FOSTER INNOVATION 100+
HACKATHON WINS IN 1 YEAR LEADERSHIP Dr.Maheswari Raja Dean – Innovation Know more INNOVATION ADVISORY BOARD In order to be successful in our mission and to create a top-notch innovative ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, we actively consult and engage with the following Advisory board members from prestigious institutions. Their periodic guidance and help is valuable to us and our students. Mr.Jaiber John Director, Revobots AI Inc, Former Senior Software Architect, Intel Dr.Kannan Moudgalya Head of Application Software Cell and head of the Centre for Distance Engineering Education Programme at IIT Bombay VISION To cultivate a dynamic ecosystem where ideas flourish, technologies advance, and inter disciplinary collaboration thrives for empowering future engineers by promoting innovations, problem solving, sustainable solutions to the real world challenges. MISSION To serve as a platform for innovation by providing state of the art facilities, resources, mentorship, and a collaborative environment where students and researchers can explore, develop, and implement cutting edge technologies. Our mission is to empower future engineers and innovators to create sustainable, impactful solutions, nurturing a culture of creativity and interdisciplinary collaboration. CENTRES OF EXCELLENCE Centres of Excellence(CoE) provides a platform for all department students from 1st year onwards, to gain knowledge on emerging technologies of their choice. Using the skills and knowledge gained here, students form teams with like-minded peers, and solve real world problems, develop products, publish papers, obtain international certifications, participate in Hackathons, bag internship opportunities. CoEs actively involve industry professionals for knowledge sharing and product guidance. Today companies are moving towards skill-based hiring, and CoEs serve as an excellent platform for students to become highly skilled, specialized and certified in their areas of interest and get placed in the companies that match their interest. In short, CoEs is a multi-disciplinary platform for students to stay ahead of the game! Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence and Robotics Centre of Excellence in Data Science Centre of Excellence in  Gen AI Centre of Excellence in  Full Stack & App Development Centre of Excellence in  Cloud Computing Centre of Excellence in  Business Analytics Centre of Excellence in Cyber Security Centre of Excellence in  Gaming and Animation Centre of Excellence in Augmented Reality and Virtual Reality Centre of Excellence in  System on chip Centre of Excellence in  Embedded and IOT Centre of Excellence in Drone Technologies Centre of Excellence in Networking Centre of Excellence in  Electronic Design and Automation Centre of Excellence in  Robotics and Industrial Automation Centre of Excellence in  3D Printing and Reverse Engineering Centre of Excellence in  E-Vehicles Centre of Excellence in  Graphics and Design INSTITUTION INNOVATION COUNCIL (IIC)​ The Institution Innovation Council (IIC) is an initiative by the Ministry of Education to systematically foster a culture of innovation and startup ecosystem into educational institutions. IIC’s role is to engage students and faculty in innovation and entrepreneurship related activities such as ideation, problem solving, proof of concept development, design thinking, IPR, project handling and management at pre-incubation and incubation stage, etc. In order to foster innovative culture and start-up ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, IIC activities such as projects, workshops, hackathons, ideation and brainstorming sessions are carried out. IIC provides a way for students and faculty members to further upskill and empower themselves with innovative thinking and entrepreneurship skills. KNOW MORE HACKATHONS Hackathons are an integral part of the innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar. These exciting events bring together a diverse set of students, to tackle a specific challenge or develop a new product with certain specified themes within a compressed time frame. By participating in hackathons, students gain tremendous exposure, networking opportunities with peers, new perspectives to solve problems, mentorship from senior industry professionals to fine tune their ideas and design, internship opportunities and even early placement opportunities. At Sri Eshwar, winning hackathons has become a habit! In fact it is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Vulnheist Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Hacksmithsv2 Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Black Squad Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Runner up Hack Summit 2024 Presented By Temenos II & III Year EEE Students Runner Up with 50,000 Cash Reward Decentralized Solar Energy Generation Hackathon III Year EEE Students Winners with Cash Rewards Anoka Ideathon 2024 Team ECE (II & III) Runner Up With Cash Reward Cellbot Healthcare Jam 2024 Team Drastic Innovators Standing first among 70 Teams with Cash Reward Hackfest2k24 3rd Year AI&DS Students Grabbed 3rd Place Standing out of 200+ teams IIT's Mint Hackathon Tech Mavericks Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states IIT's Mint Hackathon Team Weavers Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states The Future AI Tech Hackathon 2024 Mohamed Abubakker S & Sanjai L Secured 2nd Runner Up with Cash Reward Idea Ignite Hackthon 3rd Year CSE Students Secured 2nd Position among 2340 Participants Ninjacart AgriTech Hackathon 2024 Team Eshwarites Won cash prize of Rs. 50,000/- UNESCO-India-Africa Hackathon 2022 N.Sudarsan, AI&DS Won cash prize of Rs. 3,00,000/- National Level Hackathon Team ECE 6th Position among 250+ Clans IEEE - PROJECT EXPO 2024 4 Member Team Won 2nd Prize with Cash award BOOTCAMP (Phase  I) INTERNSHIPS In order to give our students a holistic learning experience, we are committed to ensuring our students get the best internship opportunities. We are proud of Eshwarites who shine across the country, with their internships in prestigious institutions including IIT Bombay, CSIR etc. These internships begin as early as second year! PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT A thirst for challenges along with a product mindset is deeply ingrained in Eshwarites. We are proud to showcase some products built from scratch through teamwork and innovative spirit. These products are solutions for real-word problems that have made life easy. Eshwarites never stop their inquisitive thinking and are always looking for the next problem to solve. IGNITE - STARTUP ACCELERATOR GET READY TO TURN YOUR IDEA INTO A MARKETABLE PRODUCT. The state-of-the-art facilities of Ignite, creates an exciting ecosystem for students to collaborate using prototyping labs and a collaborative workspace. Ignite, staying true to its name is the birthplace of many start-ups. The first few years in the life of a start-up is crucial. At Sri Eshwar, we give students the experience of how to convert an idea to a finished product by mentoring them through structured processes, conducting bootcamps and providing the infrastructure required to build the product. We also provide financial support if required, to support the launch of the product. Once the startup is stable and mature,, the young entrepreneurs fly off into their own offices and grow the business further. Sri Eshwar has been the birthplace of many such young entrepreneurs. ENTREPRENEURSHIP Here’s a sneak peak of some Eshwarites who are now flying high as successful entrepreneurs. SKILL DEVELOPMENT Sri Eshwar not only nurtures successful students but also plays a vital role in uplifting the skill levels of the people in the society and upgrading the economy as a whole. At Sri Eshwar, we empower aspiring entrepreneurs with the skills required to establish their businesses. Special skill building programs are conducted for women entrepreneurs to enable them to set up small businesses to support themselves and their families. Sri Eshwar is dedicated to uplifting women of nearby localities by training them with the necessary skills and empowering them to lead their lives as successful entrepreneurs. Through grants received and seed funds sponsored by the Institution, WEDP programmes (Women Entrepreneurship Development Programmes) are conducted by Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation as a way to uplift those women around us. IIC provides a way for students and faculty members to further upskill and empower themselves with innovative thinking and entrepreneurship skills. KNOW MORE HACKATHONS Hackathons are an integral part of the innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar. These exciting events bring together a diverse set of students, to tackle a specific challenge or develop a new product with certain specified themes within a compressed time frame. By participating in hackathons, students gain tremendous exposure, networking opportunities with peers, new perspectives to solve problems, mentorship from senior industry professionals to fine tune their ideas and design, internship opportunities and even early placement opportunities. At Sri Eshwar, winning hackathons has become a habit! In fact it is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Vulnheist Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Hacksmithsv2 Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Black Squad Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Runner up Hack Summit 2024 Presented By Temenos II & III Year EEE Students Runner Up with 50,000 Cash Reward Decentralized Solar Energy Generation Hackathon III Year EEE Students Winners with Cash Rewards Anoka Ideathon 2024 Team ECE (II & III) Runner Up With Cash Reward Cellbot Healthcare Jam 2024 Team Drastic Innovators Standing first among 70 Teams with Cash Reward Hackfest2k24 3rd Year AI&DS Students Grabbed 3rd Place Standing out of 200+ teams IIT's Mint Hackathon Tech Mavericks Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states IIT's Mint Hackathon Team Weavers Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states The Future AI Tech Hackathon 2024 Mohamed Abubakker S & Sanjai L Secured 2nd Runner Up with Cash Reward Idea Ignite Hackthon 3rd Year CSE Students Secured 2nd Position among 2340 Participants Ninjacart AgriTech Hackathon 2024 Team Eshwarites Won cash prize of Rs. 50,000/- UNESCO-India-Africa Hackathon 2022 N.Sudarsan, AI&DS Won cash prize of Rs. 3,00,000/- National Level Hackathon Team ECE 6th Position among 250+ Clans IEEE - PROJECT EXPO 2024 4 Member Team Won 2nd Prize with Cash award BOOTCAMP (Phase  I) INTERNSHIPS In order to give our students a holistic learning experience, we are committed to ensuring our students get the best internship opportunities. We are proud of Eshwarites who shine across the country, with their internships in prestigious institutions including IIT Bombay, CSIR etc. These internships begin as early as second year! PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT A thirst for challenges along with a product mindset is deeply ingrained in Eshwarites. We are proud to showcase some products built from scratch through teamwork and innovative spirit. These products are solutions for real-word problems that have made life easy. Eshwarites never stop their inquisitive thinking and are always looking for the next problem to solve. IGNITE - STARTUP ACCELERATOR GET READY TO TURN YOUR IDEA INTO A MARKETABLE PRODUCT. The state-of-the-art facilities of Ignite, creates an exciting ecosystem for students to collaborate using prototyping labs and a collaborative workspace. Ignite, staying true to its name is the birthplace of many start-ups. The first few years in the life of a start-up is crucial. At Sri Eshwar, we give students the experience of how to convert an idea to a finished product by mentoring them through structured processes, conducting bootcamps and providing the infrastructure required to build the product. We also provide financial support if required, to support the launch of the product. Once the startup is stable and mature,, the young entrepreneurs fly off into their own offices and grow the business further. Sri Eshwar has been the birthplace of many such young entrepreneurs. ENTREPRENEURSHIP Here’s a sneak peak of some Eshwarites who are now flying high as successful entrepreneurs. SKILL DEVELOPMENT Sri Eshwar not only nurtures successful students but also plays a vital role in uplifting the skill levels of the people in the society and upgrading the economy as a whole. At Sri Eshwar, we empower aspiring entrepreneurs with the skills required to establish their businesses. Special skill building programs are conducted for women entrepreneurs to enable them to set up small businesses to support themselves and their families. Sri Eshwar is dedicated to uplifting women of nearby localities by training them with the necessary skills and empowering them to lead their lives as successful entrepreneurs. Through grants received and seed funds sponsored by the Institution, WEDP programmes (Women Entrepreneurship Development Programmes) are conducted by Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation as a way to uplift those women around us. Their periodic guidance and help is valuable to us and our students. Mr.Jaiber John Director, Revobots AI Inc, Former Senior Software Architect, Intel Dr.Kannan Moudgalya Head of Application Software Cell and head of the Centre for Distance Engineering Education Programme at IIT Bombay VISION To cultivate a dynamic ecosystem where ideas flourish, technologies advance, and inter disciplinary collaboration thrives for empowering future engineers by promoting innovations, problem solving, sustainable solutions to the real world challenges. MISSION To serve as a platform for innovation by providing state of the art facilities, resources, mentorship, and a collaborative environment where students and researchers can explore, develop, and implement cutting edge technologies. Our mission is to empower future engineers and innovators to create sustainable, impactful solutions, nurturing a culture of creativity and interdisciplinary collaboration. CENTRES OF EXCELLENCE Centres of Excellence(CoE) provides a platform for all department students from 1st year onwards, to gain knowledge on emerging technologies of their choice. Using the skills and knowledge gained here, students form teams with like-minded peers, and solve real world problems, develop products, publish papers, obtain international certifications, participate in Hackathons, bag internship opportunities. CoEs actively involve industry professionals for knowledge sharing and product guidance. Today companies are moving towards skill-based hiring, and CoEs serve as an excellent platform for students to become highly skilled, specialized and certified in their areas of interest and get placed in the companies that match their interest. In short, CoEs is a multi-disciplinary platform for students to stay ahead of the game! Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INNOVATION IDEATE. INNOVATE. INCUBATE CENTRE FOR INNOVATION THE LAUNCHPAD FOR STUDENT INNOVATORS Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation is a hub for students from different streams of specialization to come together to collectively build products through active collaboration and creative thinking using emerging technologies. With the state of art facilities and excellent mentorship, we are excited about nurturing young innovators who can push the boundaries of innovation and make a great impact in the the world. Who knows! We may well be nurturing the next biggest innovator! 25+ SUMMER INTERNSHIPS IN IIT, NIT, CSIR 9 STARTUPS ACCELERATED THROUGH IGNITE 18 CoEs ACROSS INDUSTRY VERTICALS TO FOSTER INNOVATION 100+
HACKATHON WINS IN 1 YEAR LEADERSHIP Dr.Maheswari Raja Dean – Innovation Know more INNOVATION ADVISORY BOARD In order to be successful in our mission and to create a top-notch innovative ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, we actively consult and engage with the following Advisory board members from prestigious institutions. Their periodic guidance and help is valuable to us and our students. Mr.Jaiber John Director, Revobots AI Inc, Former Senior Software Architect, Intel Dr.Kannan Moudgalya Head of Application Software Cell and head of the Centre for Distance Engineering Education Programme at IIT Bombay VISION To cultivate a dynamic ecosystem where ideas flourish, technologies advance, and inter disciplinary collaboration thrives for empowering future engineers by promoting innovations, problem solving, sustainable solutions to the real world challenges. MISSION To serve as a platform for innovation by providing state of the art facilities, resources, mentorship, and a collaborative environment where students and researchers can explore, develop, and implement cutting edge technologies. Our mission is to empower future engineers and innovators to create sustainable, impactful solutions, nurturing a culture of creativity and interdisciplinary collaboration. CENTRES OF EXCELLENCE Centres of Excellence(CoE) provides a platform for all department students from 1st year onwards, to gain knowledge on emerging technologies of their choice. Using the skills and knowledge gained here, students form teams with like-minded peers, and solve real world problems, develop products, publish papers, obtain international certifications, participate in Hackathons, bag internship opportunities. CoEs actively involve industry professionals for knowledge sharing and product guidance. Today companies are moving towards skill-based hiring, and CoEs serve as an excellent platform for students to become highly skilled, specialized and certified in their areas of interest and get placed in the companies that match their interest. In short, CoEs is a multi-disciplinary platform for students to stay ahead of the game! Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence and Robotics Centre of Excellence in Data Science Centre of Excellence in  Gen AI Centre of Excellence in  Full Stack & App Development Centre of Excellence in  Cloud Computing Centre of Excellence in  Business Analytics Centre of Excellence in Cyber Security Centre of Excellence in  Gaming and Animation Centre of Excellence in Augmented Reality and Virtual Reality Centre of Excellence in  System on chip Centre of Excellence in  Embedded and IOT Centre of Excellence in Drone Technologies Centre of Excellence in Networking Centre of Excellence in  Electronic Design and Automation Centre of Excellence in  Robotics and Industrial Automation Centre of Excellence in  3D Printing and Reverse Engineering Centre of Excellence in  E-Vehicles Centre of Excellence in  Graphics and Design INSTITUTION INNOVATION COUNCIL (IIC)​ The Institution Innovation Council (IIC) is an initiative by the Ministry of Education to systematically foster a culture of innovation and startup ecosystem into educational institutions. IIC’s role is to engage students and faculty in innovation and entrepreneurship related activities such as ideation, problem solving, proof of concept development, design thinking, IPR, project handling and management at pre-incubation and incubation stage, etc. In order to foster innovative culture and start-up ecosystem at Sri Eshwar, IIC activities such as projects, workshops, hackathons, ideation and brainstorming sessions are carried out. IIC provides a way for students and faculty members to further upskill and empower themselves with innovative thinking and entrepreneurship skills. KNOW MORE HACKATHONS Hackathons are an integral part of the innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar. These exciting events bring together a diverse set of students, to tackle a specific challenge or develop a new product with certain specified themes within a compressed time frame. By participating in hackathons, students gain tremendous exposure, networking opportunities with peers, new perspectives to solve problems, mentorship from senior industry professionals to fine tune their ideas and design, internship opportunities and even early placement opportunities. At Sri Eshwar, winning hackathons has become a habit! In fact it is in the DNA of Eshwarites! Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Vulnheist Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Hacksmithsv2 Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Black Squad Selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Runner up Hack Summit 2024 Presented By Temenos II & III Year EEE Students Runner Up with 50,000 Cash Reward Decentralized Solar Energy Generation Hackathon III Year EEE Students Winners with Cash Rewards Anoka Ideathon 2024 Team ECE (II & III) Runner Up With Cash Reward Cellbot Healthcare Jam 2024 Team Drastic Innovators Standing first among 70 Teams with Cash Reward Hackfest2k24 3rd Year AI&DS Students Grabbed 3rd Place Standing out of 200+ teams IIT's Mint Hackathon Tech Mavericks Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states IIT's Mint Hackathon Team Weavers Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states The Future AI Tech Hackathon 2024 Mohamed Abubakker S & Sanjai L Secured 2nd Runner Up with Cash Reward Idea Ignite Hackthon 3rd Year CSE Students Secured 2nd Position among 2340 Participants Ninjacart AgriTech Hackathon 2024 Team Eshwarites Won cash prize of Rs. 50,000/- UNESCO-India-Africa Hackathon 2022 N.Sudarsan, AI&DS Won cash prize of Rs. 3,00,000/- National Level Hackathon Team ECE 6th Position among 250+ Clans IEEE - PROJECT EXPO 2024 4 Member Team Won 2nd Prize with Cash award BOOTCAMP (Phase  I) INTERNSHIPS In order to give our students a holistic learning experience, we are committed to ensuring our students get the best internship opportunities. We are proud of Eshwarites who shine across the country, with their internships in prestigious institutions including IIT Bombay, CSIR etc. These internships begin as early as second year! PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT A thirst for challenges along with a product mindset is deeply ingrained in Eshwarites. We are proud to showcase some products built from scratch through teamwork and innovative spirit. These products are solutions for real-word problems that have made life easy. Eshwarites never stop their inquisitive thinking and are always looking for the next problem to solve. IGNITE - STARTUP ACCELERATOR GET READY TO TURN YOUR IDEA INTO A MARKETABLE PRODUCT. The state-of-the-art facilities of Ignite, creates an exciting ecosystem for students to collaborate using prototyping labs and a collaborative workspace. Ignite, staying true to its name is the birthplace of many start-ups. The first few years in the life of a start-up is crucial. At Sri Eshwar, we give students the experience of how to convert an idea to a finished product by mentoring them through structured processes, conducting bootcamps and providing the infrastructure required to build the product. We also provide financial support if required, to support the launch of the product. Once the startup is stable and mature,, the young entrepreneurs fly off into their own offices and grow the business further. Sri Eshwar has been the birthplace of many such young entrepreneurs. ENTREPRENEURSHIP Here’s a sneak peak of some Eshwarites who are now flying high as successful entrepreneurs. SKILL DEVELOPMENT Sri Eshwar not only nurtures successful students but also plays a vital role in uplifting the skill levels of the people in the society and upgrading the economy as a whole. At Sri Eshwar, we empower aspiring entrepreneurs with the skills required to establish their businesses. Special skill building programs are conducted for women entrepreneurs to enable them to set up small businesses to support themselves and their families. Sri Eshwar is dedicated to uplifting women of nearby localities by training them with the necessary skills and empowering them to lead their lives as successful entrepreneurs. Through grants received and seed funds sponsored by the Institution, WEDP programmes (Women Entrepreneurship Development Programmes) are conducted by Sri Eshwar’s Centre for Innovation as a way to uplift those women around us. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS YOUR RUNWAY FOR GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES CENTRE FOR INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS Global experiences can open your eyes like never before. Meeting new students from different cultures,exchanging and brainstorming ideas, can create a huge shift in the way we perceive the world.  The Centre for International Relations enhances academic excellence through global collaboration offering Eshwarites, opportunities for international exposure and preparing the students and faculty members for a diverse and interconnected world. We also welcome students and faculty from overseas to come experience what it is like, to learn, or do research at our campus – be it for a short term internship  or a semester with us. So come, let’s exchange an amalgam of ideas and culture, to truly experience the world, together! 50+ PARTNERSHIPS WITH TOP UNIVERSITIES WORLDWIDE 50+ INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS 1000+ STUDENTS TRAINED IN INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGES 10+ GLOBAL UNIVERSITY VISITING FACULTY LEADERSHIP Mr. Kannan Narasimhan Dean – Industry & International Relations Know more Dr. M. Karthikeyan Associate Director – International & Corporate Relations Know more INTERNATIONAL ADVISORY BOARD Here is our tall line up of diverse and eminent international advisors who are an integral part of our Centre for International Relations. With their help, we gain critical insights into futuristic global trends in technology and research. They also help us gain important connections into the global arena so that we can provide the best global opportunities and exposure for our students. Dr.Raj Gururajan Professor of Information Systems, University of Southern Queensland, Australia Dr.Masaru Shimomura Professor, Graduate School of Integrated Science and Technology, Shizuoka University, Japan Dr.Subramaniam Ganesan Director, Real Time & DSP Lab., Electrical and Computer Engineering Department, Oakland University, Rochester,  USA Dr.Yasuhiro Hayakawa Managing Professor, Shizuoka University, Japan Dr. Chan-Yun Yang Professor, Department of Electrical Engineering, National Taipei University, Taiwan Dr. Sri Devi Ravana Associate Professor, Department of Information Systems, University of Malaya, Malaysia Dr.Syed Abdul Rehman Khan Professor, Department of Supply Chain and Logistics Management, Tsinghua University, China Dr. Zihan Lv Associate Professor, Computer and Advance Technologies, Qingdao University, China Ts.Dr.Sumendra Yogarayan Professors & Deputy Chairperson, Centre of Intelligent Cloud Computing Faculty of Information Science and Technology Multimedia University Malaysia Dr.Siti Fatimah Binti Deputy Dean, Academic & International Relations Faculty of Information Science and Technology Multimedia University Malaysia Ms.Haslenna Hamdan Department of International Affairs, UiTM Terengganu Branch, Malaysia Dr.Mani Govindasamy Division Director & Assistant Professor , Ming Chi University of Technology , Taiwan Dr.Po-Ming Lee Distinguished Professor, Southern Taiwan University of Science and Technology, Taiwan GLOBAL ALLIANCES NEW CONNECTIONS. NEW HORIZONS. Sri Eshwar is going full throttle to make new connections with foreign universities to equip our students and faculty for the much-needed global exposure. Signing MOU is the first step to open the doors for international exchange. MOUs help facilitate the exchange of students for various programs and help gain valuable insights in problem solving and a rich cultural perspective. With our overseas partner universities, the possibilities for students to gain exposure is limitless! KNOW MORE OUTWARD MOBILITY Get set to fly off to gain global exposure - A value add to your career! Get ready to take off your career by going international, to gain new exposure like never before! Meeting and exchanging ideas with people of new cultures help open our perspective to unimaginable heights. Outward Mobility enables students to visit foreign countries for varying periods of time to gain the much needed exposure and a global perspective. SEMESTER ABROAD PROGRAM INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAM KNOW MORE INWARD MOBILITY come! experience the Indian technical brilliance & rich culture! Students wishing to make India a part of their academic pursuits, stop right here! Sri Eshwar offers Inward mobility programs that will give you a chance to work with some of the best researchers of the world, passionate faculty, and high quality students that will surely elevate your global exposure.You will surely be uplifted in your technical skills, problem solving approach, and at the same time appreciate our deep rooted culture and simple lifestyle! You are sure to gain fresh perspectives and make some new friends for life, here at Sri Eshwar. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INWARD MOBILITY INWARD MOBILITY With its state-of-the-art facilities and highly experienced professors, Sri Eshwar invites interested overseas students for Inward Mobility programs such as Semester @ Sri Eshwar, Internships and Summer/Winter School programs at its campus. The inward programs provide an opportunity for the incoming students to study/carry out research work on advanced technologies and experience the Indian culture and heritage. Overseas students interested in the above inward mobility programs may contact the CIR at internationalrelations@sece.ac.in. EXPERIENCE THE LAND OF CULTURAL DIVERSITY Coimbatore! A city in the brink of rapid modernization India is a highly diverse country, with a fusion of different cultures, languages, beliefs and lifestyles. It is a country that is advancing in technology and business space at a rapid pace, while being very possessive of our culture and values. We safeguard them no matter what. Coimbatore is located in Southern India, and is a city on the brink of rapid modernization. Coimbatore is a city full of heart, where the old vintage charm is still evident amidst the fast-paced advancements in infrastructure to make this city, truly, the best of both worlds.It is a city full of heart and soul – a city that gives respect to every individual big or small. An entrepreneurial city, known for its powerful manufacturing, garment and many other core companies. Due to its strategic location, excellent weather all year round and connectivity Coimbatore is fast emerging as the next IT hub of Tamil Nadu. Coimbatore has many scenic places, museums, lakes, sports activities that one can enjoy. With good weather round the year, and an entrepreneurial spirit in the air, Coimbatore sure will accelerate your passion to be an achiever! About Sri Eshwar – well, you need to be here to experience the magic. What are you waiting for? COME EXPERIENCE SRI ESHWAR! Inspiring Ambience Top Class Faculty Challenging Peers Fun Campus Why semester @ Sri Eshwar? Experience our research & innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar Opportunities to collaborate and work with high quality faculty and students Experience international learning and culture Enhance career prospects in India and abroad Create value add to your profile. APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply? Students with Minimum CGPA of 8.0 or equivalent in their university. Should have been enrolled as a full time student when they apply. Undergrads with English as their first language will be exempted from IELTS. How to apply? Decide the semester of study. Indian Fall Semester (July - Dec). Indian Winter Semester (Jan - June). Submit the required forms/transcripts duly signed, within the application deadline. Application form can be downloaded from the CIR page/Downloads section of Sri Eshwar’s website Academic transcripts (translated into English if required) Deadline -  3 months before the start of the semester. Early submission is highly encouraged. Attend virtual interview within 1 to 2 weeks of submission of application Receive your admission intimation (if selected) through email within 4 weeks after application deadline Got admitted! What’s next? Visa & Immigration Once accepted, the CIR will provide guidance and necessary documentation for the student visa application process. Buy Health Insurance plan Incoming students must have valid health insurance coverage. The college will provide information on insurance options available. Accommodation Accommodation and food will be taken care of by Sri Eshwar for the incoming overseas students at Sri Eshwar’s hostel facilities. The hostel details will be confirmed to the students upon arrival. Attend Pre-Onboarding Orientation Incoming students are required to attend a pre orientation session covering academic expectations, campus life, and available resources before their arrival. Seek Program Related Counseling The CIR offers counseling services to help incoming students to get acclimatized to the ambience at Sri Eshwar campus These sessions can be sought anytime prior to and during the program. Sri Eshwar provides opportunities for incoming students to participate in cultural exchange programs, student clubs, and other events to foster cross-cultural understanding and engagement. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. INTERNSHIPS @ SRI ESHWAR Sri Eshwar invites overseas students for project/research internships. Specific research internships is applicable for UG/Masters students and PhD scholars in order to collaborate with our research scholars/guides to carry out research activities over a period of 1 to 3 months. This gives an opportunity for the overseas students to spend considerable time at Sri Eshwar’s Advanced Research Centres. Through our Centres of Excellence, project internships in emerging technologies will also be provided for international students. APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply? Students must be from a partner institution of Sri Eshwar. Students must be in the 2nd year or more of their current undergraduate program. Masters and Phd scholars are eligible to apply anytime during the course of their program How to apply? Submit the following documents through email to cir@sece.ac.in Statement of Purpose (One page) Updated CV or Resume (One page) Transcripts or records of the last academic period (non-official transcripts admitted) English proficiency tests (for select countries) Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. SRI ESHWAR SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAMS A visit to Sri Eshwar by students from overseas institutions would provide them with an opportunity to engage in a short-term course on an emerging technology, experience the Sri Eshwar campus infrastructure, and immerse themselves in Indian culture and heritage through conducted tours. The CIR facilitates 1 to 3-week immersion programs for students from overseas institutions during the summer/winter holidays. Sri Eshwar is happy to provide accommodation and food to the overseas students enrolling in these programs. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INWARD MOBILITY INWARD MOBILITY With its state-of-the-art facilities and highly experienced professors, Sri Eshwar invites interested overseas students for Inward Mobility programs such as Semester @ Sri Eshwar, Internships and Summer/Winter School programs at its campus. The inward programs provide an opportunity for the incoming students to study/carry out research work on advanced technologies and experience the Indian culture and heritage. Overseas students interested in the above inward mobility programs may contact the CIR at internationalrelations@sece.ac.in. EXPERIENCE THE LAND OF CULTURAL DIVERSITY Coimbatore! A city in the brink of rapid modernization India is a highly diverse country, with a fusion of different cultures, languages, beliefs and lifestyles. It is a country that is advancing in technology and business space at a rapid pace, while being very possessive of our culture and values. We safeguard them no matter what. Coimbatore is located in Southern India, and is a city on the brink of rapid modernization. Coimbatore is a city full of heart, where the old vintage charm is still evident amidst the fast-paced advancements in infrastructure to make this city, truly, the best of both worlds.It is a city full of heart and soul – a city that gives respect to every individual big or small. An entrepreneurial city, known for its powerful manufacturing, garment and many other core companies. Due to its strategic location, excellent weather all year round and connectivity Coimbatore is fast emerging as the next IT hub of Tamil Nadu. Coimbatore has many scenic places, museums, lakes, sports activities that one can enjoy. With good weather round the year, and an entrepreneurial spirit in the air, Coimbatore sure will accelerate your passion to be an achiever! About Sri Eshwar – well, you need to be here to experience the magic. What are you waiting for? COME EXPERIENCE SRI ESHWAR! Inspiring Ambience Top Class Faculty Challenging Peers Fun Campus Why semester @ Sri Eshwar? Experience our research & innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar Opportunities to collaborate and work with high quality faculty and students Experience international learning and culture Enhance career prospects in India and abroad Create value add to your profile. APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply? Students with Minimum CGPA of 8.0 or equivalent in their university. Should have been enrolled as a full time student when they apply. Undergrads with English as their first language will be exempted from IELTS. How to apply? Decide the semester of study. Indian Fall Semester (July - Dec). Indian Winter Semester (Jan - June). Submit the required forms/transcripts duly signed, within the application deadline. Application form can be downloaded from the CIR page/Downloads section of Sri Eshwar’s website Academic transcripts (translated into English if required) Deadline -  3 months before the start of the semester. Early submission is highly encouraged. Attend virtual interview within 1 to 2 weeks of submission of application Receive your admission intimation (if selected) through email within 4 weeks after application deadline Got admitted! What’s next? Visa & Immigration Once accepted, the CIR will provide guidance and necessary documentation for the student visa application process. Buy Health Insurance plan Incoming students must have valid health insurance coverage. The college will provide information on insurance options available. Accommodation Accommodation and food will be taken care of by Sri Eshwar for the incoming overseas students at Sri Eshwar’s hostel facilities. The hostel details will be confirmed to the students upon arrival. Attend Pre-Onboarding Orientation Incoming students are required to attend a pre orientation session covering academic expectations, campus life, and available resources before their arrival. Seek Program Related Counseling The CIR offers counseling services to help incoming students to get acclimatized to the ambience at Sri Eshwar campus These sessions can be sought anytime prior to and during the program. Sri Eshwar provides opportunities for incoming students to participate in cultural exchange programs, student clubs, and other events to foster cross-cultural understanding and engagement. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. INTERNSHIPS @ SRI ESHWAR Sri Eshwar invites overseas students for project/research internships. Specific research internships is applicable for UG/Masters students and PhD scholars in order to collaborate with our research scholars/guides to carry out research activities over a period of 1 to 3 months. This gives an opportunity for the overseas students to spend considerable time at Sri Eshwar’s Advanced Research Centres. Through our Centres of Excellence, project internships in emerging technologies will also be provided for international students. APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply? Students must be from a partner institution of Sri Eshwar. Students must be in the 2nd year or more of their current undergraduate program. Masters and Phd scholars are eligible to apply anytime during the course of their program How to apply? Submit the following documents through email to cir@sece.ac.in Statement of Purpose (One page) Updated CV or Resume (One page) Transcripts or records of the last academic period (non-official transcripts admitted) English proficiency tests (for select countries) Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. SRI ESHWAR SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAMS A visit to Sri Eshwar by students from overseas institutions would provide them with an opportunity to engage in a short-term course on an emerging technology, experience the Sri Eshwar campus infrastructure, and immerse themselves in Indian culture and heritage through conducted tours. The CIR facilitates 1 to 3-week immersion programs for students from overseas institutions during the summer/winter holidays. Sri Eshwar is happy to provide accommodation and food to the overseas students enrolling in these programs. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. CIR - OFFICE Mr.Kannan Narasimhan Dean – Industry & International Relations +914259200320 Email: kannan_narasimhan@sece.ac.in Ms.Ramya Krishna Office Secretary, CIR +914259200320 Email: internationalrelations@sece.ac.in COME JOIN US TO EXPERIENCE LEARNING AT ITS BEST! Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INWARD MOBILITY INWARD MOBILITY With its state-of-the-art facilities and highly experienced professors, Sri Eshwar invites interested overseas students for Inward Mobility programs such as Semester @ Sri Eshwar, Internships and Summer/Winter School programs at its campus. The inward programs provide an opportunity for the incoming students to study/carry out research work on advanced technologies and experience the Indian culture and heritage. Overseas students interested in the above inward mobility programs may contact the CIR at internationalrelations@sece.ac.in. EXPERIENCE THE LAND OF CULTURAL DIVERSITY Coimbatore! A city in the brink of rapid modernization India is a highly diverse country, with a fusion of different cultures, languages, beliefs and lifestyles. It is a country that is advancing in technology and business space at a rapid pace, while being very possessive of our culture and values. We safeguard them no matter what. Coimbatore is located in Southern India, and is a city on the brink of rapid modernization. Coimbatore is a city full of heart, where the old vintage charm is still evident amidst the fast-paced advancements in infrastructure to make this city, truly, the best of both worlds.It is a city full of heart and soul – a city that gives respect to every individual big or small. An entrepreneurial city, known for its powerful manufacturing, garment and many other core companies. Due to its strategic location, excellent weather all year round and connectivity Coimbatore is fast emerging as the next IT hub of Tamil Nadu. Coimbatore has many scenic places, museums, lakes, sports activities that one can enjoy. With good weather round the year, and an entrepreneurial spirit in the air, Coimbatore sure will accelerate your passion to be an achiever! About Sri Eshwar – well, you need to be here to experience the magic. What are you waiting for? COME EXPERIENCE SRI ESHWAR! Inspiring Ambience Top Class Faculty Challenging Peers Fun Campus Why semester @ Sri Eshwar? Experience our research & innovation ecosystem at Sri Eshwar Opportunities to collaborate and work with high quality faculty and students Experience international learning and culture Enhance career prospects in India and abroad Create value add to your profile. APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply? Students with Minimum CGPA of 8.0 or equivalent in their university. Should have been enrolled as a full time student when they apply. Undergrads with English as their first language will be exempted from IELTS. How to apply? Decide the semester of study. Indian Fall Semester (July - Dec). Indian Winter Semester (Jan - June). Submit the required forms/transcripts duly signed, within the application deadline. Application form can be downloaded from the CIR page/Downloads section of Sri Eshwar’s website Academic transcripts (translated into English if required) Deadline -  3 months before the start of the semester. Early submission is highly encouraged. Attend virtual interview within 1 to 2 weeks of submission of application Receive your admission intimation (if selected) through email within 4 weeks after application deadline Got admitted! What’s next? Visa & Immigration Once accepted, the CIR will provide guidance and necessary documentation for the student visa application process. Buy Health Insurance plan Incoming students must have valid health insurance coverage. The college will provide information on insurance options available. Accommodation Accommodation and food will be taken care of by Sri Eshwar for the incoming overseas students at Sri Eshwar’s hostel facilities. The hostel details will be confirmed to the students upon arrival. Attend Pre-Onboarding Orientation Incoming students are required to attend a pre orientation session covering academic expectations, campus life, and available resources before their arrival. Seek Program Related Counseling The CIR offers counseling services to help incoming students to get acclimatized to the ambience at Sri Eshwar campus These sessions can be sought anytime prior to and during the program. Sri Eshwar provides opportunities for incoming students to participate in cultural exchange programs, student clubs, and other events to foster cross-cultural understanding and engagement. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. INTERNSHIPS @ SRI ESHWAR Sri Eshwar invites overseas students for project/research internships. Specific research internships is applicable for UG/Masters students and PhD scholars in order to collaborate with our research scholars/guides to carry out research activities over a period of 1 to 3 months. This gives an opportunity for the overseas students to spend considerable time at Sri Eshwar’s Advanced Research Centres. Through our Centres of Excellence, project internships in emerging technologies will also be provided for international students. APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply? Students must be from a partner institution of Sri Eshwar. Students must be in the 2nd year or more of their current undergraduate program. Masters and Phd scholars are eligible to apply anytime during the course of their program How to apply? Submit the following documents through email to cir@sece.ac.in Statement of Purpose (One page) Updated CV or Resume (One page) Transcripts or records of the last academic period (non-official transcripts admitted) English proficiency tests (for select countries) Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. SRI ESHWAR SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAMS A visit to Sri Eshwar by students from overseas institutions would provide them with an opportunity to engage in a short-term course on an emerging technology, experience the Sri Eshwar campus infrastructure, and immerse themselves in Indian culture and heritage through conducted tours. The CIR facilitates 1 to 3-week immersion programs for students from overseas institutions during the summer/winter holidays. Sri Eshwar is happy to provide accommodation and food to the overseas students enrolling in these programs. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 OUTWARD MOBILITY OUTWARD MOBILITY Sri Eshwar facilitates its students to explore academic opportunities outside India through Semester Abroad Programs, International Internships, Global Immersion and Cultural Exchange Programs. In today’s seamlessly interconnected world it becomes important that the students are provided with an ecosystem for global collaboration, interactions and exchange of ideas which is offered to the students through our Outward Mobility programs. SEMESTER ABROAD PROGRAM As an autonomous institution, Sri Eshwar encourages interested students to study one or two semesters in a globally reputed overseas institution. This blended degree program gives an opportunity to the students to study the overseas curriculum, experience different teaching learning processes, gain global perspectives, exposure to diverse cultures, and expand professional networks. After completion of the semester in the overseas institution, the student will return to Sri Eshwar to continue and complete his degree program. The credits earned by the student through the overseas courses will be transferred and added to the overall credits earned by the student at Sri Eshwar and considered for award of degree. SRI ESHWARITES @ MALAYA UNIVERSITY SRI ESHWARITES @ MALAYA UNIVERSITY Advantages of Semester Abroad Program Experience international learning and culture Enhance career prospects in India and abroad Explore opportunities for higher studies Enhance admission prospects in overseas universities Boost self confidence APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply for SAP? Students should have a minimum CGPA of 8.0 with no standing arrears. Year of Study For undergraduate students - 4 semesters should have been completed For Postgraduate students - 2 should have been completed Language Proficiency Based on university requirements, students must take the English proficiency tests like TOEFL, IELTS, or other accepted language assessments Passport Students must possess a valid passport for the entire duration of the program. How to apply? Request for a one–on-one counseling session by sending an email to cir@sece.ac.in. Schedule the session based on the mutual convenience of yourself and CIR coordinator. Decide if you wish to enroll in SAP. Submit the required forms/transcripts duly signed, within the application deadline. Your most recent academic transcripts Two letters of recommendation from professors who can vouch for your academic abilities and potential. Detailed Resume(CV) highlighting academic achievements, extracurricular activities, and relevant project details. Transcript of Language Proficiency tests such as TOEFL or IELTS, where required. Attend an Interview. (applicable for some universities) You will be contacted to attend an in-person/virtual interview (if required) within 1 to 2 weeks of submission of application. Receive your admission intimation (if selected) through email. The application deadline for each program will vary. Check the program-specific deadlines with the CIR. Got admitted! What’s next? Plan your travel arrangements Apply for the necessary visa (if applicable) well in advance. Check any health requirements, such as vaccinations, and fulfill them before departure. Attend Orientation and Pre-Departure session conducted by the university. A mandatory session covering topics such as cultural adjustment, health and safety, and academic expectations will be conducted by CIR team. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. Good luck with your application! 
CIR will always be with you to support you in every step of the way. INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS We strongly believe that overseas internship opportunities will give global exposure and further enhance the knowledge, skills and confidence level of our students. We highly encourage our students to enroll for internship experiences abroad to propel their careers. We provide our students with overseas internship opportunities in various countries for a duration of 1 to 3 months. Students interested in International Internships may contact the CIR. Download the International Internship Request form and mail to cir@sece.ac.in . SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOLS A short-term visit to overseas institutions would provide students with an opportunity to participate in a course on an emerging technology, while also experiencing the campus infrastructure and culture through conducted tours. The CIR facilitates 1 to 3-week immersion programs for its students at leading overseas institutions during the summer/winter holidays. The following are some of the overseas institutions with which the CIR has an agreement for Summer/Winter School opportunities. Students interested in Summer/Winter Schools programs may contact the CIR. Download the Summer/Winter Request Schools request form and mail to cir@sece.ac.in. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 OUTWARD MOBILITY OUTWARD MOBILITY Sri Eshwar facilitates its students to explore academic opportunities outside India through Semester Abroad Programs, International Internships, Global Immersion and Cultural Exchange Programs. In today’s seamlessly interconnected world it becomes important that the students are provided with an ecosystem for global collaboration, interactions and exchange of ideas which is offered to the students through our Outward Mobility programs. SEMESTER ABROAD PROGRAM As an autonomous institution, Sri Eshwar encourages interested students to study one or two semesters in a globally reputed overseas institution. This blended degree program gives an opportunity to the students to study the overseas curriculum, experience different teaching learning processes, gain global perspectives, exposure to diverse cultures, and expand professional networks. After completion of the semester in the overseas institution, the student will return to Sri Eshwar to continue and complete his degree program. The credits earned by the student through the overseas courses will be transferred and added to the overall credits earned by the student at Sri Eshwar and considered for award of degree. SRI ESHWARITES @ MALAYA UNIVERSITY SRI ESHWARITES @ MALAYA UNIVERSITY Advantages of Semester Abroad Program Experience international learning and culture Enhance career prospects in India and abroad Explore opportunities for higher studies Enhance admission prospects in overseas universities Boost self confidence APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply for SAP? Students should have a minimum CGPA of 8.0 with no standing arrears. Year of Study For undergraduate students - 4 semesters should have been completed For Postgraduate students - 2 should have been completed Language Proficiency Based on university requirements, students must take the English proficiency tests like TOEFL, IELTS, or other accepted language assessments Passport Students must possess a valid passport for the entire duration of the program. How to apply? Request for a one–on-one counseling session by sending an email to cir@sece.ac.in. Schedule the session based on the mutual convenience of yourself and CIR coordinator. Decide if you wish to enroll in SAP. Submit the required forms/transcripts duly signed, within the application deadline. Your most recent academic transcripts Two letters of recommendation from professors who can vouch for your academic abilities and potential. Detailed Resume(CV) highlighting academic achievements, extracurricular activities, and relevant project details. Transcript of Language Proficiency tests such as TOEFL or IELTS, where required. Attend an Interview. (applicable for some universities) You will be contacted to attend an in-person/virtual interview (if required) within 1 to 2 weeks of submission of application. Receive your admission intimation (if selected) through email. The application deadline for each program will vary. Check the program-specific deadlines with the CIR. Got admitted! What’s next? Plan your travel arrangements Apply for the necessary visa (if applicable) well in advance. Check any health requirements, such as vaccinations, and fulfill them before departure. Attend Orientation and Pre-Departure session conducted by the university. A mandatory session covering topics such as cultural adjustment, health and safety, and academic expectations will be conducted by CIR team. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. Good luck with your application! 
CIR will always be with you to support you in every step of the way. INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS We strongly believe that overseas internship opportunities will give global exposure and further enhance the knowledge, skills and confidence level of our students. We highly encourage our students to enroll for internship experiences abroad to propel their careers. We provide our students with overseas internship opportunities in various countries for a duration of 1 to 3 months. Students interested in International Internships may contact the CIR. Download the International Internship Request form and mail to cir@sece.ac.in . SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOLS A short-term visit to overseas institutions would provide students with an opportunity to participate in a course on an emerging technology, while also experiencing the campus infrastructure and culture through conducted tours. The CIR facilitates 1 to 3-week immersion programs for its students at leading overseas institutions during the summer/winter holidays. The following are some of the overseas institutions with which the CIR has an agreement for Summer/Winter School opportunities. Students interested in Summer/Winter Schools programs may contact the CIR. Download the Summer/Winter Request Schools request form and mail to cir@sece.ac.in. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 OUTWARD MOBILITY OUTWARD MOBILITY Sri Eshwar facilitates its students to explore academic opportunities outside India through Semester Abroad Programs, International Internships, Global Immersion and Cultural Exchange Programs. In today’s seamlessly interconnected world it becomes important that the students are provided with an ecosystem for global collaboration, interactions and exchange of ideas which is offered to the students through our Outward Mobility programs. SEMESTER ABROAD PROGRAM As an autonomous institution, Sri Eshwar encourages interested students to study one or two semesters in a globally reputed overseas institution. This blended degree program gives an opportunity to the students to study the overseas curriculum, experience different teaching learning processes, gain global perspectives, exposure to diverse cultures, and expand professional networks. After completion of the semester in the overseas institution, the student will return to Sri Eshwar to continue and complete his degree program. The credits earned by the student through the overseas courses will be transferred and added to the overall credits earned by the student at Sri Eshwar and considered for award of degree. SRI ESHWARITES @ MALAYA UNIVERSITY SRI ESHWARITES @ MALAYA UNIVERSITY Advantages of Semester Abroad Program Experience international learning and culture Enhance career prospects in India and abroad Explore opportunities for higher studies Enhance admission prospects in overseas universities Boost self confidence APPLICATION PROCESS Who can apply for SAP? Students should have a minimum CGPA of 8.0 with no standing arrears. Year of Study For undergraduate students - 4 semesters should have been completed For Postgraduate students - 2 should have been completed Language Proficiency Based on university requirements, students must take the English proficiency tests like TOEFL, IELTS, or other accepted language assessments Passport Students must possess a valid passport for the entire duration of the program. How to apply? Request for a one–on-one counseling session by sending an email to cir@sece.ac.in. Schedule the session based on the mutual convenience of yourself and CIR coordinator. Decide if you wish to enroll in SAP. Submit the required forms/transcripts duly signed, within the application deadline. Your most recent academic transcripts Two letters of recommendation from professors who can vouch for your academic abilities and potential. Detailed Resume(CV) highlighting academic achievements, extracurricular activities, and relevant project details. Transcript of Language Proficiency tests such as TOEFL or IELTS, where required. Attend an Interview. (applicable for some universities) You will be contacted to attend an in-person/virtual interview (if required) within 1 to 2 weeks of submission of application. Receive your admission intimation (if selected) through email. The application deadline for each program will vary. Check the program-specific deadlines with the CIR. Got admitted! What’s next? Plan your travel arrangements Apply for the necessary visa (if applicable) well in advance. Check any health requirements, such as vaccinations, and fulfill them before departure. Attend Orientation and Pre-Departure session conducted by the university. A mandatory session covering topics such as cultural adjustment, health and safety, and academic expectations will be conducted by CIR team. Contact CIR office at any point, if you have questions in the application process. Good luck with your application! 
CIR will always be with you to support you in every step of the way. INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS We strongly believe that overseas internship opportunities will give global exposure and further enhance the knowledge, skills and confidence level of our students. We highly encourage our students to enroll for internship experiences abroad to propel their careers. We provide our students with overseas internship opportunities in various countries for a duration of 1 to 3 months. Students interested in International Internships may contact the CIR. Download the International Internship Request form and mail to cir@sece.ac.in . SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOLS A short-term visit to overseas institutions would provide students with an opportunity to participate in a course on an emerging technology, while also experiencing the campus infrastructure and culture through conducted tours. The CIR facilitates 1 to 3-week immersion programs for its students at leading overseas institutions during the summer/winter holidays. The following are some of the overseas institutions with which the CIR has an agreement for Summer/Winter School opportunities.
