AND HAPPY CAMPUS From the minute you set foot in our campus, you will feel an air of positivity, vibrancy and a gush of happiness. Sri Eshwar is a happening place, where students are always engaged in activities that cultivate their passion, spark their imagination and develop their personalities. It’s magical! A CAMPUS FULL OF POSITIVE VIBES. Corporate Ambience. Tranquil Greenery. Positive Vibes. Our campus ambience has a mix of stylish ‘corporate’ spaces amidst green landscape and an earthy at-home feel. Every inch of the campus is carefully designed to ensure that the students enjoy the best facilities and an inspiring ambience to gear themselves for a fantastic career ahead.
The management of Sri Eshwar aims to give students high standards of infrastructure and ambience to enable them to perform to their fullest potential. These four crucial years of a student life, will not just be the most memorable years, but also a turning point that paves the way for their successful futures. STUDENT LEADERSHIP COUNCIL PEER LEADERS MAKE CAMPUS LIFE ENJOYABLE. Student Council is a fantastic opportunity for students to lead the various student verticals of  their interest. By entrusting the full responsibility to the students to organize the events, we see that the outcomes are exceptional and they are able to organize the activities, much to the liking of their peers. Student Council leaders are directly mentored by the senior leadership team of Sri Eshwar. The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! KNOW MORE FINE ARTS LIFE IS A SONG. LIFE IS A DANCE. LIFE IS A CELEBRATION. If you have a keen interest in art forms like music, dance and other art forms, we are happy to provide opportunities and mentorship to further develop your interest and passion. We will provide you with many stages to perform and flaunt your prowess. SPORTS ETCHING STORIES OF CHAMPIONS! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together!  You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Fine Arts Media Max Movie Club Tamil Mandram Sports Club Mentoring Toastmasters Grooming Fashion Club SESSWA Amenities Hostel Experience KNOW MORE NCC DOING OUR PART FOR OUR COUNTRY. JAI HIND! Established on 28 December 2020, the NCC Unit at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering functions under 2 (TN) CTC NCC, Coimbatore, with 50 SD/SW cadets. Led by Lt. M. Mahaboob (Assistant Professor, ECE), who trained at Officers Training Academy, Nagpur, the unit emphasizes discipline, leadership, and patriotism through rigorous NCC training. KNOW MORE COMMUNITY OUTREACH WE GAIN SOMETHING. WE CONTRIBUTE SOMETHING. WE GAIN EVEN MORE Today’s youth are so full of heart and love for the community. We help Eshwarites to foster a giving spirit, by transforming their ideas into actionable projects that help the community. Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! At Sri Eshwar, we take the welfare, safety and health of our students very seriously. A dedicated team of highly qualified and experienced faculty are appointed to handle all aspects of Student Welfare. The committees under Student welfare, have protocols and guidelines and well equipped to handle the various aspects of student welfare, including anti-ragging awareness, student counseling, POSH or grievance redressal. KNOW MORE FESTIVAL CELEBRATIONS MODERN IN OUR OUTLOOK, YET SOAKED IN TRADITION While on one side, we rigorously train students to become technically advanced, we also take equal care to ensure our roots and traditions are never forgotten! Sri Eshwar celebrates many festivals throughout the year in full spirit and enthusiastic participation from faculty and students. KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 LIFE @ SRI ESHWAR Student Leadership Council Fine Arts Sports Clubs Community Outreach NCC Student Welfare library amenity center medical center hostel transport LIVELY AND HAPPY CAMPUS From the minute you set foot in our campus, you will feel an air of positivity, vibrancy and a gush of happiness. Sri Eshwar is a happening place, where students are always engaged in activities that cultivate their passion, spark their imagination and develop their personalities. It’s magical! A CAMPUS FULL OF POSITIVE VIBES. Corporate Ambience. Tranquil Greenery. Positive Vibes. Our campus ambience has a mix of stylish ‘corporate’ spaces amidst green landscape and an earthy at-home feel. Every inch of the campus is carefully designed to ensure that the students enjoy the best facilities and an inspiring ambience to gear themselves for a fantastic career ahead.
The management of Sri Eshwar aims to give students high standards of infrastructure and ambience to enable them to perform to their fullest potential. These four crucial years of a student life, will not just be the most memorable years, but also a turning point that paves the way for their successful futures. STUDENT LEADERSHIP COUNCIL PEER LEADERS MAKE CAMPUS LIFE ENJOYABLE. Student Council is a fantastic opportunity for students to lead the various student verticals of  their interest. By entrusting the full responsibility to the students to organize the events, we see that the outcomes are exceptional and they are able to organize the activities, much to the liking of their peers. Student Council leaders are directly mentored by the senior leadership team of Sri Eshwar. The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! KNOW MORE FINE ARTS LIFE IS A SONG. LIFE IS A DANCE. LIFE IS A CELEBRATION. If you have a keen interest in art forms like music, dance and other art forms, we are happy to provide opportunities and mentorship to further develop your interest and passion. We will provide you with many stages to perform and flaunt your prowess. SPORTS ETCHING STORIES OF CHAMPIONS! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together!  You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Fine Arts Media Max Movie Club Tamil Mandram Sports Club Mentoring Toastmasters Grooming Fashion Club SESSWA Amenities Hostel Experience KNOW MORE NCC DOING OUR PART FOR OUR COUNTRY. JAI HIND! Established on 28 December 2020, the NCC Unit at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering functions under 2 (TN) CTC NCC, Coimbatore, with 50 SD/SW cadets. Led by Lt. M. Mahaboob (Assistant Professor, ECE), who trained at Officers Training Academy, Nagpur, the unit emphasizes discipline, leadership, and patriotism through rigorous NCC training. KNOW MORE COMMUNITY OUTREACH WE GAIN SOMETHING. WE CONTRIBUTE SOMETHING. WE GAIN EVEN MORE Today’s youth are so full of heart and love for the community. We help Eshwarites to foster a giving spirit, by transforming their ideas into actionable projects that help the community. Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! At Sri Eshwar, we take the welfare, safety and health of our students very seriously. A dedicated team of highly qualified and experienced faculty are appointed to handle all aspects of Student Welfare. The committees under Student welfare, have protocols and guidelines and well equipped to handle the various aspects of student welfare, including anti-ragging awareness, student counseling, POSH or grievance redressal. KNOW MORE FESTIVAL CELEBRATIONS MODERN IN OUR OUTLOOK, YET SOAKED IN TRADITION While on one side, we rigorously train students to become technically advanced, we also take equal care to ensure our roots and traditions are never forgotten! Sri Eshwar celebrates many festivals throughout the year in full spirit and enthusiastic participation from faculty and students. KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college. AND HAPPY CAMPUS From the minute you set foot in our campus, you will feel an air of positivity, vibrancy and a gush of happiness. Sri Eshwar is a happening place, where students are always engaged in activities that cultivate their passion, spark their imagination and develop their personalities. It’s magical! A CAMPUS FULL OF POSITIVE VIBES. Corporate Ambience. Tranquil Greenery. Positive Vibes. Our campus ambience has a mix of stylish ‘corporate’ spaces amidst green landscape and an earthy at-home feel. Every inch of the campus is carefully designed to ensure that the students enjoy the best facilities and an inspiring ambience to gear themselves for a fantastic career ahead.
The management of Sri Eshwar aims to give students high standards of infrastructure and ambience to enable them to perform to their fullest potential. These four crucial years of a student life, will not just be the most memorable years, but also a turning point that paves the way for their successful futures. STUDENT LEADERSHIP COUNCIL PEER LEADERS MAKE CAMPUS LIFE ENJOYABLE. Student Council is a fantastic opportunity for students to lead the various student verticals of  their interest. By entrusting the full responsibility to the students to organize the events, we see that the outcomes are exceptional and they are able to organize the activities, much to the liking of their peers. Student Council leaders are directly mentored by the senior leadership team of Sri Eshwar. The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! KNOW MORE FINE ARTS LIFE IS A SONG. LIFE IS A DANCE. LIFE IS A CELEBRATION. If you have a keen interest in art forms like music, dance and other art forms, we are happy to provide opportunities and mentorship to further develop your interest and passion. We will provide you with many stages to perform and flaunt your prowess. SPORTS ETCHING STORIES OF CHAMPIONS! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together!  You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Fine Arts Media Max Movie Club Tamil Mandram Sports Club Mentoring Toastmasters Grooming Fashion Club SESSWA Amenities Hostel Experience KNOW MORE NCC DOING OUR PART FOR OUR COUNTRY. JAI HIND! Established on 28 December 2020, the NCC Unit at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering functions under 2 (TN) CTC NCC, Coimbatore, with 50 SD/SW cadets. Led by Lt. M. Mahaboob (Assistant Professor, ECE), who trained at Officers Training Academy, Nagpur, the unit emphasizes discipline, leadership, and patriotism through rigorous NCC training. KNOW MORE COMMUNITY OUTREACH WE GAIN SOMETHING. WE CONTRIBUTE SOMETHING. WE GAIN EVEN MORE Today’s youth are so full of heart and love for the community. We help Eshwarites to foster a giving spirit, by transforming their ideas into actionable projects that help the community. Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! At Sri Eshwar, we take the welfare, safety and health of our students very seriously. A dedicated team of highly qualified and experienced faculty are appointed to handle all aspects of Student Welfare. The committees under Student welfare, have protocols and guidelines and well equipped to handle the various aspects of student welfare, including anti-ragging awareness, student counseling, POSH or grievance redressal. KNOW MORE FESTIVAL CELEBRATIONS MODERN IN OUR OUTLOOK, YET SOAKED IN TRADITION While on one side, we rigorously train students to become technically advanced, we also take equal care to ensure our roots and traditions are never forgotten! Sri Eshwar celebrates many festivals throughout the year in full spirit and enthusiastic participation from faculty and students. KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college. AND HAPPY CAMPUS From the minute you set foot in our campus, you will feel an air of positivity, vibrancy and a gush of happiness. Sri Eshwar is a happening place, where students are always engaged in activities that cultivate their passion, spark their imagination and develop their personalities. It’s magical! A CAMPUS FULL OF POSITIVE VIBES. Corporate Ambience. Tranquil Greenery. Positive Vibes. Our campus ambience has a mix of stylish ‘corporate’ spaces amidst green landscape and an earthy at-home feel. Every inch of the campus is carefully designed to ensure that the students enjoy the best facilities and an inspiring ambience to gear themselves for a fantastic career ahead.
The management of Sri Eshwar aims to give students high standards of infrastructure and ambience to enable them to perform to their fullest potential. These four crucial years of a student life, will not just be the most memorable years, but also a turning point that paves the way for their successful futures. STUDENT LEADERSHIP COUNCIL PEER LEADERS MAKE CAMPUS LIFE ENJOYABLE. Student Council is a fantastic opportunity for students to lead the various student verticals of  their interest. By entrusting the full responsibility to the students to organize the events, we see that the outcomes are exceptional and they are able to organize the activities, much to the liking of their peers. Student Council leaders are directly mentored by the senior leadership team of Sri Eshwar. The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! KNOW MORE FINE ARTS LIFE IS A SONG. LIFE IS A DANCE. LIFE IS A CELEBRATION. If you have a keen interest in art forms like music, dance and other art forms, we are happy to provide opportunities and mentorship to further develop your interest and passion. We will provide you with many stages to perform and flaunt your prowess. SPORTS ETCHING STORIES OF CHAMPIONS! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together!  You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Fine Arts Media Max Movie Club Tamil Mandram Sports Club Mentoring Toastmasters Grooming Fashion Club SESSWA Amenities Hostel Experience KNOW MORE NCC DOING OUR PART FOR OUR COUNTRY. JAI HIND! Established on 28 December 2020, the NCC Unit at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering functions under 2 (TN) CTC NCC, Coimbatore, with 50 SD/SW cadets. Led by Lt. M. Mahaboob (Assistant Professor, ECE), who trained at Officers Training Academy, Nagpur, the unit emphasizes discipline, leadership, and patriotism through rigorous NCC training. KNOW MORE COMMUNITY OUTREACH WE GAIN SOMETHING. WE CONTRIBUTE SOMETHING. WE GAIN EVEN MORE Today’s youth are so full of heart and love for the community. We help Eshwarites to foster a giving spirit, by transforming their ideas into actionable projects that help the community. Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! At Sri Eshwar, we take the welfare, safety and health of our students very seriously. A dedicated team of highly qualified and experienced faculty are appointed to handle all aspects of Student Welfare. The committees under Student welfare, have protocols and guidelines and well equipped to handle the various aspects of student welfare, including anti-ragging awareness, student counseling, POSH or grievance redressal. KNOW MORE FESTIVAL CELEBRATIONS MODERN IN OUR OUTLOOK, YET SOAKED IN TRADITION While on one side, we rigorously train students to become technically advanced, we also take equal care to ensure our roots and traditions are never forgotten! Sri Eshwar celebrates many festivals throughout the year in full spirit and enthusiastic participation from faculty and students. KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college. AND HAPPY CAMPUS From the minute you set foot in our campus, you will feel an air of positivity, vibrancy and a gush of happiness. Sri Eshwar is a happening place, where students are always engaged in activities that cultivate their passion, spark their imagination and develop their personalities. It’s magical! A CAMPUS FULL OF POSITIVE VIBES. Corporate Ambience. Tranquil Greenery. Positive Vibes. Our campus ambience has a mix of stylish ‘corporate’ spaces amidst green landscape and an earthy at-home feel. Every inch of the campus is carefully designed to ensure that the students enjoy the best facilities and an inspiring ambience to gear themselves for a fantastic career ahead.
The management of Sri Eshwar aims to give students high standards of infrastructure and ambience to enable them to perform to their fullest potential. These four crucial years of a student life, will not just be the most memorable years, but also a turning point that paves the way for their successful futures. STUDENT LEADERSHIP COUNCIL PEER LEADERS MAKE CAMPUS LIFE ENJOYABLE. Student Council is a fantastic opportunity for students to lead the various student verticals of  their interest. By entrusting the full responsibility to the students to organize the events, we see that the outcomes are exceptional and they are able to organize the activities, much to the liking of their peers. Student Council leaders are directly mentored by the senior leadership team of Sri Eshwar. The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! KNOW MORE FINE ARTS LIFE IS A SONG. LIFE IS A DANCE. LIFE IS A CELEBRATION. If you have a keen interest in art forms like music, dance and other art forms, we are happy to provide opportunities and mentorship to further develop your interest and passion. We will provide you with many stages to perform and flaunt your prowess. SPORTS ETCHING STORIES OF CHAMPIONS! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together!  You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Fine Arts Media Max Movie Club Tamil Mandram Sports Club Mentoring Toastmasters Grooming Fashion Club SESSWA Amenities Hostel Experience KNOW MORE NCC DOING OUR PART FOR OUR COUNTRY. JAI HIND! Established on 28 December 2020, the NCC Unit at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering functions under 2 (TN) CTC NCC, Coimbatore, with 50 SD/SW cadets. Led by Lt. M. Mahaboob (Assistant Professor, ECE), who trained at Officers Training Academy, Nagpur, the unit emphasizes discipline, leadership, and patriotism through rigorous NCC training. KNOW MORE COMMUNITY OUTREACH WE GAIN SOMETHING. WE CONTRIBUTE SOMETHING. WE GAIN EVEN MORE Today’s youth are so full of heart and love for the community. We help Eshwarites to foster a giving spirit, by transforming their ideas into actionable projects that help the community. Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! At Sri Eshwar, we take the welfare, safety and health of our students very seriously. A dedicated team of highly qualified and experienced faculty are appointed to handle all aspects of Student Welfare. The committees under Student welfare, have protocols and guidelines and well equipped to handle the various aspects of student welfare, including anti-ragging awareness, student counseling, POSH or grievance redressal. KNOW MORE FESTIVAL CELEBRATIONS MODERN IN OUR OUTLOOK, YET SOAKED IN TRADITION While on one side, we rigorously train students to become technically advanced, we also take equal care to ensure our roots and traditions are never forgotten! Sri Eshwar celebrates many festivals throughout the year in full spirit and enthusiastic participation from faculty and students. KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college. AND HAPPY CAMPUS From the minute you set foot in our campus, you will feel an air of positivity, vibrancy and a gush of happiness. Sri Eshwar is a happening place, where students are always engaged in activities that cultivate their passion, spark their imagination and develop their personalities. It’s magical! A CAMPUS FULL OF POSITIVE VIBES. Corporate Ambience. Tranquil Greenery. Positive Vibes. Our campus ambience has a mix of stylish ‘corporate’ spaces amidst green landscape and an earthy at-home feel. Every inch of the campus is carefully designed to ensure that the students enjoy the best facilities and an inspiring ambience to gear themselves for a fantastic career ahead.
The management of Sri Eshwar aims to give students high standards of infrastructure and ambience to enable them to perform to their fullest potential. These four crucial years of a student life, will not just be the most memorable years, but also a turning point that paves the way for their successful futures. STUDENT LEADERSHIP COUNCIL PEER LEADERS MAKE CAMPUS LIFE ENJOYABLE. Student Council is a fantastic opportunity for students to lead the various student verticals of  their interest. By entrusting the full responsibility to the students to organize the events, we see that the outcomes are exceptional and they are able to organize the activities, much to the liking of their peers. Student Council leaders are directly mentored by the senior leadership team of Sri Eshwar. The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! KNOW MORE FINE ARTS LIFE IS A SONG. LIFE IS A DANCE. LIFE IS A CELEBRATION. If you have a keen interest in art forms like music, dance and other art forms, we are happy to provide opportunities and mentorship to further develop your interest and passion. We will provide you with many stages to perform and flaunt your prowess. SPORTS ETCHING STORIES OF CHAMPIONS! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together!  You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Fine Arts Media Max Movie Club Tamil Mandram Sports Club Mentoring Toastmasters Grooming Fashion Club SESSWA Amenities Hostel Experience KNOW MORE NCC DOING OUR PART FOR OUR COUNTRY. JAI HIND! Established on 28 December 2020, the NCC Unit at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering functions under 2 (TN) CTC NCC, Coimbatore, with 50 SD/SW cadets. Led by Lt. M. Mahaboob (Assistant Professor, ECE), who trained at Officers Training Academy, Nagpur, the unit emphasizes discipline, leadership, and patriotism through rigorous NCC training. KNOW MORE COMMUNITY OUTREACH WE GAIN SOMETHING. WE CONTRIBUTE SOMETHING. WE GAIN EVEN MORE Today’s youth are so full of heart and love for the community. We help Eshwarites to foster a giving spirit, by transforming their ideas into actionable projects that help the community. Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! At Sri Eshwar, we take the welfare, safety and health of our students very seriously. A dedicated team of highly qualified and experienced faculty are appointed to handle all aspects of Student Welfare. The committees under Student welfare, have protocols and guidelines and well equipped to handle the various aspects of student welfare, including anti-ragging awareness, student counseling, POSH or grievance redressal. KNOW MORE FESTIVAL CELEBRATIONS MODERN IN OUR OUTLOOK, YET SOAKED IN TRADITION While on one side, we rigorously train students to become technically advanced, we also take equal care to ensure our roots and traditions are never forgotten! Sri Eshwar celebrates many festivals throughout the year in full spirit and enthusiastic participation from faculty and students. KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college. KNOW MORE Downloads Eshwar Times - Newsletter COME JOIN US TO EXPERIENCE LEARNING AT ITS BEST! KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college. AND HAPPY CAMPUS From the minute you set foot in our campus, you will feel an air of positivity, vibrancy and a gush of happiness. Sri Eshwar is a happening place, where students are always engaged in activities that cultivate their passion, spark their imagination and develop their personalities. It’s magical! A CAMPUS FULL OF POSITIVE VIBES. Corporate Ambience. Tranquil Greenery. Positive Vibes. Our campus ambience has a mix of stylish ‘corporate’ spaces amidst green landscape and an earthy at-home feel. Every inch of the campus is carefully designed to ensure that the students enjoy the best facilities and an inspiring ambience to gear themselves for a fantastic career ahead.
The management of Sri Eshwar aims to give students high standards of infrastructure and ambience to enable them to perform to their fullest potential. These four crucial years of a student life, will not just be the most memorable years, but also a turning point that paves the way for their successful futures. STUDENT LEADERSHIP COUNCIL PEER LEADERS MAKE CAMPUS LIFE ENJOYABLE. Student Council is a fantastic opportunity for students to lead the various student verticals of  their interest. By entrusting the full responsibility to the students to organize the events, we see that the outcomes are exceptional and they are able to organize the activities, much to the liking of their peers. Student Council leaders are directly mentored by the senior leadership team of Sri Eshwar. The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together!  You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! The objective of the SLC is to keep the campus vibrant and happy with many events and activities, all year round, that students can enjoy under the able leadership of their peers! KNOW MORE FINE ARTS LIFE IS A SONG. LIFE IS A DANCE. LIFE IS A CELEBRATION. If you have a keen interest in art forms like music, dance and other art forms, we are happy to provide opportunities and mentorship to further develop your interest and passion. We will provide you with many stages to perform and flaunt your prowess. SPORTS ETCHING STORIES OF CHAMPIONS! Our highly qualified and enthusiastic physical education department, will help you train and provide opportunities for your growth as a sportsperson. We provide the best facilities at Sri Eshwar to encourage and nurture your sportsmanship. KNOW MORE CLUBS ENERGETIC, LIKE-MINDED TEAMS WORKING TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE. Follow your passion and love for music, dance, theater, movies, media etc. At Sri Eshwar, like-minded students come together to revel in the joy of their passion together!  You name it. We have it. If we don’t, we create it just for you. It’s as simple as that! Fine Arts Media Max Movie Club Tamil Mandram Sports Club Mentoring Toastmasters Grooming Fashion Club SESSWA Amenities Hostel Experience KNOW MORE NCC DOING OUR PART FOR OUR COUNTRY. JAI HIND! Established on 28 December 2020, the NCC Unit at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering functions under 2 (TN) CTC NCC, Coimbatore, with 50 SD/SW cadets. Led by Lt. M. Mahaboob (Assistant Professor, ECE), who trained at Officers Training Academy, Nagpur, the unit emphasizes discipline, leadership, and patriotism through rigorous NCC training. KNOW MORE COMMUNITY OUTREACH WE GAIN SOMETHING. WE CONTRIBUTE SOMETHING. WE GAIN EVEN MORE Today’s youth are so full of heart and love for the community. We help Eshwarites to foster a giving spirit, by transforming their ideas into actionable projects that help the community. Eshwarites actively volunteer in various initiatives that make a visible impact in the lives of the people we serve. KNOW MORE STUDENT WELFARE TAKING CARE OF OUR STUDENTS IS OUR NO.1 PRIORITY! At Sri Eshwar, we take the welfare, safety and health of our students very seriously. A dedicated team of highly qualified and experienced faculty are appointed to handle all aspects of Student Welfare. The committees under Student welfare, have protocols and guidelines and well equipped to handle the various aspects of student welfare, including anti-ragging awareness, student counseling, POSH or grievance redressal. KNOW MORE FESTIVAL CELEBRATIONS MODERN IN OUR OUTLOOK, YET SOAKED IN TRADITION While on one side, we rigorously train students to become technically advanced, we also take equal care to ensure our roots and traditions are never forgotten! Sri Eshwar celebrates many festivals throughout the year in full spirit and enthusiastic participation from faculty and students. KNOW MORE Flagship Events Inspiring Moments, Unforgettable Experiences Experience the vibrant spirit of Sri Eshwar through our signature events — a perfect blend of creativity, leadership, and teamwork. From exciting cultural fests and tech challenges to inspiring entrepreneurial gigs, these events make campus life truly unforgettable KNOW MORE LIBRARY AVID READERS. STOP HERE!​​ We have a vast collection of books just to captivate your interest and awaken your curiosity! Come into our library and lose yourself inside pages of imagination and information for as long as you like! KNOW MORE AMENITY CENTRE PAMPERING STUDENTS WITH LUXURY AND COMFORT Amenity Centre is a 16000 sq feet of space specially designed and built to help students relax after a day’s rigorous learning activities. The Amenity Centre is equipped with a multi-cuisine food court, separate salon for boys and girls, a well-stocked supermarket, indoor sports area, fully functional gym, music room with all musical instruments and a visitor guest house with separate dining areas. As the day winds down, the Amenity Centre is usually full of activity and life! KNOW MORE MEDICAL CENTRE CARE AT THE RIGHT TIME. Our state-of-the-art medical center provides comprehensive care and emergency services for students. The Medical Centre is equipped with all necessary equipment, four beds (2 in girls ward, 2 in boys ward), and staffed by a team of full time Doctor and two Staff nurses, ready to take care of students’ emergency needs. The facility is rightly located for quick accessibility, benefitting hostel dwellers and day scholars. With utmost care, the Centre ensures immediate attention in times of crisis. KNOW MORE HOSTEL MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!​ First time away from the comfort of your home? No worries! At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security, and a feeling of positivity is paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for a lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance and heightened security measures. Sri Eshwar Hostel is comfortable in every way to make the student learning experience peaceful and enjoyable. KNOW MORE TRANSPORT Bus facility is provided to all day scholars attending from Coimbatore, Pollachi, Tirupur, Udumalpet, Negamum and nearby areas. Routes will be optimized to enable quickest transfer of students to and from the college. Sri Eshwar is also accessible by Public Buses with a convenient bus stop right outside the college. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 ADMISSIONS Sri Eshwar A Campus full of POSITIVE VIBES! If you dream of studying in a college with an active coding vibe or in an ecosystem of thinkers and problem solvers, participating and winning hackathons along with your peers, then stop right here! Is Sri Eshwar the right fit for your academic and career dreams? If you have big dreams for your future career and are willing to upskill yourself to what the industry needs, and put in the required effort to get placed in a top company with a high package, then Sri Eshwar is the place for you. If your dream is to go abroad for your higher studies or to study further in the premiere institutes in India, then again Sri Eshwar may be the place for you. If you plan to conduct research, going deep on the domain of your choice, then we can assure you that you will be inspired here! If you have the dreams of becoming a young entrepreneur, and wish to focus on your idea and learn the skills to convert your idea into a product and also lean on the support of mentors to stabilize your company, then we do just that! Finally, if you are unsure of what you want to become, we will bring out the best potential hidden inside you. We will ensure your career is bright and successful. College life is about learning and empowering yourself, having a lot of fun, making friends and bringing out the best in you. We assure you, Sri Eshwar will be the best four years of your life! Inspiring Leadership Principal Dr.Sudha Mohanram is also the Joint Managing Trustee. The leadership here is well connected to many industry professionals and senior leaders. Things move quickly around here. Decisions are taken at rapid pace for the welfare of students. Leadership team is friendly and they mentor, support and care for the holistic development of students. Highly Qualified and Friendly Faculty 58% of our faculty members are PhDs. With such high educational qualifications, decades of experience and knowledge, our faculty members are very committed and passionate about the success of students. Needless to say, our faculty are very friendly and down to earth and always make students comfortable. Dear students,it is all about you and you only! World Class Infrastructure We provide world-class infrastructure, be it our labs, training facilities, or smart classrooms for students to get inspired to study. The campus feels very corporate-like, stylish, and modern. Amenities here suit the students’ needs to learn in an enriching and positive environment. Challenging peers who inspire you to bring out your best Students bring out the best from each other. Be it participating as a team in hackathons or working on an Innovation or Research project, team work is highly encouraged here. You will definitely find like-minded peers with whom you can begin your life-long journey as an engineer –  seeking knowledge and finding solutions to problems together. Excellent Placement Opportunities With over 150+ top companies visiting our campus all year round for placements, it is sure that you will be placed in the company of your choice and be placed in the range of 4L to 40L per annum. All we need from you is your hard work and a great attitude. We will do the rest! Excellent Research opportunities If you are interested in diving deep into academics and pursuing research, Sri Eshwar is the right place for you. With top researchers from around the world, you can receive the right mentorship and guidance, ensuring success in your chosen field.Through ongoing academic research, students also bag excellent internship opportunities at premier institutions like IIT, NIT, and CSIR, which greatly enhances their learning experience. Study/Work Abroad Opportunities Sri Eshwar, through its Centre for International Relations, encourages students to seek opportunities abroad to study or work. Outward mobility programs enable students to venture out  short term programs in foreign countries.The Centre for Higher Education gives extensive coaching to prepare students for overseas opportunities. Young entrepreneur’s haven If you have an idea to build a product and eventually start a company, Sri Eshwar can bring that idea to life with our Ignite startup accelerator. For the right ideas, we even provide financial assistance and nurture you as an entrepreneur and your product till it is safe to leave the nest.Sri Eshwar is the home of many budding entrepreneurs. A Campus buzzing with vibrant energy Our campus is filled with activities and events that will keep you well-balanced, happy, and active. It is a great mix of work and play, here at Sri Eshwar. Many events are conducted throughout the year, to keep students happy and relaxed. indian citizens - admission procedure BE / BTech If you have just finished your 12th Grade, here are the entry Requirements for B.E, B.Tech Programs through Single Window Counselling. Pass in +12 examinations with Minimum Avg marks in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry as follows. OC 45% BC Including BC Muslim 40% MBC and DNC 40% SC/SCA/ST 40% For students who have completed Higher Secondary Course (Other than CBSE/Tamil Nadu Board), an equivalency certificate obtained from the Association of Indian Universities (AIU), New Delhi. In case of grading, lower bound of the mark ranges of a grade should be taken for calculating the percentage of marks. Selection Procedure: Single Window Counselling by Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Chennai, as per their norms. TNEA cutoff 2025-2026 : Dept. OC BC BCM MBC SC SCA ST AIDS 190 188.5 184.5 184.5 163 153.5 155.5 AM 190 188 184 183 160 161 150 CSBS 187.5 187 182.5 182.5 162.79 141.5 - CCE 189 187.5 184 184 153 156 - CSE 193.5 192 187.5 189.5 175 172.5 191 ECE 191.5 190 185.5 187.5 160.5 173 152.5 EEE 187 185.5 184.5 180.5 152.5 145.5 - IT 192.5 190.5 187 187 173.5 159.5 - MECH 184 182 - 175.5 147 - - Cyber Security 190.5 189 186 185 159 150.5 - UG Lateral Admissions If you have completed your Diploma or B.Sc and looking to join as a Lateral Entry student in the IInd year (3rd Semester), here are the entry requirements. Eligibility Pass in Diploma/B.Sc degree exam OC 45% BC Including BC Muslim 45% MBC and DNC 40% SC/SCA/ST 40% foreign nationals - ADMISSION PROCEDURE Admissions BE / BTech Programmes and under Foreign Nationals Overseas Citizen of India (OCI). Who can Apply? Foreign National(FN) - “Foreign National” means the Citizen of the Countries other than India who are not of Indian origin as defined under OCI. Overseas Citizen of India (OCI) - Overseas Citizen of India (OCI) means Persons of Indian Origin (PIOs) who were citizens of India on 26th January, 1950 or thereafter or were eligible to become citizens of India on 26th January, 1950 except who is or had been a citizen of Pakistan, Bangladesh or such other country. Children of Indian workers in Gulf Countries (CIWGC) - The Children of the parents who are working in Gulf Countries are eligible to apply under CIWGC. Eligibility Eligibility and academic Qualifications required for BE/BTech (Four Year) Degree programmes For admission to B.E./B.Tech Courses, candidates should have completed 12 years of schooling (equivalent to 10+2 system of Indian Education). They must have studied and obtained a pass with Good Grades as per their systems of education with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as their subjects in the qualifying examination. Candidate should have studied in English Medium or English as one of the subjects in the qualifying Examination. Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination, i.e. (10 + 2) of Indian System or its equivalent (completed 12 years of school education). The Candidate should have passed in all the subjects and scored a minimum average of 45 percentage in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry. If the candidate has grade certificates, he/she has to produce either the actual marks or equivalent marks for the respective grades. In case equivalent mark range is given for grades by the respective examination authorities, only the minimum marks applicable to the grades in the eligible subjects (Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry) will be taken into account. The candidate should provide equivalent mark or mark range for grades from the Principal. The candidate has to provide a pass certificate, if it is not clear from the mark sheet whether the candidate has passed all the subjects. Mark sheets with voluminous data or confusing formats will not be accepted. Selection Procedure The selection is purely provisional and is subject to the confirmation from the Anna University, Directorate of Technical Education, Chennai and All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. Since the medium of instruction is ENGLISH in Sri Eri Eshwar College of Engineering, only those candidates who have studied in the English Language medium / English as one of the subjects in the qualifying degree alone will generally be considered for admissions. The candidates have to indicate their order of Preference of Branches of study in the application. Mode of selection - Selection Committee will scrutinize the applications received based on eligibility criteria and intimate the applicants. Required Documents Candidates who are admitted under this scheme must obtain valid student visa issued by Indian missions abroad. Passport of the candidate. Valid student Visa / OCI card (In case of Citizen of Indian Origin). Proof of Financial support like parents bank statement for the last six months. School Transfer Certificate / Migration Certificate. If these certificates are not issued in the respective country, an equivalent transfer certificate from the Principal has to be specially obtained. Mark sheets of Secondary School Leaving Certificate (X Standard) or Equivalent. Higher Secondary Certificate (XII Standard) or equivalent* (OR) For 8+4 type of Foreign Boards: Mark Sheets from 8th to 12th standards. For 9+3 type of Foreign Boards: Mark Sheets from 9th to 12th standards. * The candidate who completed Higher Secondary Course (Other than CBSE/Tamil Nadu Board) has to submit the equivalency certificate obtained from the Association of Indian Universities (AIU), New Delhi. In case of grading, lower bound of the mark ranges of a grade should be taken for calculating the percentage of marks. COMMITTED. RESEARCH ORIENTED. CENTRE FOR RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT Centre for Research and Development plays a pivotal role as a catalyst for academic advancement and societal progress. By fostering a vibrant research culture, it encourages interdisciplinary collaboration, generates new knowledge, and addresses pressing societal challenges. By promoting innovation, it not only enriches the quality of education but also drives economic growth by facilitating the translation of research outcomes into practical applications. Leveraging partnerships with industry, government agencies and other academic institutions, the center maximizes its impact, contributing significantly to the advancement of knowledge and the socio-economic development of communities. RESEARCH INSTITUTE RECOGNITION BY ANNA UNIVERSITY 1 CRORE+ RESEARCH INCENTIVES 4 TOP 2% SCIENTISTS OF THE WORLD @ SRI ESHWAR WORLD CLASS RESEARCH FACILITIES LEADERSHIP Dr. G. Karuppusami Dean – Research & Outreach Know more Dr. H. Anandakumar Associate Dean – Research Know more RESEARCH ADVISORY BOARD The Research Advisory board comprises senior researchers from some of the best institutions in India. They provide guidance for the overall direction of our R&D initiatives and timely inputs to our research activities and initiatives. Dr.P.Santhi Thilagam Professor and Head, Department of Computer Science and Engineering
National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Mangalore, Karnataka, India Dr.S.Karunanidhi Director, CSL,RCI-Senior Scientist, DRDO(Hyderabad), India Dr.Anand Nayyar Professor, Scientist, Vice-Chairman (Research), Duy Tan University, Vietnam Dr.M.Santhakumar Dean, Industry collaboration and sponsored research, IIT Palakkad, Kerala, India RESEARCH ETHICS COMMITTEE Sri Eshwar College of Engineering is dedicated to promoting and maintaining high standards of integrity in academic research. Committed to fostering a culture of honesty and transparency, the institution prioritizes academic freedom and innovative thinking while striving to eliminate all forms of academic fraud, including plagiarism. SECE emphasizes the importance of original thought and expression, ensuring these standards through a rigorous review process. Faculty, staff and students are expected to adhere to the high ethical standards outlined in the Ethics and Values Policy of SECE, reinforcing the college’s commitment to academic honour and integrity. Sharing of knowledge especially theoretical and practical findings of research through various platforms enhances the quality of research. Researchers at Sri Eshwar possess great research acumen, leading to publications in SCI, WoS, Scopus, Indexed Journals and Filing of patents. Research Publications & Book Chapters Intellectual Property Rights (ipr) AU approved research institute SPONSORED RESEARCH Sri Eshwar encourages members of faculty to seek support and secure research funds from industry and various funding agencies such as DST, AICTE, TNSCST, MHRD, CSIR, DRDO, ISTE, Industry etc to develop research facility and to carry out research projects. The Institute also supports by sponsoring seed fund to the departments to set up research laboratories and promote research. Research Grants seed fund consultancy funding ADVANCED RESEARCH CENTRES Sri Eshwar Advanced Research Centre is fully committed to the advancement of research and development across a wide range of disciplines. Our 9 Advance Research Centres promotes multidisciplinary research in engineering and technology. Through the Advanced Research Centres, funded research projects, publication of research articles, commercialization of patents, short term training programs and development programs for faculty and students are conducted. Our multi-disciplinary approach and collaboration with industry partners, government agencies and academia enable us to address complex challenges and make significant contributions to various fields. DRDO sponsored  Centre for Quantum Computing and Nanotechnology DST Sponsored Centre For Advanced Materials And Testing Centre for Human-Centric AI and Augmented Intelligence Centre for Next-Generation Semiconductor and Microelectronics Technologies Centre for Blockchain, Cybersecurity and Secure Systems Centre for Future Networks and Digital Twin Technologies Centre for Green Technologies and Sustainability Centre for Computational Imaging and Machine Vision Systems Centre for Advanced Signal Processing and Translational Biomedical Engineering RESEARCH FACILITIES Sri Eshwar is committed to investing in high quality research facilities that enhance the quality of research and bring out the best research outcomes. KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCES Sri Eshwar is proud to host the following international conferences every year, to bring together globally renowned research professionals to share knowledge and collaborate for high quality research outcomes. These conferences also aim at exhibiting the technical expertise of budding technocrats, research scholars and representatives from academia and industry. International Conference on Advanced Computing and Communication Systems Series International Conference on Sustainable Materials and Technologies Series International Conference on Intelligent Computing and Smart Communication Systems Series RESEARCH EVENTS We host a vibrant array of research events designed to foster collaboration, knowledge exchange and innovation within our academic community. Our events provide valuable opportunities for networking, learning and sharing insights. KNOW MORE INSTITUTIONAL RESEARCH COMMITTEE Research Committee at Sri Eshwar is established to monitor the research initiatives and activities of the Institute. The committee consists of Deans, HoDs and Department Research Coordinators. To motivate and develop research culture among faculty and students. To establish a Research Centre in every department. The committee encourages the faculty members to enroll for PhD. programmes in their fields of interest. To motivate the faculty to take up research and consultancy projects. To encourage submission of proposals to the funding agencies for carrying out research projects and conducting national/International Conferences, Seminars, Faculty Development Programmes. To arrange timeline presentation of Research Scholars and provide assistance wherever required. To assist faculty and students in filing patent applications. To motivate faculty and students to publish papers in internationally reputed journals and in collaboration with industry experts. RESEARCH COORDINATORS Dr. T. Ramakrishnan , Professor, Mech Dr. P. Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS YOUR RUNWAY FOR GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES CENTRE FOR INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS Global experiences can open your eyes like never before. Meeting new students from different cultures,exchanging and brainstorming ideas, can create a huge shift in the way we perceive the world.  The Centre for International Relations enhances academic excellence through global collaboration offering Eshwarites, opportunities for international exposure and preparing the students and faculty members for a diverse and interconnected world. We also welcome students and faculty from overseas to come experience what it is like, to learn, or do research at our campus – be it for a short term internship  or a semester with us. So come, let’s exchange an amalgam of ideas and culture, to truly experience the world, together! 50+ PARTNERSHIPS WITH TOP UNIVERSITIES WORLDWIDE 50+ INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS 1000+ STUDENTS TRAINED IN INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGES 10+ GLOBAL UNIVERSITY VISITING FACULTY LEADERSHIP Mr. Kannan Narasimhan Dean – Industry & International Relations Know more Dr. M. Karthikeyan Associate Director – International & Corporate Relations Know more INTERNATIONAL ADVISORY BOARD Here is our tall line up of diverse and eminent international advisors who are an integral part of our Centre for International Relations. With their help, we gain critical insights into futuristic global trends in technology and research. They also help us gain important connections into the global arena so that we can provide the best global opportunities and exposure for our students. Dr.Raj Gururajan Professor of Information Systems, University of Southern Queensland, Australia Dr.Masaru Shimomura Professor, Graduate School of Integrated Science and Technology, Shizuoka University, Japan Dr.Subramaniam Ganesan Director, Real Time & DSP Lab., Electrical and Computer Engineering Department, Oakland University, Rochester,  USA Dr.Yasuhiro Hayakawa Managing Professor, Shizuoka University, Japan Dr. Chan-Yun Yang Professor, Department of Electrical Engineering, National Taipei University, Taiwan Dr. Sri Devi Ravana Associate Professor, Department of Information Systems, University of Malaya, Malaysia Dr.Syed Abdul Rehman Khan Professor, Department of Supply Chain and Logistics Management, Tsinghua University, China Dr. Zihan Lv Associate Professor, Computer and Advance Technologies, Qingdao University, China Ts.Dr.Sumendra Yogarayan Professors & Deputy Chairperson, Centre of Intelligent Cloud Computing Faculty of Information Science and Technology Multimedia University Malaysia Dr.Siti Fatimah Binti Deputy Dean, Academic & International Relations Faculty of Information Science and Technology Multimedia University Malaysia Ms.Haslenna Hamdan Department of International Affairs, UiTM Terengganu Branch, Malaysia Dr.Mani Govindasamy Division Director & Assistant Professor , Ming Chi University of Technology , Taiwan Dr.Po-Ming Lee Distinguished Professor, Southern Taiwan University of Science and Technology, Taiwan GLOBAL ALLIANCES NEW CONNECTIONS. NEW HORIZONS. Sri Eshwar is going full throttle to make new connections with foreign universities to equip our students and faculty for the much-needed global exposure. Signing MOU is the first step to open the doors for international exchange. MOUs help facilitate the exchange of students for various programs and help gain valuable insights in problem solving and a rich cultural perspective. With our overseas partner universities, the possibilities for students to gain exposure is limitless! KNOW MORE OUTWARD MOBILITY Get set to fly off to gain global exposure - A value add to your career! Get ready to take off your career by going international, to gain new exposure like never before! Meeting and exchanging ideas with people of new cultures help open our perspective to unimaginable heights. Outward Mobility enables students to visit foreign countries for varying periods of time to gain the much needed exposure and a global perspective. SEMESTER ABROAD PROGRAM INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAM KNOW MORE INWARD MOBILITY come! experience the Indian technical brilliance & rich culture! Students wishing to make India a part of their academic pursuits, stop right here! Sri Eshwar offers Inward mobility programs that will give you a chance to work with some of the best researchers of the world, passionate faculty, and high quality students that will surely elevate your global exposure.You will surely be uplifted in your technical skills, problem solving approach, and at the same time appreciate our deep rooted culture and simple lifestyle! You are sure to gain fresh perspectives and make some new friends for life, here at Sri Eshwar.
